idea_spark.risk: 自适应采样可能丢失罕见但重要的生物学特征；不变VAE的互信息估计在高异质性下可能不稳定。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用数据本身的稀疏结构设计联邦学习算法，而非简单套用通用框架。

en.tldr: Proposes FL-Sailer, the first federated learning framework for single-cell ATAC-seq data, addressing ultra-high dimensionality, extreme sparsity, and cross-institutional heterogeneity via adaptive sampling and invariant VAE.
en.motivation: Single-cell ATAC-seq data cannot be easily shared across institutions due to privacy regulations and data size constraints; existing federated learning methods face three fundamental barriers: ultra-high dimensionality, extreme sparsity, and severe heterogeneity.
en.method: Integrates adaptive leverage score sampling (reducing dimensionality by 80%) and an invariant VAE architecture that disentangles biological signals from technical confounders via mutual information minimization.
en.result: On synthetic and real epigenomic datasets, FL-Sailer enables previously infeasible multi-institutional collaborations and surpasses centralized methods by using adaptive sampling as an implicit regularizer to suppress technical noise.
en.help_to_user: Helps users collaboratively analyze single-cell epigenetic data from multiple institutions without sharing raw data, ensuring privacy and efficiency.

idea_spark.idea: Combine adaptive sampling with mutual information minimization to simultaneously achieve feature selection and domain-invariant representation learning in federated settings.
idea_spark.risk: Adaptive sampling may discard rare but biologically important features; mutual information estimation in invariant VAE may be unstable under high heterogeneity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage the inherent sparsity structure of the data to design domain-specific federated learning algorithms rather than applying generic frameworks.

papers.title: Reconstruction of non-self-adjoint anisotropic and complex inclusions in the Calderón problem
papers.summary: We generalize recent results on the monotonicity method, for inclusion detection in the partial data anisotropic Calderón problem, to very general non-self-adjoint perturbations. This involves a forward model that accounts for both the anisotropic real conductivity and the anisotropic permittivity, and the results hold in any spatial dimension $d \geq 2$. We assume that the inclusion boundaries can be reached from the domain boundary via a set on which the background conductivity is self-adjoint, and that a definiteness condition holds near the inclusion boundaries. Away from the inclusion boundaries we allow general $L^\infty$ non-self-adjoint perturbations. We only require unique continuation based on the self-adjoint part of the background conductivity, thus making the methods compatible with generic unique continuation results.

ai.tldr: 将单调性方法推广到Calderón问题中非自伴各向异性复夹杂物的重建。
ai.motivation: 现有单调性方法主要针对自伴扰动，需要推广到更一般的非自伴情形。
ai.method: 基于背景电导率的自伴部分建立唯一延拓，允许远离夹杂边界的L^∞非自伴扰动。
ai.result: 在任意维度d≥2下，对部分数据各向异性Calderón问题中的非自伴夹杂物实现检测。
ai.help_to_user: 为电导率和介电常数同时未知的成像问题提供理论框架。

idea_spark.idea: 结合机器学习与单调性方法，自动识别夹杂物边界。
idea_spark.risk: 非自伴扰动可能破坏单调性，需严格验证条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用唯一延拓性质，可设计实验测量方案以降低数据要求。

en.tldr: Generalizes the monotonicity method to reconstruct non-self-adjoint anisotropic complex inclusions in the Calderón problem.
en.motivation: Existing monotonicity methods are limited to self-adjoint perturbations; need to handle more general non-self-adjoint cases.
en.method: Relies on unique continuation from the self-adjoint part of the background conductivity, allowing L^∞ non-self-adjoint perturbations away from inclusion boundaries.
en.result: Achieves inclusion detection for partial-data anisotropic Calderón problem with non-self-adjoint perturbations in any dimension d≥2.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework for imaging problems where both conductivity and permittivity are unknown.

idea_spark.idea: Combine machine learning with monotonicity methods to automatically identify inclusion boundaries.
idea_spark.risk: Non-self-adjoint perturbations may break monotonicity; conditions must be carefully verified.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging unique continuation properties can help design measurement schemes with reduced data requirements.

papers.title: A Numerical Investigation of Extremum-Seeking-Based Command Generation for Adaptively Controlled Systems
papers.summary: We develop an adaptive feedback control technique that combines an extremum-seeking-based command generator (ECG) with indirect adaptive control. In particular, ECG is used to generate commands that asymptotically optimize a cost function that is measured but whose functional form is unknown. For feedback control with command following and stabilization, the present paper combines ECG with predictive cost adaptive control (PCAC), which is an indirect adaptive control extension of model predictive control (MPC). PCAC extends generalized predictive control (GPC) by using quadratic programming to enforce output constraints and recursive least squares (RLS) with variable-rate forgetting (VRF) for system identification. The resulting ECG/PCAC framework combines command generation with closed-loop system identification and online optimization. The contribution of this paper is a numerical investigation of ECG/PCAC for adaptive stabilization, command following, and disturbance rejection

ai.tldr: 提出一种结合极值搜索命令生成器与间接自适应控制的框架，用于自适应稳定、指令跟踪和扰动抑制。
ai.motivation: 传统自适应控制难以在未知代价函数下优化指令生成，需要一种能在线优化且无需函数形式的控制方法。
ai.method: 将极值搜索命令生成器与预测代价自适应控制结合，采用二次规划约束输出、递归最小二乘带变速率遗忘进行系统辨识。
ai.result: 数值研究表明该框架能有效实现自适应稳定、指令跟踪和扰动抑制。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何将极值搜索与自适应预测控制结合以处理未知代价函数的优化问题。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将极值搜索命令生成器与强化学习结合，以处理更复杂的非凸代价函数。
idea_spark.risk: 极值搜索可能陷入局部最优，且变速率遗忘参数需谨慎调节以避免系统不稳定。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从极值搜索与模型预测控制的融合中，可启发设计更鲁棒的在线优化控制器。

en.tldr: Proposes a framework combining extremum-seeking command generator with indirect adaptive control for adaptive stabilization, command following, and disturbance rejection.
en.motivation: Traditional adaptive control struggles to optimize command generation under unknown cost functions, requiring an online optimization method without functional form.
en.method: Combines extremum-seeking command generator with predictive cost adaptive control, using quadratic programming for output constraints and recursive least squares with variable-rate forgetting for system identification.
en.result: Numerical investigation shows the framework effectively achieves adaptive stabilization, command following, and disturbance rejection.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to combine extremum seeking with adaptive predictive control for optimizing under unknown cost functions.

idea_spark.idea: Consider combining extremum-seeking command generator with reinforcement learning to handle more complex non-convex cost functions.
idea_spark.risk: Extremum seeking may get stuck in local optima, and variable-rate forgetting parameters need careful tuning to avoid instability.
idea_spark.inspiration: The fusion of extremum seeking and model predictive control inspires the design of more robust online optimization controllers.

papers.title: Single-Position Intervention Fails: Distributed Output Templates Drive In-Context Learning
papers.summary: Understanding how large language models encode task identity from few-shot demonstrations is a central open problem in mechanistic interpretability. Prior work uses linear probing to localize task representations, reporting high classification accuracy at specific layers. We reveal a striking dissociation: probing accuracy completely fails to predict causal importance. Single-position activation intervention achieves 0% task transfer across all 28 layers of Llama-3.2-3B-despite 100% probing accuracy at those same positions. This null result is itself a key finding, demonstrating that task encoding is fundamentally distributed. Multi-position intervention-replacing activations at all demonstration output tokens simultaneously-achieves up to 96% transfer (N=50, 95% CI: [87%, 99%]) at layer 8, pinpointing for the first time the causal locus of ICL task identity. We establish the generality of these findings across four models spanning three architecture families (LLaMA, Qwen, Gemma), discovering a universal intervention window at ~30% network depth. Causal tracing uncovers an asymmetric architecture: the query position is strictly necessary (53-100% disruption) while no individual demonstration position is necessary (0% disruption)-resolving a key ambiguity in prior accounts. Crucially, transfer depends on internal representation compatibility, not surface similarity (r=-0.05 vs r=0.31), ruling out trivial explanations. These results establish the distributed template hypothesis: ICL task identity is encoded as output format templates distributed across demonstration tokens, fundamentally reshaping our understanding of how in-context learning operates.

ai.tldr: 研究发现，单位置激活干预无法转移上下文学习中的任务身份，而分布式输出模板干预在约30%网络深度处实现了高达96%的转移，提出了分布式模板假说。
ai.motivation: 理解大语言模型如何从少量示例中编码任务身份是机械可解释性的核心问题，先前线性探针方法未能揭示因果重要性。
ai.method: 在Llama-3.2-3B等四个模型上，对比单位置和多位置激活干预，结合因果追踪分析任务编码的分布性。
ai.result: 单位置干预在所有28层均无法转移任务（0%），而多位置干预在层8达到96%转移；查询位置严格必要，而单个演示位置非必要；转移依赖内部表示兼容性而非表面相似性。
ai.help_to_user: 揭示了上下文学习中任务编码的分布式本质，为改进少样本学习机制和模型解释提供了新视角。

idea_spark.idea: 利用分布式输出模板干预设计更高效的少样本提示策略，或开发基于内部表示兼容性的任务迁移方法。
idea_spark.risk: 干预窗口的通用性可能受模型架构和任务类型限制，需验证在更大模型和不同任务上的稳健性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 因果干预与探针准确率的分离表明，高探针准确率不等于因果重要性，启发更严格的机制验证方法。

en.tldr: Single-position activation intervention fails to transfer task identity in in-context learning, while multi-position intervention at ~30% network depth achieves up to 96% transfer, proposing the distributed template hypothesis.
en.motivation: Understanding how large language models encode task identity from few-shot demonstrations is a central open problem in mechanistic interpretability; prior linear probing methods fail to predict causal importance.
en.method: Compared single-position and multi-position activation interventions across four models (LLaMA, Qwen, Gemma) using causal tracing to analyze distributed task encoding.
en.result: Single-position intervention achieved 0% task transfer across all 28 layers, while multi-position intervention reached 96% transfer at layer 8; query position is strictly necessary, no single demonstration position is necessary; transfer depends on internal representation compatibility, not surface similarity.
en.help_to_user: Reveals the distributed nature of task encoding in in-context learning, offering new insights for improving few-shot learning mechanisms and model interpretability.

idea_spark.idea: Design more efficient few-shot prompting strategies using distributed output template interventions, or develop task transfer methods based on internal representation compatibility.
idea_spark.risk: Generality of the intervention window may be limited by model architecture and task type; robustness needs verification on larger models and diverse tasks.
idea_spark.inspiration: The dissociation between probing accuracy and causal importance highlights that high probing accuracy does not imply causal importance, inspiring stricter mechanism validation methods.

papers.title: Conditional Flow-VAE for Safety-Critical Traffic Scenario Generation
papers.summary: Safety-critical scenarios are essential for the development of autonomous vehicles (AVs) but are rare in real-world driving data. While simulation offers a way to generate such scenarios, manually designed test cases lack scalability, and adversarial optimization often produces unrealistic behaviors. In this work, we introduce a conditional latent flow matching approach for scalable and realistic safety-critical scenario generation. Our method uses distribution matching to transform nominal scenes into safety-critical rollouts. Furthermore, we demonstrate that incorporating both simulation and real-world data enables our framework to efficiently generate diverse, data-driven scenarios. Experimental results highlight that our approach is able to more consistently and realistically generate novel safety-critical scenarios, making it a valuable tool for training and benchmarking AV systems.

ai.tldr: 提出条件流匹配方法，从名义场景生成安全关键场景，用于自动驾驶训练与评估。
ai.motivation: 真实驾驶数据中安全关键场景稀少，手动设计缺乏可扩展性，对抗优化常产生不真实行为。
ai.method: 使用条件潜流匹配进行分布匹配，将名义场景转换为安全关键轨迹。
ai.result: 该方法能更一致且真实地生成新颖安全关键场景，有效支持自动驾驶系统训练与基准测试。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户自动生成多样且真实的安全关键交通场景，用于自动驾驶算法测试。

idea_spark.idea: 结合真实与仿真数据，通过分布匹配生成安全关键场景，避免对抗优化的不真实性。

en.tldr: Proposes a conditional flow matching approach to generate safety-critical scenarios from nominal scenes for autonomous vehicle training and evaluation.
en.motivation: Safety-critical scenarios are rare in real-world data; manual design lacks scalability and adversarial optimization often yields unrealistic behaviors.
en.method: Uses conditional latent flow matching for distribution matching, transforming nominal scenes into safety-critical rollouts.
en.result: The method generates novel safety-critical scenarios more consistently and realistically, effectively supporting AV training and benchmarking.
en.help_to_user: Helps users automatically generate diverse and realistic safety-critical traffic scenarios for testing autonomous driving algorithms.

idea_spark.idea: Combines real and simulation data via distribution matching to generate safety-critical scenarios, avoiding unrealistic behaviors from adversarial optimization.
idea_spark.risk: Generated scenarios may still have distributional bias; validation of coverage over real dangerous situations is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging the continuous transformation property of flow matching, one can explore smooth transitions from normal to dangerous scenarios for robustness analysis.

papers.title: Order-based Rehearsal Learning
papers.summary: When a machine learning (ML) model forecasts an undesired event, one often seeks a decision to avoid it, known as the avoiding undesired future (AUF) problem. Many rehearsal learning methods have been proposed for AUF, but they rely on an underlying graph structure; learning such a graph from observational data is challenging and can incur substantial estimation error. In this work, we demonstrate that the order structure can be sufficient for AUF decision-making, and propose the first order-based rehearsal learning method. Although an order is less informative than a graph, it can be sufficient to identify the influence of decisions from observational data, suggesting that learning the entire graph is not always necessary. To learn the order, we develop an information-theoretic method that imposes no restrictions on the form of structural functions or the type of noise distributions. For AUF decision-making, we construct an order-based sampler to approximate the influence of decisions and, combined with a surrogate objective for maximizing the post-decision success probability, reduce the AUF task to a differentiable optimization problem. Experiments show that our order learning method outperforms existing methods, and that our AUF approach not only surpasses methods relying on learned graphs or learned orders, but also matches or even exceeds oracle baselines that are given the true graph.

ai.tldr: 提出首个基于序结构的排练学习方法，用于避免不良未来决策，无需完整图结构。
ai.motivation: 现有排练学习方法依赖图结构，但图学习困难且误差大，而序结构可能足以识别决策影响。
ai.method: 开发信息论方法学习序结构，构建基于序的采样器近似决策影响，结合替代目标优化成功概率。
ai.result: 序学习方法优于现有方法，AUF方法超越基于图或序的基线，甚至匹配或超越真实图基线。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需完整图结构即可进行因果决策的轻量级方法，降低计算复杂度和估计误差。

idea_spark.idea: 探索序结构在时间序列预测或强化学习中的应用，替代传统图模型。
idea_spark.risk: 序结构可能丢失部分因果信息，在复杂场景下决策效果可能受限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在数据稀缺或图结构未知时，利用更简单的序结构进行有效决策。

en.tldr: Proposes the first order-based rehearsal learning method for avoiding undesired future decisions without requiring a full graph structure.
en.motivation: Existing rehearsal learning methods rely on graph structures, which are hard to learn and prone to error; order structure may suffice for identifying decision influence.
en.method: Develops an information-theoretic method to learn the order, builds an order-based sampler to approximate decision influence, and uses a surrogate objective to optimize success probability.
en.result: Order learning outperforms existing methods; the AUF approach surpasses graph- or order-based baselines and matches or exceeds oracle baselines with true graphs.
en.help_to_user: Provides a lightweight method for causal decision-making without full graph learning, reducing computational cost and estimation error.

idea_spark.idea: Explore order structure in time series forecasting or reinforcement learning as an alternative to traditional graph models.
idea_spark.risk: Order structure may lose some causal information, potentially limiting decision effectiveness in complex scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires effective decision-making with simpler order structures when data is scarce or graph structure is unknown.

papers.title: Quantile-Free Uncertainty Quantification in Graph Neural Networks
papers.summary: Uncertainty quantification (UQ) in graph neural networks (GNNs) is crucial in high-stakes domains but remains a significant challenge. In graph settings, message passing often relies on strong assumptions such as exchangeability, which are rarely satisfied in practice. Moreover, achieving reliable UQ typically requires costly resampling or post-hoc calibration. To address these issues, we introduce Quantile-free Prediction Interval GNN (QpiGNN), a framework that builds on quantile regression (QR) to enable GNN-based UQ by directly optimizing coverage and interval width without requiring quantile inputs or post-processing. QpiGNN employs a dual-head architecture that decouples prediction and uncertainty, and is trained with label-only supervision through a quantile-free joint loss. This design allows efficient training and yields robust prediction intervals, with theoretical guarantees of asymptotic coverage and near-optimal width under mild assumptions. Experiments on 19 synthetic and real-world benchmarks show QpiGNN achieves average 22\% higher coverage and 50\% narrower intervals than baselines, while ensuring efficiency and robustness to noise and structural shifts.

ai.tldr: 提出QpiGNN框架，无需分位数输入或后处理，通过双头架构和分位数无关联合损失直接优化覆盖率和区间宽度，实现图神经网络的高效不确定性量化。
ai.motivation: 图神经网络在高风险应用中需要可靠的不确定性量化，但现有方法依赖强假设（如可交换性）且需要昂贵的重采样或后校准。
ai.method: 设计双头架构解耦预测与不确定性，采用分位数无关联合损失，仅用标签监督训练，直接优化覆盖率和区间宽度。
ai.result: 在19个基准上，平均覆盖率提高22%，区间宽度缩小50%，对噪声和结构偏移具有鲁棒性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、无需后处理的GNN不确定性量化方法，可直接输出具有理论保证的预测区间。

idea_spark.idea: 将双头架构与联合损失结合，实现预测与不确定性解耦，避免传统分位数回归的繁琐调参。
idea_spark.risk: 理论保证依赖于温和假设，实际应用中假设不满足时性能可能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受分位数回归启发，但通过损失函数设计绕过分位数输入，简化训练流程。

en.tldr: Proposes QpiGNN, a quantile-free framework that directly optimizes coverage and interval width via a dual-head architecture and joint loss, enabling efficient uncertainty quantification in GNNs without resampling or post-hoc calibration.
en.motivation: Reliable UQ in GNNs is critical for high-stakes domains, but existing methods rely on strong assumptions (e.g., exchangeability) and require costly resampling or calibration.
en.method: Employs a dual-head architecture decoupling prediction and uncertainty, trained with a quantile-free joint loss under label-only supervision to directly optimize coverage and interval width.
en.result: On 19 benchmarks, achieves 22% higher coverage and 50% narrower intervals on average, with robustness to noise and structural shifts.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient, post-processing-free UQ method for GNNs that outputs prediction intervals with theoretical guarantees.

idea_spark.idea: Combines dual-head architecture with a joint loss to decouple prediction and uncertainty, avoiding tedious quantile tuning.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical guarantees rely on mild assumptions; performance may degrade if assumptions are violated in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by quantile regression but simplifies training by bypassing quantile inputs through loss design.

papers.title: Two-site Bose-Hubbard hopping and Schrödinger cat states
papers.summary: The Bose-Hubbard Hamiltonian can be simplified to have only two lattice sites, in which case the system being described is referred to as a dimer. Due to its structure, the hopping term of the dimer Hamiltonian enjoys invariance in a family of subspaces indexed by a whole number $k$, each subspace corresponding to a system of only $k$ particles. We have invented an inductive argument using the bosonic canonical commutation relations to find the eigenvalues and eigenvectors of the dimer hopping Hamiltonian in its $k$-particle subspaces. In particular, this Hamiltonian, when restricted to one of the $k$-particle subspaces, is exactly the spin projection operator along the $x$-axis, where the number of particles $k$ in the dimer system yields the projection matrix for spin quantum number $s=k/2$. Thus, a new method for computing the eigenvalues and eigenvectors of the $x$-axis spin projector has been unearthed. We use the explicit construction to study the dynamics of coherent states induced by the square of the dimer hopping hamiltonian. We find that it generates Schrödinger cat states in the two-site setting.

ai.tldr: 通过归纳论证，发现双位点Bose-Hubbard跳跃哈密顿量在k粒子子空间等价于自旋投影算符，并利用其平方生成薛定谔猫态。
ai.motivation: 简化Bose-Hubbard模型至双位点（二聚体），并揭示其跳跃项在k粒子子空间中的精确可解结构。
ai.method: 利用玻色子正则对易关系进行归纳论证，将哈密顿量限制在k粒子子空间，并映射为x轴自旋投影算符。
ai.result: 获得了跳跃哈密顿量的本征值和本征矢，并证明其平方可生成双位点薛定谔猫态。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种解析求解双位点Bose-Hubbard模型的新方法，并展示了其与自旋投影算符的深层联系。

idea_spark.idea: 利用跳跃哈密顿量的平方生成薛定谔猫态，可能为量子信息中的纠缠态制备提供新途径。
idea_spark.risk: 该构造严格依赖于双位点对称性，推广至多格点或非均匀系统时可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从简单二聚体模型中发现与自旋投影的等价性，启发我们重新审视其他低维量子模型的隐藏对称性。

en.tldr: An inductive argument reveals that the two-site Bose-Hubbard hopping Hamiltonian in k-particle subspaces is equivalent to the spin projection operator, and its square generates Schrödinger cat states.
en.motivation: Simplify the Bose-Hubbard model to a dimer and uncover the exact solvable structure of its hopping term within k-particle subspaces.
en.method: Use bosonic canonical commutation relations in an inductive argument to restrict the Hamiltonian to k-particle subspaces, mapping it to the x-axis spin projection operator.
en.result: Obtain eigenvalues and eigenvectors of the hopping Hamiltonian, and show that its square produces two-site Schrödinger cat states.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new analytical method for solving the two-site Bose-Hubbard model and reveals its deep connection with spin projection operators.

idea_spark.idea: Using the square of the hopping Hamiltonian to generate Schrödinger cat states may offer a new route for entangled state preparation in quantum information.
idea_spark.risk: The construction relies strictly on two-site symmetry; generalization to multi-site or inhomogeneous systems may fail.
idea_spark.inspiration: The equivalence with spin projection in a simple dimer model inspires re-examination of hidden symmetries in other low-dimensional quantum models.

papers.title: On Characterizations of (Almost) Strictly Convex Functions
papers.summary: In this paper, we unify and improve existing results on characterizing strict and almost stricty convex functions via subdifferential mapping, Moreau envelope, and proximal mappings. In particular, it is shown that if a convex function is subdifferentiable on its domain, then it is strictly convex if and only if its subdifferential is strictly monotone, equivalently, almost strictly monotone. Rockafellar-Wets' characterizations of almost strictly convex functions via almost differentiability of Fenchel conjugates and strict monotonicity of subdifferentials are extended from a finite-dimensional space to a Hilbert space. We also establish similar results for paramonotone operators.

ai.tldr: 本文统一并改进了通过次微分、Moreau包络和近端映射刻画严格凸和几乎严格凸函数的现有结果，并将Rockafellar-Wets的刻画从有限维空间推广到Hilbert空间。
ai.motivation: 现有关于严格凸和几乎严格凸函数的刻画结果分散且不统一，且部分结果仅适用于有限维空间，需要推广到更一般的Hilbert空间。
ai.method: 利用次微分映射的严格单调性和几乎严格单调性，结合Moreau包络和近端映射的性质，建立等价刻画，并推广到参数单调算子。
ai.result: 证明了凸函数在定义域上次可微时，严格凸等价于次微分严格单调（也等价于几乎严格单调）；将Rockafellar-Wets关于几乎严格凸函数的刻画推广到Hilbert空间。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解严格凸和几乎严格凸函数的多种等价刻画，以及这些刻画在不同空间（有限维和Hilbert）中的适用性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Moreau包络和近端映射的单调性，设计新的凸优化算法或收敛性分析框架。
idea_spark.risk: 推广到非凸或非光滑情形时，单调性条件可能不再成立，需要额外假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将凸函数的单调性刻画与变分不等式、分裂算法等结合，可能产生新的理论工具。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将凸函数的单调性刻画与变分不等式、分裂算法等结合，可能产生新的理论工具。

en.tldr: This paper unifies and improves existing characterizations of strict and almost strictly convex functions via subdifferential, Moreau envelope, and proximal mappings, extending Rockafellar-Wets' results from finite-dimensional to Hilbert spaces.
en.motivation: Existing characterizations of strict and almost strictly convex functions are scattered and limited to finite-dimensional spaces; a unified treatment and extension to Hilbert spaces is needed.
en.method: Using strict and almost strict monotonicity of subdifferential mappings, combined with properties of Moreau envelope and proximal mappings, to establish equivalent characterizations and extend to paramonotone operators.
en.result: It is shown that for a convex function subdifferentiable on its domain, strict convexity is equivalent to strict monotonicity (or almost strict monotonicity) of its subdifferential; Rockafellar-Wets' characterizations are extended to Hilbert spaces.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand multiple equivalent characterizations of strict and almost strictly convex functions and their applicability across different spaces (finite-dimensional and Hilbert).

idea_spark.idea: Leverage monotonicity of Moreau envelope and proximal mappings to design new convex optimization algorithms or convergence analysis frameworks.
idea_spark.risk: When extending to non-convex or non-smooth settings, monotonicity conditions may fail, requiring additional assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining monotonicity characterizations of convex functions with variational inequalities or splitting algorithms may yield new theoretical tools.

papers.title: Stabilization by a background magnetic field: global well-posedness of the compressible isentropic ideal MHD equations with velocity damping
papers.summary: We study the Cauchy problem for the three-dimensional isentropic compressible ideal (inviscid and non-resistive) magnetohydrodynamic equations with velocity damping on the periodic torus $\mathbb{T}^3$. The system admits a steady equilibrium consisting of a constant density $\barρ$ and a uniform background magnetic field $ω\in\mathbb{R}^3$. We prove that this equilibrium is nonlinearly stable. More precisely, we show that if the initial data are a sufficiently small perturbation of $(\barρ,\mathbf{0},ω)$ in the Sobolev space $H^N(\mathbb{T}^3)$ with $N\geq 6r+4$, and if $ω$ satisfies a Diophantine condition, then the system admits a unique global smooth solution. Moreover, the perturbations decay algebraically in time. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first global well-posedness result for the multi-dimensional isentropic compressible ideal MHD system. The proof reveals a hidden dissipation mechanism: although neither the density equation nor the magnetic field equation contains explicit diffusion or damping, the coupling between the velocity and the magnetic field through the background field $ω$, combined with a Diophantine--Poincaré inequality, generates effective dissipation for both the density perturbation and the magnetic field perturbation, which together with the velocity damping yields global regularity and time decay.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了三维可压缩等熵理想磁流体力学方程组在速度阻尼和均匀背景磁场下的全局光滑解存在性与代数衰减。
ai.motivation: 多维可压缩理想MHD系统的全局适定性长期未解，本文首次给出肯定结果。
ai.method: 利用Diophantine-Poincaré不等式揭示隐藏耗散机制，结合速度阻尼实现密度与磁场扰动的有效耗散。
ai.result: 在初始扰动足够小且背景磁场满足Diophantine条件时，系统存在唯一全局光滑解，且扰动代数衰减。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解磁约束聚变等物理场景中的稳定性提供严格数学基础。

idea_spark.idea: 利用背景场与阻尼的耦合产生有效耗散，替代传统人工粘性。
idea_spark.risk: Diophantine条件可能限制背景磁场的选取范围。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将Diophantine逼近与PDE稳定性结合，开辟新分析路径。

en.tldr: This paper proves global smooth solutions and algebraic decay for the 3D compressible isentropic ideal MHD equations with velocity damping and a uniform background magnetic field.
en.motivation: The global well-posedness of multi-dimensional compressible ideal MHD has been open; this work provides the first positive result.
en.method: A hidden dissipation mechanism is revealed via a Diophantine–Poincaré inequality, which together with velocity damping yields effective dissipation for density and magnetic perturbations.
en.result: Under sufficiently small initial perturbations and a Diophantine condition on the background field, the system admits a unique global smooth solution with algebraic decay.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical foundation for stability in magnetic confinement fusion and similar physical scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Use coupling between a background field and damping to generate effective dissipation, replacing artificial viscosity.
idea_spark.risk: The Diophantine condition may restrict the admissible background magnetic fields.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining Diophantine approximation with PDE stability opens new analytical pathways.

papers.title: Ill-posedness in the critical Sobolev space for the $b$-Novikov equation
papers.summary: This article proves norm inflation in the critical Sobolev space $H^{3/2}(\mathbb{R})$ for the $b$-Novikov equation, which is a $1$-parameter family of Camassa-Holm-type equations with cubic nonlinearities. This result completes the well-posedness theory for this equation, which was previously known to be locally well-posed in $H^{s}(\mathbb{R})$ for $s>3/2$ and ill-posed in $H^{s}(\mathbb{R})$ for $s<3/2$.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了b-Novikov方程在临界Sobolev空间H^{3/2}(R)中的范数膨胀，完善了该方程的适定性理论。
ai.motivation: 此前已知b-Novikov方程在s>3/2时局部适定，在s<3/2时不适定，但临界情况s=3/2尚未解决。
ai.method: 通过构造特定初始数据，证明解在任意小时间内范数趋于无穷，即范数膨胀。
ai.result: 在临界Sobolev空间H^{3/2}(R)中，b-Novikov方程出现范数膨胀，从而不适定。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解非线性色散方程在临界正则性下的不适定性机制。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试构造更一般的初始数据，研究其他临界Sobolev空间中的适定性。
idea_spark.risk: 构造方法可能依赖于方程的具体结构，推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从临界正则性下的不适定性出发，探索方程解的爆破或奇性形成。

en.tldr: This paper proves norm inflation in the critical Sobolev space H^{3/2}(R) for the b-Novikov equation, completing its well-posedness theory.
en.motivation: The equation was known to be locally well-posed for s>3/2 and ill-posed for s<3/2, but the critical case s=3/2 remained open.
en.method: By constructing specific initial data, it is shown that the norm blows up in arbitrarily small time, i.e., norm inflation.
en.result: Norm inflation occurs in the critical Sobolev space H^{3/2}(R) for the b-Novikov equation, implying ill-posedness.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand ill-posedness mechanisms for nonlinear dispersive equations at critical regularity.

idea_spark.idea: Attempt to construct more general initial data to study well-posedness in other critical Sobolev spaces.
idea_spark.risk: The construction may rely on specific equation structure, requiring caution in generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore blow-up or singularity formation from ill-posedness at critical regularity.

papers.title: Normalized solutions to a class of Kirchhoff type equations with a logarithmic perturbation
papers.summary: This paper is devoted to the study of normalized solutions to the Kirchhoff type equation with a logarithmic perturbation\[-\left(a+b\int_{\mathbb{R}^3}|\nabla u|^2 \,\mathrm{d}x \right) Δu=λu+|u|^{p-2}u+u\log u^2,\quad x \in\mathbb{R}^3, \]under the normalized constraint $\int_{\mathbb{R}^3} u^2 \,\mathrm{d}x = c^2$, where $a,b>0$, $2<p\leq 6$, $c>0$ is a constant, and $λ\in\mathbb{R}$ emerges as a Lagrange multiplier which is not a priori known. A unified variational framework is developed based on Orlicz spaces together with the Pohozaev constraint method and refined fiber map analysis. For $2<p<\frac{14}{3}$ or $p=\frac{14}{3}$ with small mass, the energy functional is bounded from below and admits a positive radial ground state minimizer. For $\frac{14}{3}<p<6$, where the energy functional is unbounded from below, we establish the existence of two normalized solutions for small mass: a ground state $u_c^+$ obtained via local minimization, and a second solution $u_c^-$ obtained via minimization on the negative component of the Pohozaev manifold. For the Sobolev critical case $p=6$, we construct a ground state solution and, under a technical condition on the parameters, a second solution by introducing a proper auxiliary functional and precise energy estimates with Aubin-Talenti bubbles. Asymptotically as $c\to0^+$, the $L^{2}$ norm of the gradient of ground state solution vanishes for $2<p\le6$. Surprisingly, for $\frac{14}{3}<p<6$, the $L^{2}$ norm of the gradient of the second solution diverges to infinity as $c\to 0^+$, while for $p=6$ it concentrates around the Aubin-Talenti bubble with energy converging to the energy level of the corresponding critical Kirchhoff equation.

ai.tldr: 研究了一类带有对数扰动的Kirchhoff型方程在L²范数约束下的归一化解，通过Orlicz空间和Pohozaev约束方法，得到了多个参数范围内的基态解和第二个解的存在性，并分析了渐近行为。
ai.motivation: 对数非线性项在物理中常见，但给变分分析带来困难；现有工作对Kirchhoff型方程归一化解的研究尚不充分，特别是涉及对数扰动时。
ai.method: 建立基于Orlicz空间的统一变分框架，结合Pohozaev约束方法和精细纤维映射分析；对临界情形引入辅助泛函和Aubin-Talenti气泡进行能量估计。
ai.result: 对于2<p<14/3或p=14/3且小质量，能量泛函下有界，存在正径向基态极小点；对于14/3<p<6，小质量时存在两个归一化解；对于p=6，构造了基态解并在参数条件下得到第二个解。渐近分析显示，当c→0⁺时，基态解的梯度L²范数趋于0，而第二个解的梯度L²范数在14/3<p<6时发散，在p=6时集中于Aubin-Talenti气泡。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了处理带有对数非线性项的Kirchhoff型方程归一化解的系统变分方法，包括能量下界、多解存在性和渐近行为的完整刻画。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将Aubin-Talenti气泡技术用于其他临界或超临界Kirchhoff型方程，以构造多解。
idea_spark.risk: 对数项的非紧性可能导致变分框架失效，需要精细的紧性恢复技巧。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从物理中的对数非线性模型出发，探索归一化解的渐近行为与质量参数的关系，可能揭示新的物理现象。

zh.tldr: 研究了一类带有对数扰动的Kirchhoff型方程在L²范数约束下的归一化解，通过Orlicz空间和Pohozaev约束方法，得到了多个参数范围内的基态解和第二个解的存在性，并分析了渐近行为。
zh.motivation: 对数非线性项在物理中常见，但给变分分析带来困难；现有工作对Kirchhoff型方程归一化解的研究尚不充分，特别是涉及对数扰动时。

en.tldr: This paper studies normalized solutions of a Kirchhoff-type equation with a logarithmic perturbation under an L²-norm constraint, using Orlicz spaces and the Pohozaev constraint method to establish existence of ground states and second solutions across various parameter regimes, along with asymptotic analysis.
en.motivation: Logarithmic nonlinearities are common in physics but pose variational difficulties; existing work on normalized solutions for Kirchhoff-type equations is insufficient, especially with logarithmic perturbations.
en.method: A unified variational framework based on Orlicz spaces is developed, combined with the Pohozaev constraint method and refined fiber map analysis; for the critical case, an auxiliary functional and Aubin-Talenti bubbles are used for energy estimates.
en.result: For 2<p<14/3 or p=14/3 with small mass, the energy functional is bounded below and admits a positive radial ground state minimizer. For 14/3<p<6 with small mass, two normalized solutions exist: a ground state via local minimization and a second solution via minimization on the negative component of the Pohozaev manifold. For p=6, a ground state is constructed and, under a technical condition, a second solution using Aubin-Talenti bubbles. Asymptotically as c→0⁺, the L² gradient norm of the ground state vanishes, while for the second solution it diverges for 14/3<p<6 and concentrates around the Aubin-Talenti bubble for p=6.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic variational approach for normalized solutions of Kirchhoff-type equations with logarithmic nonlinearities, including complete results on energy bounds, multiple solutions, and asymptotic behavior.

idea_spark.idea: Consider applying Aubin-Talenti bubble techniques to other critical or supercritical Kirchhoff-type equations to construct multiple solutions.
idea_spark.risk: Non-compactness due to the logarithmic term may cause the variational framework to fail, requiring delicate compactness recovery.
idea_spark.inspiration: Exploring the relationship between asymptotic behavior of normalized solutions and mass parameters in physical logarithmic nonlinear models may reveal new phenomena.

papers.title: Elicitation Matters: How Prompts and Query Protocols Shape LLM Surrogates under Sparse Observations
papers.summary: Large language models are increasingly used as surrogate models for low-data optimization, but their optimizer-facing prediction and its uncertainty remain poorly understood. We study the surrogate belief elicited from an LLM under sparse observations, showing that it depends strongly on prompt text and query protocol. We introduce an uncertainty-alignment criterion that measures whether model uncertainty tracks residual ambiguity among sample-consistent functions. Across controlled inference tasks and Bayesian optimization studies, we find that structural prompts act as effective priors, POINTWISE and JOINT querying induce different beliefs, and sequential evidence leads to non-monotonic, order-sensitive confidence updates. These effects change downstream acquisition decisions and regret, showing that elicitation protocol is part of the LLM surrogate specification, not a formatting detail.

ai.tldr: 研究提示文本和查询协议如何影响大语言模型在稀疏观测下的代理信念和不确定性。
ai.motivation: 大语言模型作为低数据优化的代理模型时，其面向优化器的预测和不确定性尚不明确。
ai.method: 引入不确定性对齐标准，通过控制推理任务和贝叶斯优化实验，分析不同提示和查询协议的影响。
ai.result: 结构化提示作为有效先验，逐点和联合查询产生不同信念，顺序证据导致非单调、顺序敏感的置信度更新。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何设计提示和查询协议以改善LLM代理的优化性能。

idea_spark.idea: 开发自适应查询协议，根据观测历史动态调整提示以优化代理信念。
idea_spark.risk: 过度依赖特定提示可能导致代理信念偏差，需谨慎验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将提示视为贝叶斯先验，启发更系统的提示优化方法。

en.tldr: Investigates how prompt text and query protocol shape LLM surrogate beliefs and uncertainty under sparse observations.
en.motivation: LLMs used as surrogate models for low-data optimization have poorly understood optimizer-facing predictions and uncertainty.
en.method: Introduces an uncertainty-alignment criterion and conducts controlled inference tasks and Bayesian optimization studies to analyze effects of different prompts and query protocols.
en.result: Structural prompts act as effective priors, pointwise and joint querying induce different beliefs, and sequential evidence leads to non-monotonic, order-sensitive confidence updates.
en.help_to_user: Helps users design prompts and query protocols to improve LLM surrogate optimization performance.

idea_spark.idea: Develop adaptive query protocols that dynamically adjust prompts based on observation history to optimize surrogate beliefs.
idea_spark.risk: Over-reliance on specific prompts may bias surrogate beliefs; careful validation of generalizability is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Viewing prompts as Bayesian priors inspires more systematic prompt optimization methods.

papers.title: Well-posedness of reflected BSDEs with default time and irregular barrier: An application to optimal control
papers.summary: We consider a reflected backward stochastic differential equations with default time and an optional barrier in a filtration generated by a one-dimensional Brownian motion and a defaultable process. We suppose that the barrier have trajectories with left and right finite limits. We provide the existence and uniqueness result when the coefficient is scholastic Lipschitz by using a modified penalization method. Under an additional assumption of right-upper semi-continuity along stopping times on the trajectories of the barrier, we characterize the state process for such RBSDEs as the value function of an optimal stopping problem associated with a non-linear $f$-expectation.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了一类带有违约时间和不规则障碍的反射倒向随机微分方程，在布朗运动和违约过程生成的滤波下，证明了当系数为随机Lipschitz时解的存在唯一性，并刻画了状态过程为最优停止问题的值函数。
ai.motivation: 现有反射BSDEs理论多假设障碍连续或可料，而实际金融问题中违约时间导致障碍可能不连续，需要建立更一般的理论框架。
ai.method: 采用修正的惩罚方法处理随机Lipschitz系数，并利用障碍沿停时右上半连续的条件进行最优停止问题刻画。
ai.result: 得到了解的存在唯一性，并将状态过程表示为非线性f-期望下的最优停止问题值函数。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理含违约风险的金融衍生品定价和最优控制问题提供了严格的数学基础。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将障碍的右上半连续性条件放松为更一般的正则性，或引入随机惩罚参数。
idea_spark.risk: 违约时间与布朗运动的相关性可能导致解的唯一性失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴信用风险中强度模型的思想，将违约时间视为可料停时，简化障碍结构。

zh.tldr: 本文研究了一类带有违约时间和不规则障碍的反射倒向随机微分方程，在布朗运动和违约过程生成的滤波下，证明了当系数为随机Lipschitz时解的存在唯一性，并刻画了状态过程为最优停止问题的值函数。

en.tldr: This paper studies reflected backward stochastic differential equations with default time and an irregular barrier, proving existence and uniqueness under a stochastic Lipschitz coefficient via a modified penalization method, and characterizing the state process as the value function of an optimal stopping problem.
en.motivation: Existing reflected BSDE theory often assumes continuous or predictable barriers, but default times in finance introduce discontinuities, requiring a more general framework.
en.method: A modified penalization method handles the stochastic Lipschitz coefficient, and right-upper semi-continuity along stopping times is used to characterize the optimal stopping problem.
en.result: Existence and uniqueness are established, and the state process is identified as the value function of an optimal stopping problem under a nonlinear f-expectation.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical foundation for pricing and optimal control problems involving default risk.

idea_spark.idea: Consider relaxing the right-upper semi-continuity condition to more general regularity, or introducing random penalization parameters.
idea_spark.risk: Correlation between default time and Brownian motion may break uniqueness.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrow ideas from intensity-based credit risk models to treat default time as a predictable stopping time, simplifying the barrier structure.

papers.title: Memory as a Markov Matrix: Sample Efficient Knowledge Expansion via Token-to-Dictionary Mapping
papers.summary: Continual incorporation of new knowledge is essential for the long-term evolution of large language models (LLMs). Existing approaches typically rely on parameter-update algorithms to mitigate catastrophic forgetting, yet they suffer from fundamental limitations: 1) forgetting is unavoidable as the amount of newly injected knowledge grows; and 2) model updates are often irreversible. As modern LLMs become increasingly expressive, it is natural to question whether large-scale weight updates are necessary for acquiring a small amount of new knowledge. In this work, we propose a principled framework that models autoregressive language generation as a Markov process over tokens, where model memory is represented by a Markov transition matrix. Under this formulation, incorporating new knowledge/tokens corresponds to extending the state space, and preserving existing transitions guarantees retention of previously learned knowledge. We then prove a sample complexity bound for incorporating new tokens via a token-to-dictionary mapping strategy. In particular, for learning the transition behavior of each new token, the required number of samples scales linearly with the number of existing tokens it is mapped to. To realize this mapping, we propose an embedding-tuning algorithm that requires minimal parameter updates and induces zero forgetting. Experimental results further demonstrate the effectiveness of our method and validate our theoretical findings.

ai.tldr: 提出将自回归语言生成建模为马尔可夫过程，用马尔可夫转移矩阵表示模型记忆，通过令牌到字典映射策略高效扩展新知识，实现零遗忘。
ai.motivation: 现有参数更新方法在持续注入新知识时存在遗忘不可避免和更新不可逆的局限，而现代大模型表达能力足够强，质疑是否必须大规模更新权重来获取少量新知识。
ai.method: 将语言生成视为令牌上的马尔可夫过程，记忆由转移矩阵表示；新知识对应扩展状态空间，保留已有转移保证旧知识不遗忘；提出令牌到字典映射策略，并证明新令牌学习所需样本数与其映射到的现有令牌数线性相关；实现嵌入微调算法，仅需最小参数更新。
ai.result: 实验验证了方法的有效性，并支持理论发现，即新令牌学习样本复杂度与映射到的现有令牌数线性相关，且实现零遗忘。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、无遗忘的知识扩展方法，适用于需要持续更新知识的大语言模型场景，如动态知识库或个性化助手。

idea_spark.idea: 将令牌到字典映射与检索增强生成（RAG）结合，利用外部知识库动态扩展状态空间，可能进一步提升知识注入效率。
idea_spark.risk: 映射策略依赖预定义字典，若字典覆盖不全或映射错误可能导致新知识学习偏差；样本复杂度线性关系在极端稀疏场景下可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受马尔可夫链状态扩展启发，可探索将模型记忆视为可扩展的图结构，利用图神经网络动态管理知识节点。

en.tldr: Proposes modeling autoregressive language generation as a Markov process with a Markov transition matrix representing model memory, enabling sample-efficient knowledge expansion via token-to-dictionary mapping with zero forgetting.
en.motivation: Existing parameter-update methods for continual knowledge injection suffer from unavoidable forgetting and irreversible updates, while modern LLMs may not require large-scale weight changes for small knowledge increments.
en.method: Formulates language generation as a Markov process over tokens, with memory as a transition matrix; new knowledge extends the state space while preserving existing transitions. Introduces token-to-dictionary mapping with a proven sample complexity bound linear in the number of mapped existing tokens, realized via an embedding-tuning algorithm with minimal parameter updates.
en.result: Experiments validate effectiveness and theoretical findings, showing sample complexity linear in mapped tokens and achieving zero forgetting.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient, forgetting-free method for continual knowledge expansion in LLMs, useful for dynamic knowledge bases or personalized assistants.

idea_spark.idea: Combine token-to-dictionary mapping with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) to dynamically extend state space using external knowledge bases, potentially boosting injection efficiency.
idea_spark.risk: Mapping relies on a predefined dictionary; incomplete coverage or mapping errors may bias new token learning; linear sample complexity may fail in extremely sparse scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Markov chain state expansion, explore representing model memory as an expandable graph structure, using graph neural networks to manage knowledge nodes dynamically.

papers.title: Riesz property in the case of multiple eigenvalues
papers.summary: We analyze spectra and the Riesz property of spectral projections of non-symmetric perturbations of self-adjoint operators with eigenvalues having arbitrary multiplicities, including infinite ones. In particular, we establish the Riesz property for perturbations of the multi-dimensional harmonic oscillator, Landau Hamiltonian and Laplace-Beltrami operator on a sphere by complex-valued $L^r$-potentials if $d/2 < r < \infty$.

ai.tldr: 分析了具有任意重数（包括无限重）特征值的自伴算子的非对称扰动的谱及其谱投影的Riesz性质，特别对多维谐振子、Landau Hamiltonian和球面上的Laplace-Beltrami算子建立了在d/2<r<∞条件下复值L^r势扰动下的Riesz性质。
ai.motivation: 研究非对称扰动下自伴算子谱投影的Riesz性质，特别是当特征值具有任意重数（包括无限重）时，这是对经典Riesz基理论的推广。
ai.method: 通过谱分析和算子扰动理论，结合具体算子的谱结构，证明在特定条件下谱投影构成Riesz基。
ai.result: 对于多维谐振子、Landau Hamiltonian和球面上的Laplace-Beltrami算子，在复值L^r势扰动（d/2<r<∞）下，谱投影具有Riesz性质。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解非自伴扰动下算子谱的稳定性，为量子力学和微分几何中的谱问题提供理论基础。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将Riesz性质用于非自伴算子的数值谱计算，或研究更一般势函数（如奇异势）下的类似结果。
idea_spark.risk: 对于无限重特征值的情况，Riesz性质可能依赖于扰动的具体形式，推广到更复杂算子时可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受量子力学中谐振子模型和Landau能级启发，可进一步研究磁场中带电粒子的谱性质。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将Riesz性质用于非自伴算子的数值谱计算，或研究更一般势函数（如奇异势）下的类似结果。
idea_spark.risk: 对于无限重特征值的情况，Riesz性质可能依赖于扰动的具体形式，推广到更复杂算子时可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受量子力学中谐振子模型和Landau能级启发，可进一步研究磁场中带电粒子的谱性质。

en.tldr: We analyze spectra and the Riesz property of spectral projections of non-symmetric perturbations of self-adjoint operators with eigenvalues having arbitrary multiplicities, including infinite ones. In particular, we establish the Riesz property for perturbations of the multi-dimensional harmonic oscillator, Landau Hamiltonian and Laplace-Beltrami operator on a sphere by complex-valued L^r-potentials if d/2 < r < ∞.
en.motivation: To study the Riesz property of spectral projections under non-symmetric perturbations of self-adjoint operators, especially when eigenvalues have arbitrary (including infinite) multiplicities, extending classical Riesz basis theory.
en.method: Spectral analysis and operator perturbation theory, combined with the spectral structure of specific operators, to prove that spectral projections form a Riesz basis under certain conditions.
en.result: For the multi-dimensional harmonic oscillator, Landau Hamiltonian, and Laplace-Beltrami operator on a sphere, the spectral projections have the Riesz property under complex-valued L^r-potential perturbations with d/2 < r < ∞.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the stability of operator spectra under non-self-adjoint perturbations, offering theoretical foundations for spectral problems in quantum mechanics and differential geometry.

idea_spark.idea: Explore the use of the Riesz property for numerical spectral computation of non-self-adjoint operators, or investigate similar results for more general potentials (e.g., singular potentials).
idea_spark.risk: For infinite multiplicity eigenvalues, the Riesz property may depend on the specific form of the perturbation and may fail for more complex operators.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the harmonic oscillator model and Landau levels in quantum mechanics, further study the spectral properties of charged particles in magnetic fields.

papers.title: Bayesian Optimization in Linear Time
papers.summary: Bayesian optimization is a sequential method for minimizing objective functions that are expensive to evaluate and about which few assumptions can be made. By using all gathered data to train a Gaussian process model for the function and adaptively employing a mixture of global exploration and local exploitation, this method has been used for optimization in many fields including machine learning, automotive engineering and reinforcement learning. However, the standard method suffers from two problems: 1) with cubic computational complexity in the training-set size it eventually becomes computationally infeasible to train the model, and 2) globally modeling the objective function is not necessarily optimal given the local nature of minimization. Using flexible and recursive binary partitioning of the search space, we adapt both the modeling and acquisitive aspects of standard Bayesian optimization to work harmoniously with the partitioning scheme, thereby ameliorating both standard shortcomings. We compare our method against a commonly used Bayesian optimization library on seven challenging test functions, ranging in dimensionality from $6$ to $124$, and show that our method achieves superior optimization performance in all tests. In addition our method has linear computational complexity.

ai.tldr: 提出一种线性时间复杂度的贝叶斯优化方法，通过递归二分划分搜索空间，同时改进建模和采集过程，解决标准方法计算复杂度过高和全局建模不必要的问题。
ai.motivation: 标准贝叶斯优化方法在训练集增大时计算复杂度为三次方，且全局建模对于局部最小化问题并非最优。
ai.method: 采用灵活递归的二分划分搜索空间，使高斯过程建模和采集函数与划分方案协调工作。
ai.result: 在7个维度6到124的测试函数上，该方法优于常用贝叶斯优化库，且计算复杂度为线性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效处理高维昂贵目标函数优化的方法，适用于机器学习、汽车工程和强化学习等领域。

idea_spark.idea: 结合树状划分与高斯过程，在子区域独立建模，降低全局模型复杂度。
idea_spark.risk: 划分边界可能引入不连续性，影响模型平滑性假设；高维下划分效率可能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受决策树和随机森林的局部建模思想启发，将空间划分与贝叶斯优化结合。

en.tldr: Proposes a Bayesian optimization method with linear time complexity by recursively partitioning the search space, improving both modeling and acquisition to overcome cubic complexity and unnecessary global modeling.
en.motivation: Standard Bayesian optimization has cubic computational complexity in training set size, and global modeling is suboptimal for local minimization.
en.method: Uses flexible recursive binary partitioning of the search space to harmonize Gaussian process modeling and acquisition with the partition scheme.
en.result: Outperforms a common Bayesian optimization library on 7 test functions (6 to 124 dimensions) with linear computational complexity.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient optimization method for expensive high-dimensional objectives, applicable in machine learning, automotive engineering, and reinforcement learning.

idea_spark.idea: Combine tree-based partitioning with Gaussian processes to model subregions independently, reducing global model complexity.
idea_spark.risk: Partition boundaries may introduce discontinuities, violating smoothness assumptions; efficiency may degrade in very high dimensions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by local modeling in decision trees and random forests, integrating space partitioning with Bayesian optimization.

papers.title: HeterSEED: Semantics-Structure Decoupling for Heterogeneous Graph Learning under Heterophily
papers.summary: Many real-world heterogeneous graphs exhibit pronounced heterophily, where connected nodes often have dissimilar labels or play different semantic roles. In such settings, standard heterogeneous graph neural networks that aggregate messages along metapaths or meta-relations primarily based on feature similarity can propagate misleading information, since feature similarity may be misaligned with underlying relational semantics. In this paper, we propose HeterSEED, a semantics-structure decoupling framework for heterogeneous graph learning under heterophily. HeterSEED decouples representation learning into a heterogeneous semantic channel that captures type- and relation-aware local semantics and a structure-aware heterophily channel that separates homophilic and heterophilic neighborhoods via pseudo-label-guided partitioning and aggregates them using metapath-based structural weights. A node-level adaptive fusion mechanism then combines the two channels to produce context-dependent node representations. Theoretically, we establish that, on heterogeneous graphs under heterophily, HeterSEED is strictly more expressive than standard heterogeneous graph neural networks that rely primarily on feature similarity and provably reduces the prediction bias introduced by heterophilic neighbors. Experiments on five real-world heterogeneous graphs, including two large-scale networks at the million-node and hundred-million-edge scale, demonstrate that HeterSEED consistently outperforms representative heterogeneous graph neural networks and recent heterophily-aware baselines, especially in strongly heterophilic regimes.

ai.tldr: 提出HeterSEED框架，通过语义-结构解耦处理异构图中的异质性，在强异质场景下显著优于现有方法。
ai.motivation: 现有异构图神经网络在异质性（heterophily）场景下，基于特征相似性的消息传递会传播误导信息，导致预测偏差。
ai.method: 将表示学习解耦为异构语义通道（捕获类型和关系感知的局部语义）和结构感知异质通道（通过伪标签引导划分同质/异质邻域，并用元路径结构权重聚合），再通过节点级自适应融合机制组合两通道。
ai.result: 在五个真实异构图（含百万节点/亿边规模）上，HeterSEED一致优于代表性异构图神经网络和异质感知基线，尤其在强异质场景下。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户处理异质性强的异构图数据，提升节点分类等下游任务的准确性。

idea_spark.idea: 将伪标签引导的邻域划分与元路径结构权重结合，实现同质/异质邻域的差异化聚合。
idea_spark.risk: 伪标签质量依赖初始模型，可能引入噪声；大规模图上的计算开销需优化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从异质性图神经网络的局限性出发，借鉴对比学习和自适应融合机制，设计双通道解耦框架。

en.tldr: Proposes HeterSEED, a semantics-structure decoupling framework for heterogeneous graph learning under heterophily, consistently outperforming existing methods especially in strongly heterophilic regimes.
en.motivation: Standard heterogeneous graph neural networks that aggregate messages based on feature similarity can propagate misleading information under heterophily, where connected nodes often have dissimilar labels or semantic roles.
en.method: Decouples representation learning into a heterogeneous semantic channel (capturing type- and relation-aware local semantics) and a structure-aware heterophily channel (separating homophilic/heterophilic neighborhoods via pseudo-label-guided partitioning and aggregating with metapath-based structural weights), then combines them via node-level adaptive fusion.
en.result: On five real-world heterogeneous graphs (including million-node and hundred-million-edge scales), HeterSEED consistently outperforms representative heterogeneous GNNs and recent heterophily-aware baselines, especially in strongly heterophilic regimes.
en.help_to_user: Helps users handle heterogeneous graphs with strong heterophily, improving accuracy on downstream tasks like node classification.

idea_spark.idea: Combine pseudo-label-guided neighborhood partitioning with metapath-based structural weights for differentiated aggregation of homophilic and heterophilic neighbors.
idea_spark.risk: Pseudo-label quality depends on initial model, potentially introducing noise; computational cost on large graphs needs optimization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws from limitations of heterophilic graph neural networks, leveraging contrastive learning and adaptive fusion mechanisms to design a dual-channel decoupling framework.

papers.title: Regime-Conditioned Evaluation in Multi-Context Bayesian Optimization
papers.summary: Published transfer-BO comparisons often estimate an average treatment effect of acquisition choice over hidden regime variables, while practitioners need the conditional effect for their specific prior quality, budget ratio, and metric. An audit of 40 transfer-BO papers from NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR, AISTATS, UAI, TMLR, JMLR, and AutoML-Conf (2022-2025) finds that 98% never vary B/|A| as a controlled axis. On the same GDSC2 benchmark, changing only the budget reverses the ranking: at B=50, Greedy outperforms UCB by 0.050 Hit@1, while at B=100, UCB outperforms Greedy by 0.035. We capture this transition with the Portable Regime Score PRS=(B/|A|)(1-rho), where rho is the prior rank correlation and can be estimated from pilot contexts before the main comparison. Across 79 conditions spanning chemistry, drug-response biology, and HPO, a hierarchical model gives beta=0.50 (p=1.1e-9), and 19% of conditions fall in an equivalence zone where |advantage|<0.01 Hit@1. In five published reversal cases, PRS predicts the winner from pre-comparison observables. A No-Free-Leaderboard proposition explains why unconditional rankings are unstable: when CATE changes sign across regimes, the reported ATE becomes a function of benchmark mixture. RegimePlanner, which estimates rho online and switches acquisition accordingly, wins all 16 HPO-B search spaces at B=100 and exceeds the matched {Greedy,UCB} per-context oracle on GDSC2 by 18%. Pre-registered predictions achieve 27/40=67.5% overall accuracy and above 90% within EMA prior families. The practical protocol is simple: report B/|A|, rho, K, and metric alongside any claimed acquisition advantage.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种基于条件平均处理效应的多上下文贝叶斯优化评估方法，发现预算比率和先验质量会反转算法排名，并设计了RegimePlanner自适应切换策略。
ai.motivation: 现有迁移BO比较仅估计平均处理效应，忽略了先验质量、预算比率等隐藏变量对算法排名的条件影响，导致实践者无法获得针对自身场景的可靠结论。
ai.method: 引入便携式制度分数PRS=(B/|A|)(1-ρ)，通过先验秩相关ρ和预算比率B/|A|预测算法优势方向；基于层次模型估计条件效应，并设计RegimePlanner在线估计ρ并切换采集函数。
ai.result: 在79个条件上，层次模型β=0.50 (p=1.1e-9)，19%条件处于等价区；RegimePlanner在16个HPO-B搜索空间全部获胜，在GDSC2上超过单上下文最优18%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解算法排名对预算和先验质量的敏感性，并提供简单协议（报告B/|A|、ρ、K和指标）以进行更可靠的比较。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个在线诊断工具，在实验前自动估计PRS并推荐最优采集函数，避免昂贵试错。
idea_spark.risk: PRS的估计依赖先验秩相关，若先验质量无法可靠估计或变化剧烈，预测可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从因果推断中的条件平均处理效应出发，将算法比较视为异质性处理效应估计问题，启发更稳健的基准设计。

en.tldr: Proposes regime-conditioned evaluation for multi-context Bayesian optimization, revealing that budget ratio and prior quality reverse algorithm rankings, and introduces RegimePlanner that adaptively switches acquisition functions.
en.motivation: Published transfer-BO comparisons estimate average treatment effects, ignoring conditional effects of hidden regime variables like prior quality and budget ratio, leaving practitioners without context-specific guidance.
en.method: Introduces Portable Regime Score PRS=(B/|A|)(1-ρ) to predict winner from prior rank correlation ρ and budget ratio B/|A|; uses hierarchical model to estimate conditional effects; designs RegimePlanner that estimates ρ online and switches acquisition.

idea_spark.idea: Develop an online diagnostic tool that automatically estimates PRS before experiments and recommends the optimal acquisition function, avoiding costly trial-and-error.
idea_spark.risk: PRS estimation relies on prior rank correlation; if prior quality is unreliable or varies drastically, predictions may fail.
idea_spark.inspiration: Viewing algorithm comparison as heterogeneous treatment effect estimation from causal inference inspires more robust benchmark design.

papers.title: Exact solutions, trajectories and radiation patterns in the classical relativistic Störmer problem
papers.summary: We investigate the relativistic generalization of the classical Störmer problem, which describes the motion of charged particles in a purely magnetic dipole field. By incorporating special relativistic effects, the particle dynamics is governed by a strongly nonlinear system of second-order differential equations derived from the Lorentz force law. We present a rigorous and fully covariant derivation of the relativistic equations of motion, together with the associated conservation laws. An exact solution for planar motions is obtained in parametric form, providing analytical insight into the structure of the trajectories. In addition, we perform a detailed numerical analysis of the particle dynamics across both nonrelativistic and relativistic regimes, exploring a range of initial conditions and highlighting the impact of relativistic corrections. The electromagnetic radiation emitted by the accelerated charges is also examined. We compute the time dependence of the total radiated power and determine the corresponding frequency spectrum. Our results provide a comprehensive characterization of magnetic dipole--type radiation associated with Störmer-like motion. In particular, the power spectral density consistently exhibits distinct peaks, indicating the presence of preferred frequency bands in the emitted radiation.

ai.tldr: 研究了经典Störmer问题的相对论推广，给出了带电粒子在磁偶极场中运动的精确解、轨迹和辐射模式。
ai.motivation: 经典Störmer问题描述带电粒子在磁偶极场中的运动，但未考虑相对论效应；本研究旨在引入狭义相对论，更准确地描述高能粒子行为。
ai.method: 从洛伦兹力定律出发，严格推导了相对论运动方程和守恒律；对平面运动给出了参数形式的精确解，并进行了广泛的数值模拟。
ai.result: 获得了平面运动的精确解；数值分析揭示了相对论修正对轨迹的影响；计算了总辐射功率的时间依赖性和频率谱，发现功率谱密度存在明显峰值。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解相对论效应对磁偶极场中带电粒子运动及辐射特性的影响，可用于天体物理或等离子体物理中的粒子输运和辐射机制研究。

idea_spark.idea: 将相对论Störmer问题与粒子加速器中的束流动力学结合，探索辐射谱的工程应用。
idea_spark.risk: 精确解仅适用于平面运动，三维情况可能更复杂；相对论效应在极端条件下可能引入数值不稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 功率谱密度中的峰值可能对应特定共振频率，启发设计基于磁偶极场的辐射源或粒子筛选装置。

en.tldr: We study the relativistic generalization of the classical Störmer problem, providing exact solutions, trajectories, and radiation patterns for charged particles in a magnetic dipole field.
en.motivation: The classical Störmer problem neglects relativistic effects; this work incorporates special relativity to accurately describe high-energy particle behavior.
en.method: A rigorous covariant derivation of relativistic equations of motion and conservation laws is given. Exact parametric solutions for planar motions are obtained, complemented by extensive numerical simulations.
en.result: Exact planar solutions are derived. Numerical analysis reveals the impact of relativistic corrections on trajectories. The time-dependent total radiated power and frequency spectrum are computed, showing distinct peaks in the power spectral density.
en.help_to_user: This helps understand relativistic effects on charged particle motion and radiation in a magnetic dipole field, applicable to astrophysical and plasma physics studies of particle transport and radiation mechanisms.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the relativistic Störmer problem with beam dynamics in particle accelerators to explore engineering applications of the radiation spectrum.
idea_spark.risk: Exact solutions are limited to planar motions; 3D cases may be more complex. Relativistic effects could introduce numerical instabilities under extreme conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: The peaks in the power spectral density may correspond to specific resonant frequencies, inspiring the design of radiation sources or particle selection devices based on magnetic dipole fields.

papers.title: Branching Brownian motion with rank-based selection and reaction-diffusion equations
papers.summary: We consider a family of branching-selection particle systems in which particles branch at time dependent rate $r$ and are killed with a probability which is dependent on their rank via some function $ψ$. We show that, under fairly minimal conditions, the hydrodynamic limit of such a system is given by the reaction-diffusion equation $U_t = \frac12 U_{xx} + r(t)G(U)$ with nonlinearity $G(U)$ which is a function of $ψ$. This is a significant generalisation of the well-studied $N$-BBM process, and is similar to the family of `$(b,D)$-BBM' processes described by Groisman \& Soprano-Loto (arXiv:2008.09460). On the one hand, this allows us to understand common reaction-diffusion equations as limits of interacting particle systems with simple descriptions. On the other hand, the asymptotic behaviour of solutions of the reaction-diffusion PDEs can help us predict the asymptotic properties of the associated particle systems. We give general conditions under which the branching-selection particle system has an asymptotic velocity, and describe the velocity up to order $(\log N)^{-2}$; furthermore, we describe the connection between this velocity and the spreading speeds and travelling waves of the corresponding reaction-diffusion equation. This provides a partial weak selection principle.

ai.tldr: 研究了一类基于排名的分支选择粒子系统，证明了其流体力学极限由反应扩散方程给出，并分析了渐近速度与行波的联系。
ai.motivation: 推广经典N-BBM过程，建立更一般的分支选择粒子系统与反应扩散方程之间的对应关系。
ai.method: 在最小条件下推导流体力学极限，利用反应扩散方程的行波和传播速度分析粒子系统的渐近行为。
ai.result: 给出了粒子系统渐近速度的一般条件，并描述了速度至(log N)^{-2}阶的表达式，揭示了与反应扩散方程行波的联系。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解分支选择粒子系统的宏观行为，以及如何通过反应扩散方程预测粒子系统的性质。

idea_spark.idea: 利用反应扩散方程的行波速度来设计粒子系统的选择强度，实现特定传播模式。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设可能过于理想化，实际生物或物理系统中的选择机制更复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从反应扩散方程的行波解出发，反向设计粒子系统的分支和选择规则。

en.tldr: Studies a family of branching-selection particle systems with rank-based selection, shows the hydrodynamic limit is a reaction-diffusion equation, and analyzes asymptotic velocity and traveling waves.
en.motivation: Generalize the classical N-BBM process to establish a broader correspondence between branching-selection particle systems and reaction-diffusion equations.
en.method: Derive the hydrodynamic limit under minimal conditions, and analyze asymptotic behavior using traveling waves and spreading speeds of the reaction-diffusion equation.
en.result: Provide general conditions for the existence of asymptotic velocity, describe the velocity up to order (log N)^{-2}, and reveal its connection to traveling waves.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the macroscopic behavior of branching-selection particle systems and how reaction-diffusion equations can predict particle system properties.

idea_spark.idea: Use traveling wave speeds of reaction-diffusion equations to design selection intensity in particle systems for specific propagation patterns.
idea_spark.risk: Model assumptions may be too idealized; real biological or physical selection mechanisms are more complex.
idea_spark.inspiration: Reverse-engineer branching and selection rules from traveling wave solutions of reaction-diffusion equations.

papers.title: Counter-Dyna: Data-Efficient RL-Based HVAC Control using Counterfactual Building Models
papers.summary: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) offers a promising approach for data-efficient energy management in buildings, combining the strengths of predictive modeling and reinforcement learning. While previous MBRL methods applied to HVAC control have reduced training data requirements, they still require several months of interaction with the building to learn a satisfactory control policy. A key reason is that existing surrogate models attempt to predict the entire state-space, including weather and electricity prices that are unaffected by control actions, or completely ignore these variables. Addressing these issues, we propose Counter-Dyna, a method that enhances the data-efficiency of Dyna, an MBRL method. We create data-efficient counterfactual surrogate models (CSM) by leveraging invariances in the state-space. Using a CSM in Dyna speeds up RL training measured in environment interaction data compared to previous results. In comparison with previous state-of-the-art that used 6-12 months of environment interactions, our method needs only 5 weeks. We evaluate our method in a large simulation study using the literature standard BOPTEST framework and proximal policy algorithm (PPO) as the RL algorithm. Our results show cost-saving potentials of 5.3% to 17.0% in a hypothetical deployment scenario. Our work is a significant step towards making real-world deployment of RL algorithms in HVAC control practically viable.

ai.tldr: 提出Counter-Dyna方法，通过反事实替代模型提升Dyna的数据效率，将HVAC控制所需的环境交互时间从6-12个月缩短至5周，并在BOPTEST仿真中实现5.3%-17.0%的成本节约。
ai.motivation: 现有基于模型的强化学习方法在建筑HVAC控制中仍需数月交互数据，主要原因是替代模型预测了不受控制动作影响的变量（如天气、电价），或完全忽略这些变量。
ai.method: 利用状态空间中的不变性构建数据高效的反事实替代模型（CSM），将其集成到Dyna框架中，加速强化学习训练。
ai.result: 在BOPTEST框架下使用PPO算法，仅需5周环境交互数据，相比先前最优方法（6-12个月）大幅降低数据需求，并实现5.3%-17.0%的假设部署成本节约。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过反事实建模减少强化学习在建筑控制中的训练数据需求，推动实际部署。

idea_spark.idea: 将状态空间划分为可控与不可控部分，仅对可控部分建模，可推广至更多物理系统。
idea_spark.risk: 反事实假设可能不适用于高度耦合或非线性系统，需验证模型泛化能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用不变性简化模型是提升数据效率的通用思路，可启发其他领域（如机器人、自动驾驶）的样本高效学习。

en.tldr: Proposes Counter-Dyna, which uses counterfactual surrogate models to improve Dyna's data efficiency, reducing HVAC control environment interactions from 6-12 months to 5 weeks, achieving 5.3%-17.0% cost savings in BOPTEST simulations.
en.motivation: Existing MBRL methods for HVAC control still require months of interaction data because surrogate models predict uncontrollable variables (e.g., weather, electricity prices) or ignore them entirely.
en.method: Leverages invariances in the state-space to build data-efficient counterfactual surrogate models (CSM) and integrates them into the Dyna framework to accelerate RL training.
en.result: Using PPO in the BOPTEST framework, the method requires only 5 weeks of environment interactions, significantly reducing data needs compared to prior state-of-the-art (6-12 months), with 5.3%-17.0% cost savings in a hypothetical deployment.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how counterfactual modeling can reduce RL training data requirements in building control, facilitating real-world deployment.

idea_spark.idea: Partitioning state-space into controllable and uncontrollable parts and modeling only the controllable part can generalize to many physical systems.
idea_spark.risk: Counterfactual assumptions may fail in highly coupled or nonlinear systems; generalization needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging invariances to simplify models is a general approach for sample-efficient learning, inspiring other domains like robotics and autonomous driving.

papers.title: Global spherically symmetric solutions to the multidimensional isentropic compressible Navier--Stokes--Korteweg system with large initial data
papers.summary: In this paper, we investigate the global existence of spherically symmetric strong solutions with large initial data to an initial-boundary value problem of the multidimensional isentropic compressible Navier-Stokes-Korteweg system in an unbounded exterior domain. We consider the case when the pressure $p(ρ)=ρ^γ$, the viscosity coefficients $μ(ρ)$ and $ λ(ρ)$ satisfy either $μ(ρ)=\tildeμ, λ(ρ)=\tildeλρ^α$ or $μ(ρ)=\tildeμρ^α, λ(ρ)=\tildeλρ^α$, and the capillarity coefficient $κ(ρ)=\tildeκρ^β$, where $α,β,γ\in \mathbb{R}$ are parameters, and $\tildeμ,\tildeλ,\tildeκ$ are given real constants. Under suitable restrictions on the parameters $α,β$ and $γ$, we establish the global existence and uniqueness of spherically symmetric strong solutions. The proof relies on the radically weighted energy method combined with the technique developed by Y.~Kanel'\cite{28}.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了多维等熵可压缩Navier-Stokes-Korteweg系统在无界外区域中具有大初始数据的球对称强解的全局存在性与唯一性。
ai.motivation: 建立具有大初始数据的多维可压缩流体系统全局解的存在性理论。
ai.method: 采用径向加权能量法结合Kanel'技术，在参数α、β、γ的适当限制下进行证明。
ai.result: 获得了球对称强解的全局存在性与唯一性。
ai.help_to_user: 为可压缩流体力学中带毛细效应的系统提供了大初值全局解的存在性结果。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将Kanel'技术应用于更一般的粘性系数或毛细系数形式。
idea_spark.risk: 参数限制可能较严格，推广时需验证新条件下的能量估计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将方法用于带旋转或磁场的可压缩流体系统。

en.tldr: This paper investigates the global existence and uniqueness of spherically symmetric strong solutions with large initial data for the multidimensional isentropic compressible Navier-Stokes-Korteweg system in an unbounded exterior domain.
en.motivation: To establish global existence theory for multidimensional compressible fluid systems with large initial data.
en.method: The proof relies on the radially weighted energy method combined with the technique developed by Y. Kanel', under suitable restrictions on parameters α, β, γ.
en.result: Global existence and uniqueness of spherically symmetric strong solutions are obtained.
en.help_to_user: Provides a global existence result for large initial data in compressible fluid systems with capillarity effects.

idea_spark.idea: Try to apply Kanel' technique to more general forms of viscosity or capillarity coefficients.
idea_spark.risk: Parameter restrictions may be stringent; energy estimates need verification under new conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying the method to compressible fluid systems with rotation or magnetic fields.

papers.title: Approximate Dynamic Programming for Real-time Assignment of Extraboard Transit Operators
papers.summary: This study investigates real-time assignment decisions for extraboard transit operators, who are responsible for covering open work due to unexpected events such as driver absenteeism. Efficient usage of extraboard operators is critical as open work negatively affects service reliability. The problem is formulated as a Markov decision process, designed to capture its stochastic and sequential nature. Due to the problem's very large state space, an approximate policy is proposed in the form of an integer program, which maps a system state to assignment decisions such that the sum of immediate and expected future rewards is maximized. As part of off-line training, future value functions for individual operators are computed using a backward dynamic program. Then, the overestimation in the aggregate value obtained by summing individual values is corrected to account for the interaction among operators. Case studies are conducted based on the operations at a real-world transit agency. Key performance metrics including uncovered open work and extraboard utilization rates are examined for varying absenteeism rates and extraboard roster sizes. The approximate policy is shown to outperform benchmark decision rules mirroring real-world assignment strategies. Further numerical experiments are conducted to analyze different operational policies: (1) inclusion of overtime drivers in the reserve operator roster; (2) reward weights for work tasks that consider passenger wait time saved. Observations from these computational analyses provide actionable insights into extraboard sizing, overtime usage, and real-time dispatch practices at transit agencies.

ai.tldr: 针对公交备用驾驶员实时分配问题，提出基于近似动态规划的整数规划策略，有效减少未覆盖班次并提高利用率。
ai.motivation: 公交备用驾驶员需应对司机缺勤等突发事件，其分配效率直接影响服务可靠性，而现有规则式分配效果有限。
ai.method: 将问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程，离线训练时通过后向动态规划计算个体驾驶员未来价值函数，再修正聚合高估，在线时用整数规划映射状态到分配决策。
ai.result: 在真实公交公司案例中，所提策略在未覆盖班次和备用利用率上优于基准规则；进一步实验分析了加班司机纳入、乘客等待时间权重等政策的影响。
ai.help_to_user: 为公交调度员提供数据驱动的实时分配决策支持，并给出备用规模、加班使用和调度实践的可操作建议。

idea_spark.idea: 将个体价值函数聚合修正的思路，可推广至多智能体协同决策问题，如机器人编队任务分配。
idea_spark.risk: 离线训练依赖历史数据，若突发事件模式变化可能导致价值函数失效；在线整数规划求解时间需满足实时性要求。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用后向动态规划计算个体价值再修正聚合偏差，为处理大规模组合优化问题提供了可分解的近似思路。

en.tldr: This study proposes an approximate dynamic programming approach with integer programming for real-time assignment of extraboard transit operators, reducing uncovered work and improving utilization.
en.motivation: Efficient assignment of extraboard operators is critical to cover open work caused by unexpected events like driver absenteeism, but existing rule-based strategies are suboptimal.
en.method: The problem is formulated as a Markov decision process. Offline training computes future value functions for individual operators via backward dynamic programming, then corrects overestimation in aggregation. Online, an integer program maps state to assignment decisions.
en.result: Case studies at a real transit agency show the proposed policy outperforms benchmark rules. Further experiments analyze the impact of including overtime drivers and reward weights for passenger wait time savings.
en.help_to_user: Provides transit dispatchers with a data-driven decision support tool and actionable insights on extraboard sizing, overtime usage, and real-time dispatch practices.

idea_spark.idea: The idea of computing individual value functions and correcting aggregation bias can be extended to multi-agent coordination problems like robot task allocation.
idea_spark.risk: Offline training relies on historical data; changes in disruption patterns may degrade performance. Online integer programming must meet real-time constraints.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using backward dynamic programming for individual values and correcting aggregation overestimation offers a scalable decomposition approach for large-scale combinatorial optimization.

papers.title: Age of Gossip in Ring Networks With Non-Poisson Updates
papers.summary: We consider a network consisting of $n$ nodes connected in a ring formation and a source that generates updates according to a renewal process and disseminates them to the ring network according to a Poisson process. The nodes in the network gossip with each other according to a push-based gossiping protocol, and disseminate version updates. Gossip between two neighbors happens at the arrivals of renewal processes with finite mean and variance. All renewal processes and Poisson processes in the network are independent but not identically distributed. We consider both uni-directional ring networks and bi-directional ring networks. We use version age of information to quantify the freshness of information at each node. Prior work has used the stochastic hybrid systems (SHS) approach or a first passage percolation (FPP) approach to analyze ring networks with edges following identical Poisson processes. In this work, we use a sample-path backtracking approach to characterize the probabilistic scaling of the version age of information of an arbitrary node in the gossip network, where each edge follows an independent but not identically distributed renewal process. We show that the version age of information of any node in the network is stochastically equivalent to $\sqrt{n}$ at any time instant after the node has received its first update from the source.

ai.tldr: 研究了环状网络中节点在非泊松更新下的信息年龄，证明任意节点的版本年龄在时间上随机等价于√n。
ai.motivation: 现有工作假设边遵循相同泊松过程，而实际网络更新可能服从更一般的更新过程，需要分析非泊松更新下的信息年龄。
ai.method: 采用样本路径回溯方法，对每个边独立但不同分布的更新过程进行概率缩放分析。
ai.result: 任意节点在收到源首次更新后的任意时刻，其版本年龄随机等价于√n。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解非泊松更新下环状网络的信息新鲜度特性，为网络设计提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 结合机器学习预测更新到达模式，动态调整gossip协议参数以优化信息年龄。
idea_spark.risk: 非泊松更新假设可能增加模型复杂度，实际部署需验证更新过程是否符合假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从随机过程角度重新审视信息年龄，启发设计更鲁棒的分布式信息传播协议。
