en.tldr: Studies the age of gossip in ring networks with non-Poisson updates, showing that the version age of any node scales stochastically as √n.
en.motivation: Prior work assumes identical Poisson edges, but real-world updates may follow more general renewal processes; need to analyze age under non-Poisson updates.
en.method: Uses a sample-path backtracking approach to characterize the probabilistic scaling of version age for independent but not identically distributed renewal processes on each edge.
en.result: At any time after receiving the first update from the source, the version age of any node is stochastically equivalent to √n.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical insights into information freshness in ring networks under general update processes, aiding network design.

idea_spark.idea: Combine machine learning to predict update arrival patterns and dynamically adjust gossip protocol parameters to optimize age.
idea_spark.risk: Non-Poisson assumptions may increase model complexity; practical deployment requires validation of update process assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Revisiting information age from a stochastic process perspective inspires design of more robust distributed information dissemination protocols.

papers.title: Dynamic Quantum-Assisted Co-Design of Control Tuning and Lyapunov Stability Synthesis for Nonlinear Systems
papers.summary: This paper proposes a dynamic quantum-assisted co-design framework for nonlinear closed-loop systems in which controller parameters and Lyapunov-certificate parameters are redesigned jointly at successive decision epochs. Unlike conventional nonlinear control designs that typically tune controller gains offline and verify stability separately, the proposed method embeds performance improvement and Lyapunov-based stability synthesis within a unified online optimization loop. The main novelty is a two-step computational structure that first contracts the continuous admissible search region around the current operating condition using a Black-Hole-based calibration procedure and then constructs a finite binary representation only over this calibrated region. The encoded objective is obtained from sampled nonlinear closed-loop evaluations and approximated by a local quadratic pseudo-Boolean surrogate, enabling an Ising-type Hamiltonian representation suitable for quantum-assisted optimization. Quantum imaginary time evolution is then used to explore the encoded Hamiltonian, and the resulting candidate bitstrings are decoded into continuous controller and Lyapunov parameters. To reduce dependence on the surrogate model, the decoded candidates are re-evaluated using the original nonlinear closed-loop cost and Lyapunov penalties before the final update is applied. The framework can accommodate different Lyapunov decay specifications by modifying the stability penalty and is validated on first-order nonlinear consensus, second-order nonlinear consensus, and induction-motor drive control examples. The implementation code used to generate the reported results is available at \href{https://github.com/LSU-RAISE-LAB/DQCLS-NS}{GitHub}.

ai.tldr: 提出一种动态量子辅助协同设计框架，在非线性闭环系统中联合在线优化控制器参数与李雅普诺夫证书参数，通过黑洞校准、局部二次伪布尔代理和量子虚时演化实现稳定与性能的统一。
ai.motivation: 传统非线性控制设计通常离线调参并单独验证稳定性，缺乏在线联合优化能力，难以适应动态变化。
ai.method: 采用两步计算结构：先用黑洞校准收缩连续可行搜索区域，再在该区域上构建有限二进制表示；通过采样非线性闭环评估构造局部二次伪布尔代理，转化为伊辛哈密顿量，用量子虚时演化探索候选解，最后用原始代价和惩罚重新评估。
ai.result: 在一阶、二阶非线性一致性和感应电机驱动控制实例上验证了框架的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何将量子计算与非线性控制稳定性设计结合，实现在线协同优化。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将黑洞校准替换为其他自适应搜索区域收缩方法，或使用不同量子优化算法（如变分量子本征求解器）。
idea_spark.risk: 量子虚时演化在噪声量子设备上的实现可能引入误差，且代理模型近似可能丢失非线性细节。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将经典控制理论与量子优化算法深度融合，用于实时控制任务。

en.tldr: Proposes a dynamic quantum-assisted co-design framework that jointly optimizes controller parameters and Lyapunov certificate parameters online for nonlinear closed-loop systems, using Black-Hole calibration, local quadratic pseudo-Boolean surrogate, and quantum imaginary time evolution.
en.motivation: Conventional nonlinear control designs tune gains offline and verify stability separately, lacking online joint optimization capability for dynamic environments.
en.method: A two-step structure: first contracts the admissible search region via Black-Hole calibration, then builds a finite binary representation; constructs a local quadratic pseudo-Boolean surrogate from sampled evaluations, encodes it as an Ising Hamiltonian, explores with quantum imaginary time evolution, and re-evaluates candidates using original cost and penalties.
en.result: Validated on first-order and second-order nonlinear consensus and induction-motor drive control examples.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to integrate quantum computing with nonlinear control stability design for online co-optimization.

idea_spark.idea: Explore replacing Black-Hole calibration with other adaptive region contraction methods or using alternative quantum optimization algorithms like variational quantum eigensolvers.
idea_spark.risk: Quantum imaginary time evolution on noisy devices may introduce errors, and surrogate model approximations may miss nonlinear details.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires deep integration of classical control theory with quantum optimization algorithms for real-time control tasks.

papers.title: Euler Singularities I: Boundary Blow-Up for Smooth Exact-Odd Axisymmetric Euler with Swirl
papers.summary: We construct smooth axisymmetric-with-swirl initial data in a periodic cylinder for which the three-dimensional incompressible Euler evolution develops a finite-time boundary singularity. The construction is carried out in the dynamically invariant exact-odd class \[ Γ(r,-z,t)=-Γ(r,z,t), \qquad G(r,-z,t)=-G(r,z,t), \] where \(Γ=r u^θ\) and \(G=ω^θ/r\). At the side-wall point \((r,z)=(1,0)\), exact oddness gives the pointwise identities \[ \partial_t\partial_zG(1,0,t) = σ(t)\partial_zG(1,0,t) +2\bigl(\partial_zΓ(1,0,t)\bigr)^2, \qquad \partial_t\partial_zΓ(1,0,t) = σ(t)\partial_zΓ(1,0,t), \] with \(σ(t)=-\partial_z u^z(1,0,t)\).   The proof is based on a side-wall Dirichlet parametrix for the five-dimensional lifted recovery equation \(-Δ_5φ=G\). Near the wall, the effective compression kernel has leading term \[ K_0(x,y)=C_0\frac{xy}{(x^2+y^2)^2}, \qquad C_0>0, \] with controlled remainders, parity-based shear cancellation, and strain-variation bounds on narrow diagonal cones. These estimates are combined with an over-compressed dyadic angular cluster functional. The cluster functional absorbs same-scale angular fragmentation, growing dyadic windows, dynamically separated far tails, and fixed-distance exterior fields into an integrably small affine Campanato defect.   The resulting invariant cluster contains a uniformly coherent component with amplitudes \(A_*(t)\) and \(B_*(t)\) satisfying the Dini comparison system \[ D^+A_*(t)\ge cB_*(t)^2, \qquad D^+B_*(t)\ge cA_*(t)B_*(t). \]

ai.tldr: 构造了周期圆柱内光滑轴对称带旋初始数据，证明三维不可压Euler方程在有限时间边界奇点。
ai.motivation: 研究Euler方程边界奇点的形成机制。
ai.method: 利用精确奇对称类、侧壁Dirichlet参数化、二进角簇泛函和Dini比较系统。
ai.result: 得到边界奇点存在性的严格证明。
ai.help_to_user: 提供Euler方程边界奇点构造的分析框架。

idea_spark.idea: 利用角簇泛函吸收尺度碎片，简化奇点分析。
idea_spark.risk: 方法高度依赖对称性和特定几何，普适性有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将多尺度分解与比较系统结合，用于流体奇点研究。

papers.title: On Controllability of a Class of N -dimensional Hyperbolic Equations with Internal Single-point Degeneracy
papers.summary: This paper explores the controllability of a class of N-dimensional hyperbolic equations featuring a single interior degenerate point. Firstly, we establish the well-posedness of the equation through the application of the Hardy inequality. Following this, we primarily utilize the Carleman estimate method to derive the observability inequality. By leveraging the equivalence between observability and controllability, we deduce the exact controllability of the equation. It is worth noting that our selected control region includes the degenerate null point. In the Carleman estimate, we adopt a unique approach to construct the weight function, effectively negating the influence of the degenerate region.

ai.tldr: 研究了一类具有内部单点退化的N维双曲方程的可控性，通过Hardy不等式和Carleman估计建立了适定性和可观测性，并证明了精确可控性。
ai.motivation: 探索内部单点退化对高维双曲方程可控性的影响，填补该领域理论空白。
ai.method: 利用Hardy不等式证明方程适定性，构造特殊权函数的Carleman估计导出可观测性不等式，再通过对偶性得到精确可控性。
ai.result: 当控制区域包含退化零点时，该类N维退化双曲方程是精确可控的。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理含内部退化点的偏微分方程控制问题提供了理论工具和构造性方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将退化点纳入控制区域，利用Carleman估计消除退化区域的影响。
idea_spark.risk: 高维情形下退化点的奇异性可能使估计常数退化，需额外正则性条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可尝试将方法应用于退化抛物型或薛定谔方程的可控性问题。

en.tldr: This paper investigates the controllability of a class of N-dimensional hyperbolic equations with a single interior degenerate point, establishing well-posedness via Hardy inequality and deriving observability inequality through a specially constructed Carleman estimate, leading to exact controllability when the control region includes the degenerate point.
en.motivation: To understand the impact of internal single-point degeneracy on the controllability of high-dimensional hyperbolic equations, filling a theoretical gap.
en.method: Prove well-posedness using Hardy inequality, derive observability inequality via Carleman estimate with a novel weight function, and obtain exact controllability by duality.
en.result: The class of N-dimensional degenerate hyperbolic equations is exactly controllable when the control region contains the degenerate null point.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical tools and constructive methods for control problems of PDEs with internal degenerate points.

idea_spark.idea: Include the degenerate point in the control region and use Carleman estimates to cancel the effect of the degenerate region.
idea_spark.risk: In high dimensions, the singularity at the degenerate point may cause estimate constants to blow up, requiring additional regularity conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Try applying the method to controllability problems for degenerate parabolic or Schrödinger equations.

papers.title: Ergodicity of stochastic functional differential equation with jumps and finite delay
papers.summary: This paper investigates the ergodicity of stochastic functional differential equations with jumps under the Wasserstein distance by the generalized coupling method. Two key conditions are verified. The first is verified by establishing an exponential decay bound for the coupled segment processes and applying the Girsanov theorem for Itô-Lévy processes. The second is verified through a support theorem developed for an auxiliary process and then extended to the underlying process. Combining these results yields the desired ergodicity.

ai.tldr: 本文通过广义耦合方法，在Wasserstein距离下证明了带跳和有限延迟的随机泛函微分方程的遍历性。
ai.motivation: 研究带跳和有限延迟的随机泛函微分方程的遍历性，以理解其长期统计行为。
ai.method: 采用广义耦合方法，结合Girsanov定理和支撑定理，验证了两个关键条件。
ai.result: 成功证明了该方程在Wasserstein距离下的遍历性。
ai.help_to_user: 为带跳和延迟的随机系统提供了遍历性分析的理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将广义耦合方法与Girsanov定理结合，处理带跳过程的遍历性。
idea_spark.risk: 条件验证可能依赖于特定假设，推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用辅助过程的支撑定理来简化主过程的遍历性证明。

en.tldr: This paper proves ergodicity of stochastic functional differential equations with jumps and finite delay under the Wasserstein distance using a generalized coupling method.
en.motivation: To study the ergodicity of stochastic functional differential equations with jumps and finite delay for understanding their long-term statistical behavior.
en.method: A generalized coupling method is employed, combining the Girsanov theorem and a support theorem to verify two key conditions.
en.result: Ergodicity under the Wasserstein distance is successfully established.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical tools for ergodicity analysis of stochastic systems with jumps and delays.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the generalized coupling method with the Girsanov theorem to handle ergodicity of jump processes.
idea_spark.risk: Verification of conditions may rely on specific assumptions, requiring caution in generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use a support theorem for an auxiliary process to simplify the ergodicity proof of the main process.

papers.title: Patterns in Time and Space from a Single Morphogen via Nonlinear Layering
papers.summary: Spatial and temporal pattern formation in reaction-diffusion systems is typically studied with two or more equations, as scalar reaction-diffusion equations confined to convex domains do not admit stable inhomogeneous states in time or space on long timescales. Here, we show that a single morphogen diffusing across layered two-dimensional media, with nonlinear coupling between layers, is able to generate stable patterns in time and space. This $N$-layer model is analysed via a thin-domain limit, which reduces to an $N$-component reaction-diffusion system on a homogeneous one-dimensional domain. This reduced model can be analysed via linear stability techniques, showing that non-diffusive, or reactive, coupling between regions is necessary for pattern-forming instabilities, at least in the reduced model. This reduced system can exhibit Turing, Hopf, and Turing-wave instabilities, with emergent structures that are numerically shown to persist even away from the thin-domain regime of the full 2D single-morphogen system. These results suggest that heterogeneous stratification and nonlinear coupling can broaden the class of systems which exhibit complex spatiotemporal behaviours, which may be relevant in scenarios where only a single morphogen is known to act.

ai.tldr: 通过非线性层间耦合，单个形态发生素在二维分层介质中即可产生稳定的时空模式。
ai.motivation: 传统观点认为标量反应扩散方程在凸域上无法产生长期稳定的时空模式，需要两个或更多方程。本文旨在探索单个形态发生素是否可能通过介质分层实现模式形成。
ai.method: 建立N层二维介质模型，利用薄域极限简化为均匀一维上的N组分反应扩散系统，通过线性稳定性分析研究Turing、Hopf和Turing-波不稳定性，并用数值模拟验证全二维系统中的模式持久性。
ai.result: 非扩散（反应性）层间耦合是模式形成不稳定的必要条件；简化模型可展示多种不稳定性类型，且数值结果表明这些模式在远离薄域极限的全二维系统中依然存在。
ai.help_to_user: 为仅有一种已知形态发生素的生物系统（如胚胎发育）提供新的模式形成机制解释。

idea_spark.idea: 利用实验可调控的分层材料（如水凝胶多层膜）实现单个化学信号分子的时空模式，验证理论预测。
idea_spark.risk: 实际系统中层间耦合的精确控制可能困难，且薄域极限假设在真实三维环境中可能不成立。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受自然界中组织分层结构的启发，如皮肤表皮与真皮之间的信号交互，可探索单形态发生素在分层组织中的模式形成。

en.tldr: A single morphogen diffusing across layered 2D media with nonlinear coupling can generate stable spatiotemporal patterns.
en.motivation: Scalar reaction-diffusion equations on convex domains typically cannot sustain stable inhomogeneous states; this work investigates whether a single morphogen can produce patterns through medium stratification.
en.method: An N-layer 2D model is analyzed via a thin-domain limit, reducing to an N-component 1D reaction-diffusion system. Linear stability analysis identifies Turing, Hopf, and Turing-wave instabilities, and numerical simulations confirm pattern persistence in the full 2D system.
en.result: Reactive (non-diffusive) coupling between layers is necessary for pattern-forming instabilities. The reduced model exhibits multiple instability types, and patterns persist beyond the thin-domain regime.
en.help_to_user: Provides a mechanism for pattern formation in systems where only a single morphogen is known, such as in developmental biology.

idea_spark.idea: Experimentally realize the model using layered hydrogels with controlled coupling to generate spatiotemporal patterns from a single chemical signal.
idea_spark.risk: Precise control of interlayer coupling may be challenging experimentally, and the thin-domain assumption may not hold in realistic 3D environments.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by stratified tissues in nature (e.g., skin epidermis-dermis interactions), explore single-morphogen pattern formation in layered biological structures.

papers.title: Lifespan of Classical Solutions to One-Dimensional Quasilinear Wave Equations
papers.summary: In this paper, we consider the upper and lower bounds of the lifespan of classical solutions of the Cauchy problem for the one-dimensional quasilinear wave equation $u_{tt}-c(u_x)^2u_{xx}=0$ where the derivative of $c(θ)$ tends to $0$ near the origin. In particular, our result shows that the lifespan of the solution extends algebraically depending on the smallness of the initial data. Furthermore, we also show that when $c(θ)$ is flat at the origin, the lifespan extends exponentially depending on the smallness of the initial data. Our proof is based on the method of Lax's characteristics and Riemann invariants.

ai.tldr: 研究一维拟线性波动方程经典解的生命跨度，证明解的生命跨度随初始数据小量代数或指数延长。
ai.motivation: 探索拟线性波动方程解的生命跨度与初始数据小量的依赖关系。
ai.method: 利用Lax特征线法和Riemann不变量。

ai.help_to_user: 为理解拟线性波动方程解的长时间行为提供精确估计。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从代数延长到指数延长的跃迁启发我们研究更一般的退化机制。

en.tldr: Studies the lifespan of classical solutions to one-dimensional quasilinear wave equations, showing algebraic or exponential extension depending on the flatness of the coefficient at the origin.
en.motivation: To explore the dependence of solution lifespan on the smallness of initial data for quasilinear wave equations.
en.method: Uses Lax's method of characteristics and Riemann invariants.
en.result: When the derivative of c(θ) tends to 0 near the origin, lifespan extends algebraically; when c(θ) is flat at the origin, lifespan extends exponentially.
en.help_to_user: Provides precise lifespan estimates for long-time behavior of quasilinear wave equations.

idea_spark.idea: Generalizing the flatness condition to higher-order degeneracy may yield super-exponential or infinite lifespan.
idea_spark.risk: Higher-order degeneracy might cause finite-time blow-up, requiring careful analysis.
idea_spark.inspiration: The transition from algebraic to exponential lifespan inspires investigation of more general degeneracy mechanisms.

papers.title: Traveling-wave behavior for Fisher-KPP equations in the hyperbolic space
papers.summary: We study the Cauchy problem in the hyperbolic space for the heat equation with a Fisher-KPP type forcing term. Depending on the relative strength of diffusion, measured by the infimum of the spectrum of the Laplace-Beltrami operator, as compared to the growth due to the forcing term, solutions may propagate or vanish as time passes. We prove new results concerning this dichotomy that include the critical case where diffusion and reaction are of the same order. If the initial datum possesses some symmetry (invariance under a cohomogeneity one subgroup of the group of isometries of the hyperbolic space), the problem reduces to a unidimensional one. In the case of propagation, the solution to this unidimensional problem converges in shape to an Euclidean traveling wave of minimal speed in an appropriate moving frame. The choice of this frame depends on the subgroup of isometries (elliptic, hyperbolic or parabolic) under which the initial datum is invariant. In contrast with the Euclidean case, the asymptotic spreading speed (in due coordinates) depends on the dimension, while the coefficient of the logarithmic correction in the location of the front does not, no matter the underlying isometry.

ai.tldr: 研究双曲空间中Fisher-KPP型热方程的柯西问题，发现解是否传播取决于扩散与反应的相对强度，并在对称初始条件下解收敛于欧氏最小速度行波。
ai.motivation: 探索双曲空间几何对反应扩散方程传播行为的影响，特别是临界情形和不同等距子群下的渐近行为。
ai.method: 利用Laplace-Beltrami算子谱下界刻画扩散强度，通过余一维等距子群对称性将问题降为一维，并分析移动坐标系中的波形收敛。
ai.result: 证明了传播与消失的二分法（含临界情形）；对称初始条件下解收敛于欧氏最小速度行波；渐近传播速度依赖于维数，而对数修正系数与等距类型无关。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解双曲空间几何如何改变反应扩散系统的传播动力学，为曲率影响下的行波理论提供新结果。

idea_spark.idea: 利用等距子群对称性将高维问题降为一维，并引入移动坐标系捕捉波形收敛，可应用于其他具有对称性的非线性PDE。
idea_spark.risk: 对称性假设可能限制结果的普适性；临界情形下的分析依赖于谱间隙，在一般流形上可能不成立。
idea_spark.inspiration: 双曲空间中的对数修正系数与维数无关这一发现，启发在更一般曲率流形上探索类似的不变性。

en.tldr: We study the Cauchy problem for the Fisher-KPP heat equation in hyperbolic space, showing that propagation vs. vanishing depends on the relative strength of diffusion and reaction, and that under symmetric initial data the solution converges to a Euclidean traveling wave of minimal speed.
en.motivation: To understand how hyperbolic geometry influences the propagation behavior of reaction-diffusion equations, especially in the critical case and under different isometry subgroups.
en.method: We characterize diffusion strength via the infimum of the Laplace-Beltrami spectrum, reduce the problem to one dimension using cohomogeneity-one isometry subgroups, and analyze wave convergence in a moving frame.
en.result: We prove a propagation-vanishing dichotomy (including the critical case); under symmetric initial data the solution converges to a Euclidean traveling wave of minimal speed; the asymptotic spreading speed depends on dimension, while the logarithmic correction coefficient does not, regardless of the isometry type.
en.help_to_user: Provides new results on how hyperbolic geometry alters propagation dynamics in reaction-diffusion systems, offering insights into traveling wave theory under curvature.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit symmetry under cohomogeneity-one subgroups to reduce high-dimensional problems to one dimension and capture wave convergence in a moving frame—applicable to other symmetric nonlinear PDEs.
idea_spark.risk: The symmetry assumption may limit generality; the critical-case analysis relies on a spectral gap that may not hold on general manifolds.
idea_spark.inspiration: The finding that the logarithmic correction coefficient is dimension-independent in hyperbolic space inspires the search for similar invariants on more general curved manifolds.

papers.title: Distributed Energy System Design including Unbalanced AC Power Flow for Large LV Networks with ADMM
papers.summary: With the addition of large numbers of distributed energy resources (DERs) to distribution networks comes the increasing risk that their operation may violate the safety constraints of these networks. The problem considered in this paper is that of combined siting, sizing and dispatch of these DERs, also known as distributed energy system (DES) design, to help meet electrical and heat loads within the network. Here, the operation of these DERs is modelled, along with the unbalanced three-phase alternating current (AC) power flow in the network. When this network power flow is considered, this admits a non-convex mixed-integer nonlinear program (MINLP) model formulation which scales poorly with network size in terms of solve time. To address this, the problem is decomposed into a series of algorithmic steps, starting with a mixed-integer linear program (MILP) formulation that does not consider network constraints, then fixing binary variables, adding power flow constraints and solving as a nonlinear program (NLP) and finally removing operational binary variables and replacing them with a complementarity reformulation. As the main contributors to the overall solve time, the NLP and Complementarity steps are solved using a hybrid spatial/temporal decomposition strategy and the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) distributed optimisation method. Results are presented for networks based on the European low voltage test feeder with up to 55 loads and 120 timepoints, with the ADMM approach showing speed-ups of up to 13x when considering parallel computation of the subproblems, for a maximum observed optimality gap of 0.61%.

ai.tldr: 提出一种结合不平衡三相交流潮流的分布式能源系统设计方法，利用ADMM实现大规模低压网络的快速求解。
ai.motivation: 大量分布式能源接入可能违反配电网安全约束，现有MINLP模型求解时间随网络规模增长过快。
ai.method: 将问题分解为MILP（忽略网络约束）、固定二进制变量后加入潮流约束的NLP、以及互补性重构三步，对NLP和互补性步骤采用混合时空分解与ADMM分布式优化。
ai.result: 在55个负荷、120个时间点的欧洲低压测试馈线上，ADMM并行计算子问题加速比达13倍，最优性差距最大0.61%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何在大规模低压配电网中高效求解含不平衡潮流的分布式能源选址、定容与调度问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将互补性重构与ADMM结合，消除运行二进制变量，实现分布式并行求解。
idea_spark.risk: ADMM收敛性依赖参数选择，最优性差距可能随问题规模增大而扩大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴电力系统分解思想，将复杂MINLP拆解为可并行子问题，适用于实时或准实时优化场景。

en.tldr: Proposes a distributed energy system design method incorporating unbalanced three-phase AC power flow, using ADMM for fast solution of large LV networks.
en.motivation: Large-scale DER integration risks violating network safety constraints; existing MINLP models scale poorly in solve time with network size.
en.method: Decomposes the problem into a MILP (ignoring network constraints), an NLP with fixed binaries and power flow constraints, and a complementarity reformulation; solves NLP and complementarity steps via hybrid spatial/temporal decomposition and ADMM distributed optimization.
en.result: On a European LV test feeder with 55 loads and 120 timepoints, ADMM achieves up to 13x speedup with parallel subproblem computation and a maximum optimality gap of 0.61%.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to efficiently solve DER siting, sizing, and dispatch with unbalanced power flow in large LV distribution networks.

idea_spark.idea: Combine complementarity reformulation with ADMM to eliminate operational binary variables and enable distributed parallel solution.
idea_spark.risk: ADMM convergence depends on parameter tuning; optimality gap may increase with problem size.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage power system decomposition to break complex MINLPs into parallelizable subproblems, suitable for real-time or near-real-time optimization.

papers.title: Asymptotics of Minimizers for Ginzburg--Landau-type Functionals in High Dimensions
papers.summary: We investigate local minimizers of Ginzburg--Landau-type functionals in dimension $n\geq 3$ that satisfy logarithmic energy bounds, assuming the potential has a vacuum manifold with a finite fundamental group. We show that the normalized energy measures converge to an $(n-2)$-rectifiable measure associated with a stationary varifold, with quantized density determined by the homotopy classes of the vacuum manifold. Away from the support of the $(n-2)$-rectifiable measure, the minimizers converge strongly in $H^1_{\text{loc}}$ to a minimizing harmonic map, which is smooth outside an $(n-3)$-rectifiable singular set.

ai.tldr: 研究高维Ginzburg-Landau型泛函局部极小化子的渐近行为，证明归一化能量测度收敛到与平稳varifold相关的(n-2)-可求长测度，且密度由真空流形的同伦类量化。
ai.motivation: 理解高维Ginzburg-Landau型泛函极小化子的能量集中和奇异结构，推广低维结果。
ai.method: 利用对数能量界假设和真空流形有限基本群，结合几何测度论和调和映射理论。
ai.result: 能量测度收敛到(n-2)-可求长测度，极小化子在测度支撑外强收敛到光滑调和映射，奇异集为(n-3)-可求长。
ai.help_to_user: 提供高维Ginzburg-Landau型泛函极小化子渐近行为的严格数学刻画。

idea_spark.idea: 探索有限基本群条件对能量集中结构的影响，可能用于设计新型材料缺陷模型。
idea_spark.risk: 高维奇异集结构复杂，数值验证困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将拓扑同伦类与几何测度论结合，为理解高维相变问题提供新视角。

en.tldr: We study local minimizers of Ginzburg-Landau-type functionals in dimensions n≥3 with logarithmic energy bounds, showing that normalized energy measures converge to an (n-2)-rectifiable measure associated with a stationary varifold, with quantized density determined by homotopy classes of the vacuum manifold.
en.motivation: To understand energy concentration and singular structures of minimizers in high dimensions, extending known results from lower dimensions.
en.method: Using logarithmic energy bounds and finite fundamental group of the vacuum manifold, combined with geometric measure theory and harmonic map theory.
en.result: Energy measures converge to an (n-2)-rectifiable measure; minimizers converge strongly to a smooth harmonic map away from the measure support, with an (n-3)-rectifiable singular set.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical characterization of the asymptotic behavior of minimizers for high-dimensional Ginzburg-Landau-type functionals.

idea_spark.idea: Explore how the finite fundamental group condition influences energy concentration, potentially leading to new models for material defects.
idea_spark.risk: High-dimensional singular sets are complex and difficult to verify numerically.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining topological homotopy classes with geometric measure theory offers a new perspective on high-dimensional phase transition problems.

keywords_raw: vacuum manifold with finite fundamental group

papers.title: IRON: Implicit Resolvent Optimization under Noise
papers.summary: We study stochastic optimization from a joint continuous-discrete point of view. Starting from a second-order stochastic differential equation interpreted as a noisy accelerated gradient flow, we discretize the dynamics by a fully implicit Backward-Euler scheme. This leads to a resolvent, or proximal-type, update, computed in practice through Levenberg-Marquardt, Newton, or trust-region-type inner solves. The resulting method, denoted by $\text{IRON}_{\text{FI}}$, admits a Lyapunov mean-square recursion. The main conclusion is that increasing the implicit stepsize $α$ improves the contraction factor and decreases the stationary mean-square error bound. Under sufficiently accurate inner solves, this bound scales as $O(1/α)$; in particular, for large enough $α$, the recursion is contractive and the stationary error bound vanishes as $α\to\infty$. We establish the theory for smooth strongly convex objectives and provide a sharper quadratic analysis with an explicit stationary constant. The numerical experiments support the theory in the strongly convex case and illustrate the same qualitative behavior in nonconvex and learning settings. To the best of our knowledge, this fully implicit inertial-resolvent discretization, where the noise acts as an additive perturbation of the resolvent center and yields an $O(1/α)$ stationary-MSE law, has not been isolated in this form before. The broader message is that discretization is not only an implementation choice: in stochastic optimization, the numerical integration rule can directly affect the long-time stability of the iterates under noise.

ai.tldr: 提出一种全隐式惯性-预解离散方法，在噪声下实现O(1/α)稳态均方误差。
ai.motivation: 从连续-离散联合视角研究随机优化，探索离散化规则对噪声下迭代长期稳定性的直接影响。
ai.method: 基于二阶随机微分方程，采用全隐式Backward-Euler格式离散，得到预解型更新，通过Levenberg-Marquardt或牛顿法内层求解实现。
ai.result: 增大隐式步长α可改善收缩因子并降低稳态均方误差界，该界在精确内层求解下为O(1/α)；当α足够大时，迭代收缩且稳态误差随α→∞消失。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种在强凸目标下理论保证、在非凸和学习场景中表现一致的随机优化算法。

idea_spark.idea: 将数值积分规则视为影响随机优化稳定性的主动设计变量，而非仅实现细节。
idea_spark.risk: 内层求解精度要求可能增加计算开销，且理论分析限于强凸情形。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受数值分析中隐式格式稳定性优于显式格式的启发，将其应用于随机优化以对抗噪声。

en.motivation: Studies stochastic optimization from a joint continuous-discrete viewpoint, exploring how discretization rules directly affect long-time stability of iterates under noise.

papers.title: Sequential Monte Carlo for Resilient Networks: Assessment, Mitigation, and Generative Modeling
papers.summary: Resilience is becoming crucial for future wireless networks, which must withstand, adapt to, and recover from rare but potentially cascading disruptions. This paper develops a sequential Monte Carlo (SMC) simulation framework for such systems, in which resilience failures are formulated as path-dependent rare events arising from staged degradation and delayed recovery, and are decomposed into semantically interpretable levels defined by a reaction coordinate. Building on this structure, we present a fixed-level splitting approach with budget-aware population control, enabling efficient estimation of rare non-recovery probabilities. We discuss the potential reuse of SMC checkpoints as representative near-critical states for policy evaluation and simulation-based selection. We further extend the methodology to learned stochastic simulation by using generative sequence models as restartable surrogates within data-driven digital twins. We showcase the framework in a delay-critical wireless network use case, where SMC substantially improves over standard Monte Carlo in rare-event regimes with both physical and learned simulators.

ai.tldr: 提出一种序贯蒙特卡洛框架，用于评估和缓解无线网络的韧性失效，并扩展至生成式数字孪生。
ai.motivation: 未来无线网络需应对罕见但可能级联的故障，现有方法难以高效估计路径依赖的罕见非恢复概率。
ai.method: 将韧性失效分解为反应坐标定义的语义层级，采用固定水平分裂与预算感知种群控制，并利用生成序列模型作为可重启替代。
ai.result: 在时延关键用例中，SMC在罕见事件区域显著优于标准蒙特卡洛，物理与学习模拟器均有效。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何用SMC高效评估网络韧性，并利用生成模型构建可重用的数字孪生。

idea_spark.idea: 将SMC检查点作为近临界状态，用于策略评估与仿真选择，可启发主动韧性管理。
idea_spark.risk: 生成模型作为替代可能引入偏差，需验证其保真度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合罕见事件模拟与生成式AI，为数字孪生提供高效、可重用的韧性评估工具。

en.tldr: A sequential Monte Carlo framework for assessing and mitigating resilience failures in wireless networks, extended to generative digital twins.
en.motivation: Future wireless networks must handle rare but potentially cascading disruptions; existing methods struggle to efficiently estimate path-dependent rare non-recovery probabilities.
en.method: Decompose resilience failures into semantically interpretable levels via a reaction coordinate, use fixed-level splitting with budget-aware population control, and employ generative sequence models as restartable surrogates.
en.result: In a delay-critical wireless use case, SMC significantly outperforms standard Monte Carlo in rare-event regimes with both physical and learned simulators.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to efficiently evaluate network resilience with SMC and build reusable digital twins using generative models.

idea_spark.idea: Using SMC checkpoints as near-critical states for policy evaluation and simulation selection can inspire proactive resilience management.
idea_spark.risk: Generative surrogates may introduce bias; their fidelity must be validated.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining rare-event simulation with generative AI provides efficient, reusable resilience assessment tools for digital twins.

papers.title: Online Riemannian Gradient Descent for Quantum State Tomography with Matrix Product Operators
papers.summary: Matrix product operators (MPOs) provide a scalable approach for quantum state tomography (QST) by offering a compact representation of many-body mixed states with limited entanglement, using only a number of parameters that scales polynomially with the system size. In this paper, we study QST for quantum density matrices that can be represented by MPOs. We first derive an equivalent characterization of Hermiticity in terms of the MPO core tensors and show that the coefficient tensor of an MPO under the Pauli or generalized Gell-Mann basis admits a real-valued low tensor-train (TT) rank structure. This establishes an explicit connection between MPO-based QST and noisy low-rank tensor completion. Motivated by this formulation, we develop an online Riemannian gradient descent (oRGD) algorithm that sequentially incorporates measurement data during the reconstruction process. With a proper initialization, we prove that oRGD converges linearly to the target MPO and succeeds with a number of distinct measurement settings that scales quadratically with the system size. As a byproduct, our analysis also yields a significantly improved sample complexity bound for the low TT rank tensor completion task. Furthermore, we propose a tailored spectral initialization method and establish its theoretical guarantee. Numerical experiments on several classes of quantum states validate the effectiveness and scalability of the proposed method.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种在线黎曼梯度下降算法，用于矩阵乘积算子表示的量子态层析成像，并证明了线性收敛性和改进的样本复杂度。
ai.motivation: 量子态层析成像（QST）对于大规模量子系统计算成本高昂，而矩阵乘积算子（MPO）提供了一种紧凑表示。现有方法通常需要大量测量数据，且缺乏在线处理能力。
ai.method: 首先推导MPO核心张量的厄米性等价表征，并证明其在Pauli或广义Gell-Mann基下的系数张量具有实值低张量列秩结构。然后提出在线黎曼梯度下降（oRGD）算法，顺序整合测量数据，并设计谱初始化方法。
ai.result: 理论证明oRGD线性收敛到目标MPO，所需不同测量设置数量与系统大小成二次关系；数值实验验证了有效性和可扩展性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效、可扩展的量子态重建方法，尤其适用于中等规模纠缠的混合态，并支持在线数据流处理。

idea_spark.idea: 利用MPO的实值低秩结构，将QST转化为在线低秩张量补全问题，并设计黎曼流形上的梯度下降算法。
idea_spark.risk: 算法依赖于MPO的低纠缠假设，对于高纠缠态可能失效；在线更新可能引入累积误差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从MPO的厄米性表征出发，将量子问题映射到经典张量补全，启发跨领域算法设计。

en.tldr: Proposes an online Riemannian gradient descent algorithm for quantum state tomography with matrix product operators, proving linear convergence and improved sample complexity.
en.motivation: Quantum state tomography (QST) is computationally expensive for large systems; matrix product operators (MPOs) offer a compact representation. Existing methods often require many measurements and lack online processing capability.
en.method: First derives an equivalent characterization of Hermiticity for MPO core tensors and shows that the coefficient tensor under Pauli or generalized Gell-Mann basis has a real-valued low tensor-train rank structure. Then proposes an online Riemannian gradient descent (oRGD) algorithm that sequentially incorporates measurement data, along with a tailored spectral initialization.
en.result: Theoretically proves that oRGD converges linearly to the target MPO, requiring a number of distinct measurement settings that scales quadratically with system size; numerical experiments validate effectiveness and scalability.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient and scalable method for reconstructing quantum states, particularly mixed states with limited entanglement, and supports online data streaming.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the real-valued low-rank structure of MPOs to cast QST as an online low-rank tensor completion problem and design a Riemannian gradient descent algorithm on the manifold.
idea_spark.risk: The algorithm relies on the low-entanglement assumption of MPOs, which may fail for highly entangled states; online updates may accumulate errors.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from the Hermiticity characterization of MPOs, mapping the quantum problem to classical tensor completion inspires cross-domain algorithm design.

papers.title: Finding accurate eigenvalues and eigenvectors of positive semi-definite matrices given a subspace
papers.summary: We revisit a classical problem in numerical linear algebra: given an $k$-dimensional subspace $\mathcal{Q}$ that approximates the leading eigenspace of an $n\times n$ positive semi-definite matrix $A$, the goal is to extract high-accuracy eigenvalues. The Rayleigh-Ritz (RR) method is the standard algorithm for the task, which has been shown to be optimal in several ways (when $A$ is symmetric, not necessarily positive semi-definite $A\succeq 0$). In this paper, we show that when $A \succeq 0$, alternative methods can outperform RR, while having the same computational complexity, that is, the main cost is in computing $AQ$, plus an $O(nk^2)$ term. In particular, we advocate the use of Nystr{ö}m's method, showing that the approximate eigenvalues always have higher accuracy than RR, and the improvement can be arbitrarily large. The difference is significant, especially when $A$ has a fast-decaying spectrum. A similar improvement is numerically observed for the purpose of approximating the leading eigenvectors. In contrast, when the target eigenvalues are the trailing ones, the situation is reversed, and the Nystr{ö}m method performs poorly; we suggest a remedy for this situation.

ai.tldr: 针对正半定矩阵，提出Nyström方法在给定子空间下比标准Rayleigh-Ritz方法获得更精确的特征值和特征向量，尤其在谱快速衰减时优势显著。
ai.motivation: Rayleigh-Ritz方法虽被证明对对称矩阵最优，但对正半定矩阵未必最优，需探索更优算法。
ai.method: 采用Nyström方法替代Rayleigh-Ritz，计算复杂度相同（主要代价为AQ和O(nk²)），但特征值精度更高。
ai.result: Nyström方法特征值精度始终优于Rayleigh-Ritz，且差距可任意大；对前导特征向量也有类似改进；但对尾端特征值效果差，并给出了补救方案。
ai.help_to_user: 为需要高精度特征值/特征向量计算的用户（如谱聚类、PCA）提供更优的算法选择。

idea_spark.idea: 将Nyström方法用于核矩阵或协方差矩阵的特征提取，可能提升机器学习模型效率。
idea_spark.risk: 尾端特征值场景下性能差，需结合补救策略。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用谱衰减特性设计自适应子空间方法，平衡精度与计算成本。

idea_spark.risk: 尾端特征值场景下性能差，需结合补救策略。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用谱衰减特性设计自适应子空间方法，平衡精度与计算成本。

en.tldr: For positive semi-definite matrices, the Nyström method yields more accurate eigenvalues and eigenvectors than the standard Rayleigh-Ritz method given a subspace, especially when the spectrum decays rapidly.
en.motivation: Rayleigh-Ritz is optimal for symmetric matrices but not necessarily for positive semi-definite ones; better alternatives may exist.
en.method: Use Nyström method instead of Rayleigh-Ritz with same computational cost (dominated by AQ and O(nk²)), achieving higher eigenvalue accuracy.
en.result: Nyström eigenvalues are always more accurate than Rayleigh-Ritz, with arbitrarily large improvements; similar gains for leading eigenvectors; poor for trailing eigenvalues, with a remedy proposed.
en.help_to_user: Provides a better algorithm for users needing high-accuracy eigenvalues/vectors, e.g., in spectral clustering or PCA.

idea_spark.idea: Use Nyström for kernel or covariance matrix feature extraction to improve machine learning efficiency.
idea_spark.risk: Performs poorly for trailing eigenvalues; requires remedial strategies.
idea_spark.inspiration: Design adaptive subspace methods leveraging spectral decay to balance accuracy and cost.

papers.title: Entropy and Distributed Source Coding of Connected Soft Random Geometric Graphs
papers.summary: We consider the distributed compression of Soft Random Geometric Graphs (SRGGs) above the connectivity threshold. We establish the Slepian-Wolf rate region for the SRGG in the setting where there are a finite number of encoders compressing sections of the graph independently. To do so, we prove novel limit theorems and asymptotic equipartition properties for the SRGG and its entropy, which allow us to use random binning techniques for distributed compression.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了连通阈值以上的软随机几何图（SRGG）的分布式压缩问题，建立了有限编码器独立压缩图部分时的Slepian-Wolf速率区域。
ai.motivation: 为软随机几何图这类复杂网络模型提供分布式压缩的理论基础。
ai.method: 证明了SRGG及其熵的新极限定理和渐近等分性质，并利用随机装箱技术实现分布式压缩。
ai.result: 得到了SRGG在有限编码器独立压缩场景下的Slepian-Wolf速率区域。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解随机几何图在分布式信息处理中的压缩极限。

idea_spark.idea: 将随机装箱与图结构熵分析结合，设计更高效的分布式压缩协议。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖于连通阈值以上的假设，实际图可能不满足该条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑非连通或动态变化的随机几何图，扩展分布式压缩框架。

en.tldr: This paper studies distributed compression of Soft Random Geometric Graphs (SRGGs) above the connectivity threshold, establishing the Slepian-Wolf rate region for independent compression by a finite number of encoders.
en.motivation: To provide a theoretical foundation for distributed compression of complex network models such as SRGGs.
en.method: Novel limit theorems and asymptotic equipartition properties for SRGGs and their entropy are proved, enabling random binning techniques for distributed compression.
en.result: The Slepian-Wolf rate region for SRGGs under independent compression by a finite number of encoders is obtained.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand compression limits of random geometric graphs in distributed information processing.

idea_spark.idea: Combine random binning with graph structure entropy analysis to design more efficient distributed compression protocols.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results rely on the connectivity threshold assumption, which may not hold for practical graphs.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider non-connected or dynamic random geometric graphs to extend the distributed compression framework.

papers.title: Small values of signed harmonic sums and logarithmic means of multiplicative functions
papers.summary: We construct sequences $\{a_n\}_{n\in\mathbb{N}}\in\{-1,1\}^{\mathbb{N}}$ with small values of signed harmonic sums \[ \sum_{n\in\mathcal{A}\cap[1,N]}\frac{a_n}{n}, \] for any reasonably dense subsets $\mathcal{A}\subset\mathbb{N}.$ We apply these methods to further construct completely multiplicative functions $f:\mathbb{N}\to\{-1,1\}$ with unusually small logarithmic partial sums, that is, \[ \sum_{n \leq N}\frac{f(n)}{n} \ll \exp\left(-c_0 \frac{N^{1/3}}{(\log N)^{1/3}} \right) \] holds for infinitely many $N\to\infty$. The proofs combine careful analysis of the small-scale distribution of random harmonic sums over subsets of $\mathbb{N}$, together with deterministic inductive arguments inspired by the ``anatomy" of integers.

ai.tldr: 构造符号调和和与乘法函数对数部分和极小的序列。
ai.motivation: 研究乘法函数对数部分和的下界，探索整数结构对和值的影响。
ai.method: 结合随机调和和在子集上的小尺度分布分析与基于整数解剖的确定性归纳论证。
ai.result: 对任意稠密子集构造出符号调和和极小的序列，并得到乘法函数对数部分和指数级小的无穷序列。
ai.help_to_user: 提供构造极小部分和序列的通用方法，可用于数论中相关极值问题的研究。

idea_spark.idea: 利用整数解剖的归纳结构，将大范围求和问题分解为小尺度随机控制。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖特定子集密度条件，可能不适用于稀疏子集。
idea_spark.inspiration: 整数解剖的归纳思想可启发其他数论极值构造问题。

zh.tldr: 构造符号调和和与乘法函数对数部分和极小的序列。
zh.motivation: 研究乘法函数对数部分和的下界，探索整数结构对和值的影响。
zh.method: 结合随机调和和在子集上的小尺度分布分析与基于整数解剖的确定性归纳论证。

idea_spark.inspiration: 整数解剖的归纳思想可启发其他数论极值构造问题。

en.tldr: Construct sequences with extremely small signed harmonic sums and multiplicative functions with unusually small logarithmic partial sums.
en.motivation: To study lower bounds for logarithmic partial sums of multiplicative functions and the influence of integer structure.
en.method: Combines small-scale distribution analysis of random harmonic sums over subsets with deterministic inductive arguments inspired by the anatomy of integers.
en.result: For any reasonably dense subset, sequences with small signed harmonic sums are constructed; multiplicative functions with exponentially small logarithmic partial sums are obtained for infinitely many N.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general method to construct sequences with minimal partial sums, applicable to extremal problems in number theory.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose large-scale summation into small-scale stochastic control using the inductive structure of integer anatomy.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on specific density conditions of subsets and may not work for sparse subsets.
idea_spark.inspiration: The inductive idea from integer anatomy can inspire other extremal construction problems in number theory.

papers.title: First server effect on the expected number of games in tennis
papers.summary: We show that information on the first server influences the expected total number of games and margin in a tennis match under the standard assumption that each player's serve point win probability remains constant, and identify the exact regions, in terms of these probabilities, in which this effect is non-negligible. We confirm numerically that this effect is bounded by at most one game at both the set and match level.   We complement the analysis with an empirical comparison on professional match data, illustrating the adequacy of the constant-probability assumption for modelling the total number of games.

ai.tldr: 研究显示，在网球比赛中，先发球信息会影响预期总比赛局数和分差，且该影响在局和盘级别最多为一局。
ai.motivation: 探索先发球信息对网球比赛总局数期望的影响，并验证恒定概率假设的适用性。
ai.method: 基于恒定发球得分概率假设进行理论分析，确定影响显著的区域，并用职业比赛数据进行数值验证。
ai.result: 先发球效应在局和盘级别最多影响一局，恒定概率假设能较好地拟合实际数据。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解网球比赛中发球顺序对比赛进程的量化影响，为赛事预测和策略分析提供参考。

idea_spark.idea: 结合实时发球得分概率动态更新，构建更精确的比赛局数预测模型。
idea_spark.risk: 实际比赛中发球得分概率可能随时间变化，恒定假设在长盘或高压情境下可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用类似思路分析羽毛球、排球等交替发球项目的比赛长度分布。

idea_spark.idea: 结合实时发球得分概率动态更新，构建更精确的比赛局数预测模型。
idea_spark.risk: 实际比赛中发球得分概率可能随时间变化，恒定假设在长盘或高压情境下可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用类似思路分析羽毛球、排球等交替发球项目的比赛长度分布。

en.tldr: Information on the first server influences the expected total number of games and margin in tennis, with an effect bounded by at most one game per set or match.
en.motivation: To investigate how first-server information affects expected game count and to validate the constant-probability assumption.
en.method: Theoretical analysis under constant serve-win probabilities, identifying regions of non-negligible effect, complemented by numerical and empirical validation on professional data.
en.result: The first-server effect is bounded by one game at both set and match levels; the constant-probability assumption fits empirical data well.
en.help_to_user: Quantifies the impact of serving order on tennis match length, aiding in match prediction and strategy.

idea_spark.idea: Develop a dynamic model that updates serve-win probabilities in real time for more accurate game-count predictions.
idea_spark.risk: Serve-win probabilities may vary during a match, especially in tiebreaks or high-pressure points, challenging the constant assumption.
idea_spark.inspiration: Analyze game-length distributions in badminton or volleyball using similar first-server effect reasoning.

papers.title: Rethinking Local Learning: A Cheaper and Faster Recipe for LLM Post-Training
papers.summary: LLM post-training typically propagates task gradients through the full depth of the model. Although this end-to-end structure is simple and general, it couples task adaptation to full-depth activation storage, long-range backward dependencies and direct task-gradient access to pretrained representations. We argue that this full-depth backward coupling can be unnecessarily expensive and intrusive, particularly when post-training supervision is much narrower than pre-training. To this end, we propose \textbf{LoPT}: Local-Learning Post-Training, a simple post-training strategy that makes gradient reach an explicit design choice. LoPT places a single gradient boundary at the transformer midpoint: the second-half block learns from the task objective, while the first-half block is updated by a lightweight feature-reconstruction objective to preserve useful representations and maintain interface compatibility. LoPT shortens the task-induced backward path while limiting direct interference from narrow task gradients on early-layer representations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LoPT achieves competitive performance with lower memory cost, higher training efficiency and better retention of pretrained capabilities. Our code is available at: https://github.com/HumyuShi/LoPT

ai.tldr: 提出LoPT方法，在LLM后训练中通过设置梯度边界，仅更新后半部分模型，前半部分用轻量特征重建目标保持表示，降低内存和计算成本。
ai.motivation: 传统端到端后训练需要全深度反向传播，内存和计算开销大，且窄任务梯度可能干扰预训练表示。
ai.method: 在Transformer中点设置梯度边界：后半部分学习任务目标，前半部分通过特征重建目标更新，缩短反向路径并限制干扰。
ai.result: LoPT在保持竞争性能的同时，降低内存成本、提高训练效率，并更好保留预训练能力。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种更便宜、更快的LLM后训练方案，适合资源受限场景。

idea_spark.idea: 探索在模型不同层设置多个梯度边界，或动态调整边界位置。
idea_spark.risk: 梯度边界可能限制任务特定信息的传播，影响复杂任务性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受局部学习启发，将反向传播解耦为局部模块，减少依赖。

en.tldr: Proposes LoPT, a post-training strategy that places a gradient boundary at the transformer midpoint, updating only the second half with task objective and the first half with feature reconstruction, reducing memory and computation.
en.motivation: Traditional end-to-end post-training requires full-depth backpropagation, incurring high memory and compute costs, and narrow task gradients may interfere with pretrained representations.
en.method: Set a gradient boundary at the transformer midpoint: the second half learns from task objective, the first half is updated via a lightweight feature-reconstruction objective, shortening backward path and limiting interference.
en.result: LoPT achieves competitive performance with lower memory cost, higher training efficiency, and better retention of pretrained capabilities.
en.help_to_user: Provides a cheaper and faster recipe for LLM post-training, suitable for resource-constrained settings.

idea_spark.idea: Explore multiple gradient boundaries at different layers or dynamically adjust boundary positions.
idea_spark.risk: Gradient boundaries may limit propagation of task-specific information, potentially harming performance on complex tasks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by local learning, decoupling backpropagation into local modules to reduce dependencies.

papers.title: On the Complexity of Minimum Riesz s-Energy Subset Selection in Euclidean and Ultrametric Spaces
papers.summary: We study the computational complexity of exact cardinality-constrained minimum Riesz $s$-energy subset selection in finite metric spaces: given $n$ points, select $k<n$ points of minimum Riesz $s$-energy. The objective sums inverse-power pair interactions and therefore promotes well-separated subsets; as $s$ becomes large, it increasingly approaches a bottleneck criterion governed by the closest selected pair, linking it to minimum pairwise distance (MPD). Building on the general-metric NP-hardness result of Pereverdieva et al. (2025), we prove that NP-hardness persists for point sets in the Euclidean plane when $s$ is part of the input. In contrast, finite ultrametric spaces form an exact tractable regime: on rooted binary ultrametric trees with $n$ leaves, an optimal size-$k$ subset can be computed by dynamic programming in $O(nk^2)$ time. We also discuss the ordered one-dimensional Euclidean case, where the classical MPD objective admits simple dynamic programming, but the additive Riesz energy does not appear to allow the same state compression. Finally, we explain why one natural route to fixed-$s$ Euclidean hardness does not close: Fowler-style 3SAT gadgets, together with zeta-function bounds for far-field interactions, show why this approach still requires an exponent depending on $k$. Together, these results provide a compact complexity landscape for a natural diversity or dispersion objective, distinguishing Euclidean hardness, ultrametric tractability, and the ordered one-dimensional case.

ai.tldr: 研究了在有限度量空间中精确基数约束的最小Riesz s-能量子集选择的计算复杂性，证明了欧几里得平面中当s作为输入时NP困难性成立，而超度量空间可通过动态规划在O(nk²)时间内求解。
ai.motivation: 理解不同度量空间下基于成对逆幂交互的分散性子集选择问题的计算复杂性边界。
ai.method: 基于Pereverdieva等人的一般度量NP困难结果，通过构造归约证明欧几里得平面NP困难性；对超度量树设计动态规划算法；分析一维有序情况并讨论Fowler风格3SAT方法的局限性。
ai.result: 欧几里得平面中s作为输入时问题NP困难；超度量二叉树上存在O(nk²)时间的最优算法；一维有序情况下经典最小成对距离可简单DP，但Riesz能量不允许相同状态压缩。
ai.help_to_user: 为选择分散性子集的实际算法设计提供复杂性理论指导，区分可解与困难情形。

idea_spark.idea: 探索在近似算法或参数化算法中利用超度量结构来逼近欧几里得情形。
idea_spark.risk: 欧几里得NP困难性证明依赖于s作为输入，固定s时复杂性可能不同。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将度量空间分类为可解与困难类，启发设计混合算法或启发式方法。

en.tldr: Studies the computational complexity of exact cardinality-constrained minimum Riesz s-energy subset selection in finite metric spaces, proving NP-hardness in the Euclidean plane when s is part of the input, while ultrametric spaces admit O(nk²) dynamic programming.
en.motivation: To understand the computational complexity boundaries of dispersion subset selection problems based on pairwise inverse-power interactions across different metric spaces.
en.method: Builds on the general-metric NP-hardness result of Pereverdieva et al., proves Euclidean NP-hardness via reduction; designs dynamic programming for ultrametric trees; analyzes the ordered one-dimensional case and discusses limitations of Fowler-style 3SAT gadgets.
en.result: NP-hardness persists in the Euclidean plane when s is part of the input; optimal size-k subsets on rooted binary ultrametric trees can be computed in O(nk²) time; the ordered one-dimensional case does not allow the same state compression as for the minimum pairwise distance objective.
en.help_to_user: Provides complexity-theoretic guidance for designing algorithms for selecting dispersed subsets, distinguishing tractable and hard cases.

idea_spark.idea: Explore approximation or parameterized algorithms that leverage ultrametric structure to approximate Euclidean cases.
idea_spark.risk: The Euclidean NP-hardness proof relies on s being part of the input; complexity for fixed s may differ.
idea_spark.inspiration: Classifying metric spaces into tractable and hard classes inspires the design of hybrid algorithms or heuristics.

papers.title: Fractional Vector Calculus and the Fractional Maxwell's Equations
papers.summary: We consider a fractional variant of Maxwell's equations, where the electric and magnetic fields are modeled as two-point fields. To formulate the system, we introduce a fractional curl operator that is compatible with the fractional divergence operator, ensuring the divergence-free condition. A key ingredient is a projection map $Π$ that reduces two-point fields to one-point fields. We also define a new fractional Sobolev space whose elements enjoy a fractional Helmholtz decomposition and observe that the projection $Π$ is a bijection in this space, which allows us to reformulate the problem entirely in terms of one-point fields. We then prove the well-posedness of the equations in one-point fields in weighted fractional Sobolev spaces, and deduce a corresponding well-posedness result for the two-points fractional Maxwell system. This constitutes a first necessary step towards the resolution of a scattering inverse problem for the fractional Maxwell's equations, which will be the topic of future work.

ai.tldr: 本文提出分数阶麦克斯韦方程组，引入分数阶旋度算子和投影映射，在分数阶Sobolev空间中证明其适定性，为后续散射反问题奠定基础。
ai.motivation: 经典麦克斯韦方程组无法描述某些非局部电磁现象，分数阶微积分提供更一般的框架，但缺乏自洽的分数阶麦克斯韦系统。
ai.method: 定义与分数阶散度算子兼容的分数阶旋度算子，引入投影映射将两点场约化到一点场，构造新的分数阶Sobolev空间并证明分数阶亥姆霍兹分解。
ai.result: 在加权分数阶Sobolev空间中证明一点场分数阶麦克斯韦方程组的适定性，并推导出两点场系统的相应适定性结果。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解分数阶微积分在电磁理论中的严格数学框架，以及如何建立适定的分数阶偏微分方程系统。

idea_spark.idea: 利用投影映射和分数阶Sobolev空间，将分数阶麦克斯韦系统转化为经典形式，简化分析。
idea_spark.risk: 分数阶算子的物理意义尚不明确，可能限制实际应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将分数阶麦克斯韦方程用于描述超材料或复杂介质中的非局部电磁响应。

en.tldr: This paper proposes fractional Maxwell's equations, introduces a fractional curl operator and a projection map, proves well-posedness in fractional Sobolev spaces, and lays the groundwork for a scattering inverse problem.
en.motivation: Classical Maxwell's equations cannot capture certain nonlocal electromagnetic phenomena; fractional calculus offers a more general framework but lacks a self-consistent fractional Maxwell system.
en.method: Define a fractional curl operator compatible with the fractional divergence operator, introduce a projection map reducing two-point fields to one-point fields, construct a new fractional Sobolev space, and prove a fractional Helmholtz decomposition.
en.result: Prove well-posedness of the one-point field fractional Maxwell equations in weighted fractional Sobolev spaces, and deduce corresponding well-posedness for the two-point fractional Maxwell system.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the rigorous mathematical framework of fractional calculus in electromagnetism and how to establish well-posed fractional PDE systems.

idea_spark.idea: Use projection maps and fractional Sobolev spaces to reformulate fractional Maxwell systems into classical forms, simplifying analysis.
idea_spark.risk: The physical interpretation of fractional operators remains unclear, potentially limiting practical applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying fractional Maxwell equations to model nonlocal electromagnetic responses in metamaterials or complex media.

papers.title: Stochastic Optimal Linear Quadratic Controls with A Recursive Cost Functional in Infinite Horizon
papers.summary: This paper is concerned with a stochastic linear quadratic (LQ, for short) control problem with a recursive cost functional in an infinite horizon. A main difficult is well-posedness of the BSDE in $L^1$ and in infinite horizon. A notion of weighted $L^2$-stabilizability is introduced and characterized, which will lead to an equivalence of the optimal control problem having recursive cost functional with a classical LQ problem. Then all the results of classical problems for open-loop and closed-loop solvability of such an LQ problem can be translated, in terms of the solvability of a forward-backward stochastic differential equation and that of algebraic Riccati equation. Finally, the nonhomogeneous is discussed.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了无限时域中具有递归成本泛函的随机线性二次最优控制问题，通过引入加权L2-可稳性概念，将问题转化为经典LQ问题，并利用前向-后向随机微分方程和代数Riccati方程的可解性给出了开环和闭环可解性条件。
ai.motivation: 现有随机LQ控制研究多针对有限时域或非递归成本，无限时域递归成本泛函的LQ问题因BSDE在L1空间和无限时域上的适定性困难而尚未解决。
ai.method: 引入并刻画加权L2-可稳性，将递归成本LQ问题等价于经典LQ问题；利用FBSDE和代数Riccati方程的可解性推导开环与闭环可解性条件。
ai.result: 建立了递归成本LQ问题与经典LQ问题的等价性，给出了开环和闭环可解性的充要条件，并讨论了非齐次情形。
ai.help_to_user: 为无限时域递归成本随机LQ控制提供了完整的可解性理论框架，可用于金融、工程等领域的长期最优控制问题建模。

idea_spark.idea: 将递归成本LQ问题转化为经典LQ问题的等价性思路，可启发其他非标准成本泛函控制问题的简化方法。
idea_spark.risk: 加权L2-可稳性的具体构造可能依赖于系统参数，实际应用中需验证条件是否满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用BSDE在L1空间的适定性处理无限时域递归成本，为处理更一般的路径依赖成本提供了新视角。

idea_spark.risk: 加权L2-可稳性的具体构造可能依赖于系统参数，实际应用中需验证条件是否满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用BSDE在L1空间的适定性处理无限时域递归成本，为处理更一般的路径依赖成本提供了新视角。

en.tldr: This paper studies stochastic linear quadratic optimal control with a recursive cost functional in infinite horizon, introduces weighted L2-stabilizability to transform the problem into a classical LQ problem, and characterizes open-loop and closed-loop solvability via forward-backward SDE and algebraic Riccati equation.
en.motivation: Existing stochastic LQ control results mainly focus on finite horizon or non-recursive costs; the infinite-horizon recursive cost case remains open due to well-posedness issues of BSDE in L1 and infinite horizon.
en.method: Introduce and characterize weighted L2-stabilizability, which establishes an equivalence between the recursive-cost LQ problem and a classical LQ problem; then derive solvability conditions via FBSDE and algebraic Riccati equation.
en.result: Equivalence between recursive-cost LQ and classical LQ is established; necessary and sufficient conditions for open-loop and closed-loop solvability are given; the nonhomogeneous case is also discussed.
en.help_to_user: Provides a complete solvability framework for infinite-horizon recursive-cost stochastic LQ control, applicable to long-term optimal control problems in finance and engineering.

idea_spark.idea: The equivalence transformation from recursive-cost LQ to classical LQ may inspire simplification methods for other non-standard cost functionals.
idea_spark.risk: The explicit construction of weighted L2-stabilizability depends on system parameters; practical verification of conditions may be nontrivial.
idea_spark.inspiration: Handling infinite-horizon recursive costs via BSDE in L1 offers a new perspective for more general path-dependent cost functionals.

papers.title: Morphology-Guided Cross-Task Coupling for Joint Building Height and Footprint Estimation
papers.summary: Building height (BH) and building footprint (BF) jointly describe the vertical and horizontal extent of the built environment and are required inputs for urban climate, disaster-risk, and population-mapping models. The two parameters are coupled through floor-area-ratio (FAR) constraints, yet remote-sensing approaches typically treat them as independent regression targets. We argue that explicitly encoding this cross-task coupling is more impactful than further refining individual encoders, and propose MorphoFormer, a joint BH/BF estimation framework built around two complementary mechanisms: (i) a BF-Guided Task Decoder (BGTD) that gates the height branch via cross-attention on a footprint-derived morphology context, and (ii) a Morphology Consistency Loss (MCL) that supervises a height-from-footprint surrogate against the ground-truth BH, indirectly forcing the BF feature to encode height-correlated structure. The encoder is a single-stage Swin backbone fed by Sentinel-1 SAR, Sentinel-2 multispectral, and DEM inputs, trained and evaluated on a geo-blocked split of 54 cities. Against a Swin-MTL baseline at identical receptive field, MorphoFormer reduces BH test RMSE from 3.39 to 3.15 m (R^2 improves 0.62 -> 0.67) with BF R^2 stable at 0.80. Controlled ablations at identical capacity attribute most of this 0.24 m improvement to the two proposed mechanisms: removing BGTD raises BH RMSE by 0.11 m and removing MCL raises it by 0.11 m, with the residual approximately 0.02 m falling within the noise floor of encoder-side variations. Because both mechanisms act on cross-task representations rather than pixels, the design carries no intrinsic dependence on input resolution.

ai.tldr: 提出MorphoFormer框架，通过形态引导的跨任务耦合机制联合估计建筑高度和建筑足迹，在54个城市数据集上显著提升高度估计精度。
ai.motivation: 建筑高度和建筑足迹通过容积率约束耦合，但现有遥感方法通常独立回归两者，忽略了内在关联。
ai.method: 基于Swin骨干网络，设计BF引导任务解码器（BGTD）通过足迹形态上下文交叉注意力门控高度分支，以及形态一致性损失（MCL）监督足迹特征编码高度相关结构。
ai.result: 相比Swin-MTL基线，高度RMSE从3.39米降至3.15米，R²从0.62提升至0.67，足迹R²稳定在0.80。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需依赖输入分辨率的联合估计框架，可应用于城市气候、灾害风险和人口建模。

idea_spark.idea: 利用形态一致性损失间接监督特征编码，避免直接监督带来的特征冗余。
idea_spark.risk: 形态上下文定义可能依赖特定城市特征，泛化至不同建筑风格区域需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从物理约束（容积率）出发设计网络结构，而非仅优化编码器，启发其他领域利用领域知识增强多任务学习。

en.tldr: Proposes MorphoFormer, a joint building height and footprint estimation framework with morphology-guided cross-task coupling, achieving significant height accuracy improvement on 54 cities.
en.motivation: Building height and footprint are coupled via floor-area-ratio constraints, but existing remote sensing methods treat them independently.
en.method: Uses a Swin backbone with a BF-Guided Task Decoder that gates the height branch via cross-attention on footprint morphology, and a Morphology Consistency Loss that supervises footprint features to encode height-correlated structure.
en.result: Compared to Swin-MTL baseline, height RMSE reduced from 3.39 m to 3.15 m, R² improved from 0.62 to 0.67, while footprint R² remains stable at 0.80.
en.help_to_user: Provides a resolution-independent joint estimation framework applicable to urban climate, disaster risk, and population modeling.

idea_spark.idea: Use morphology consistency loss to indirectly supervise feature encoding, avoiding feature redundancy from direct supervision.
idea_spark.risk: Morphology context definition may depend on specific city characteristics, requiring validation across diverse architectural styles.
idea_spark.inspiration: Designing network structure from physical constraints (floor-area-ratio) rather than solely optimizing encoders inspires leveraging domain knowledge for multi-task learning in other fields.

papers.title: Non-uniqueness for a differential equation and a proof by ChatGPT
papers.summary: Let $f(t,x),M(t,x)\in C([0,1]^2)$ with $M(t,x)>0$. We consider differential equations of the form \[   \frac{\partial f}{\partial t}(t,x)=\frac{M(t,x)f(t,x)-M(t,0)f(t,0)}{x},\quad x>0. \] For a fixed positive weight $M$, we ask whether the condition $f(0,x)=0$ forces $f\equiv 0$. We show the answer is negative for smooth functions: there exist $f(t,x),M(t,x)\in C^{\infty}([0,1]^2)$ with $f(0,x)=0$, $f(t,0)\not\equiv 0$, and $M(t,x)>0$ satisfying the above equation. However, we show that for a large class of $M(t,x)$, the equation does have uniqueness. We relate this to uniqueness/non-uniqueness theorems for weighted Laplace transforms. A key example originated in an output by ChatGPT-5.5-Pro, and we include a discussion of its output as well as a complete proof.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了一类带权重的微分方程在零初始条件下解的唯一性问题，发现光滑函数情形下解可以不唯一，但对一大类权重函数唯一性成立，并讨论了ChatGPT生成的例子和证明。
ai.motivation: 探索特定微分方程在零初始条件下是否强制解为零，揭示非唯一性现象及其与加权拉普拉斯变换的关系。
ai.method: 通过构造光滑反例证明非唯一性，同时利用加权拉普拉斯变换的唯一性定理给出充分条件。
ai.result: 存在光滑函数使得方程在零初始条件下有非零解，但对一大类权重函数唯一性成立。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解微分方程解的唯一性条件，以及AI生成数学内容的可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用AI生成的反例作为起点，系统研究非唯一性发生的权重函数特征。
idea_spark.risk: AI生成的数学证明可能包含逻辑漏洞，需人工严格验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将AI作为数学发现工具，结合传统分析技术探索方程性质。

en.tldr: This paper studies uniqueness for a weighted differential equation under zero initial condition, showing non-uniqueness for smooth functions but uniqueness for a large class of weights, with a ChatGPT-generated example and proof.
en.motivation: To investigate whether zero initial condition forces the solution to be zero, revealing non-uniqueness and its connection to weighted Laplace transforms.
en.method: Constructing smooth counterexamples for non-uniqueness and applying uniqueness theorems for weighted Laplace transforms.
en.result: There exist smooth functions satisfying the equation with zero initial condition but non-zero solution; uniqueness holds for a large class of weights.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand uniqueness conditions for differential equations and the reliability of AI-generated mathematical content.

idea_spark.idea: Use AI-generated counterexamples as a starting point to systematically characterize weight functions leading to non-uniqueness.
idea_spark.risk: AI-generated proofs may contain logical gaps and require rigorous human verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage AI as a mathematical discovery tool combined with traditional analysis to explore equation properties.

papers.title: Blow-Up Criteria and Weak--Strong Uniqueness for Compressible Fluid--Viscoelastic Shell Interactions
papers.summary: Existence and uniqueness of strong solutions to a barotropic compressible fluid--viscoelastic shell interaction system have recently been established on a finite time interval. A natural question is whether such solutions can be continued globally. In this work, we derive a continuation criterion for this coupled system. Our analysis is based on an energy estimate at the level of material acceleration, derived under Serrin-type and Beale--Kato--Majda-type control assumptions. While in the incompressible setting, such control is sufficient to prevent finite-time blow-up, in the compressible regime it does not by itself ensure propagation of the full regularity required for strong solutions. To obtain a genuine continuation criterion, we impose a Beale--Kato--Majda Lipschitz-type control on the density and velocity gradients with stronger time integrability. In combination with the control framework underlying the acceleration estimate, we close a higher-order energy estimate and thereby prevent loss of strong-solution regularity. Consequently, the solution can be extended beyond a potential blow-up time, provided that the corresponding control norms remain finite. We further establish a weak-strong uniqueness principle for the system under the above conditional regularity criterion.

ai.tldr: 针对可压缩流体-粘弹性壳相互作用系统，推导了强解的延拓准则和弱-强唯一性原理。
ai.motivation: 已有强解存在唯一性结果仅限于有限时间区间，自然问题是如何将解延拓到全局。
ai.method: 基于物质加速度的能量估计，结合Serrin型和Beale-Kato-Majda型控制假设，并引入密度和速度梯度的更强时间可积性条件，闭合高阶能量估计。
ai.result: 在控制范数有限的前提下，强解可越过潜在爆破时间延拓；同时建立了弱-强唯一性原理。
ai.help_to_user: 为可压缩流-结构相互作用系统的全局适定性分析提供了理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 探索在更弱正则性条件下（如仅密度梯度有界）是否仍能获得延拓准则。
idea_spark.risk: 可压缩情形下密度振荡可能破坏能量估计的闭合，需要更精细的时空控制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴不可压缩流中Serrin准则的推广思路，但需处理可压缩性带来的额外非线性项。

en.tldr: Derived continuation criteria and weak-strong uniqueness for strong solutions of a compressible fluid-viscoelastic shell interaction system.
en.motivation: Existing well-posedness results are limited to finite time intervals; the natural question is whether solutions can be extended globally.
en.method: Based on an energy estimate at the level of material acceleration under Serrin-type and Beale-Kato-Majda-type control, combined with stronger time integrability on density and velocity gradients to close a higher-order energy estimate.
en.result: Strong solutions can be extended beyond a potential blow-up time provided the control norms remain finite; a weak-strong uniqueness principle is also established.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical tools for global well-posedness analysis of compressible fluid-structure interaction systems.

idea_spark.idea: Explore whether continuation criteria can be obtained under weaker regularity conditions, e.g., only bounded density gradient.
idea_spark.risk: In the compressible regime, density oscillations may prevent closure of energy estimates, requiring more refined spatiotemporal control.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by generalizations of Serrin's criterion in incompressible flows, but must handle additional nonlinearities due to compressibility.

papers.title: High-Dimensional Statistics: Reflections on Progress and Open Problems
papers.summary: Over the past two decades, the field of high-dimensional statistics has experienced substantial progress, driven largely by technological advances that have dramatically reduced the cost and effort for data collection and storage across a broad range of domains, including biology, medicine, astronomy, and the social and environmental sciences. Modern datasets are increasingly complex, often exhibiting rich dependency, heterogeneity, and other features that challenge traditional statistical methods. In response, high-dimensional statistics has evolved to address more sophisticated estimation and inference problems. This evolution has, in turn, fostered deep connections with and contributions to a wide range of research areas, including optimization, concentration of measure, random matrix theory, information theory, and theoretical computer science. Given the rapid pace of recent developments in high-dimensional statistics, our goal is to synthesize representative advances, highlight common themes and open problems, and point to important works that offer entry points into the field.

ai.tldr: 综述高维统计学的进展、共同主题与开放问题，强调其与优化、随机矩阵理论、信息论和理论计算机科学的交叉。
ai.motivation: 高维数据日益复杂，传统方法面临挑战，需要系统梳理该领域的发展脉络与未解难题。
ai.method: 通过代表性成果的合成、共同主题的提炼以及关键文献的指引，对高维统计学进行综述性分析。
ai.result: 识别出高维统计学与多个相关领域的深度联系，并指出当前的主要开放问题。

en.tldr: A survey of progress, common themes, and open problems in high-dimensional statistics, highlighting its connections with optimization, random matrix theory, information theory, and theoretical computer science.
en.motivation: Modern high-dimensional data are increasingly complex, challenging traditional methods, necessitating a systematic review of the field's developments and unresolved issues.
en.method: Synthesizing representative advances, distilling common themes, and pointing to key works to provide an entry point into high-dimensional statistics.
en.result: Identified deep connections between high-dimensional statistics and multiple related fields, and outlined major open problems.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers quickly grasp core advances, key tools, and future directions in high-dimensional statistics.

idea_spark.idea: Improve covariance estimation in high-dimensional data using random matrix theory.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical assumptions may not match real data distributions, leading to method failure.
idea_spark.inspiration: Revisit sample complexity in high-dimensional statistics from an information-theoretic perspective.

papers.title: Time-Dependent Dynamical Dimensional Transmutation in the $SU(2)$ Gross-Neveu Model with Time-Dependent Interaction Strength
papers.summary: In this work we consider the time-dependent $SU(2)$ Gross-Neveu model, which is a quantum field theory of fermions which interact with each other through spin exchange interaction with time-dependent coupling strength $g(t)$. Using the recently formulated generalized Bethe ansatz framework, we show that the system is integrable provided the time-dependent coupling strength is such that its trajectories in time are exactly same as that of the renormalization group (RG) flow equations corresponding to the static model, where time `$t$' of the time-dependent model is identified with the logarithm of the cutoff `$\ln Λ$' of the static model. In the scaling regime $Λ\rightarrow\infty$, the above relation between time and the logarithm of the cutoff provides a characteristic time scale $t_0$. We analyze the exact time-dependent wavefunction in the case of coupling strength decreasing with time and show that in the adiabatic regime, which corresponds to $t\sim t_0$ for drive rate $α_0=1$, the system exhibits a time-dependent dynamical dimensional transmutation where a time dependent mass gap is generated, which at time $t=t_0+Δt$ is given by $m(Δt)=m_0 e^{-πα_0Δt}$, where $m_0=Λe^{-πα_0 t_0}$. Comparing this with the mass gap of the static model, we identify the adiabatic regime of the time-dependent model with the scaling regime of the static model. In the case of very large time scales $t\gg t_0$ for drive rate $α_0$ or for very fast drive rates $α$ such that $αt \gg α_0t_0$, for any $t<L$, we argue that the system is asymptotically free and approaches the $SU(2)_1$ Wess-Zumino-Novikov-Witten (WZNW) model, which corresponds to the UV fixed point of the $SU(2)$ Gross-Neveu model. Hence we establish that progression of time in the time-dependent model is equivalent to RG flow in the corresponding static model.

ai.tldr: 在时间依赖耦合强度的SU(2) Gross-Neveu模型中，时间演化等价于静态模型的RG流，并在绝热区产生动态维度嬗变和质量隙。
ai.motivation: 探索时间依赖量子场论中维度嬗变的动态实现，并建立时间演化与重整化群流的等价关系。
ai.method: 利用广义Bethe ansatz框架，要求耦合强度的时间轨迹与静态模型RG流方程一致，并分析绝热区波函数。
ai.result: 在绝热区（驱动率α₀=1）产生时间依赖质量隙m(Δt)=m₀ e^{-πα₀Δt}；长时间或快驱动下系统渐近自由，趋近SU(2)₁ WZNW模型。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解时间依赖量子场论中的非平衡动力学和维度嬗变提供精确可解模型。

idea_spark.idea: 利用时间依赖耦合模拟静态模型RG流，实现动态维度嬗变。
idea_spark.risk: 仅适用于特定可积模型，一般场论中可能不成立。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将时间视为RG流参数，为研究非平衡量子场论提供新视角。

en.tldr: In the time-dependent SU(2) Gross-Neveu model, time evolution is equivalent to RG flow of the static model, leading to dynamical dimensional transmutation and mass gap generation in the adiabatic regime.
en.motivation: To explore dynamical dimensional transmutation in time-dependent quantum field theory and establish equivalence between time evolution and RG flow.
en.method: Using the generalized Bethe ansatz, requiring the time-dependent coupling to follow the static RG flow trajectory, and analyzing the wavefunction in the adiabatic regime.
en.result: In the adiabatic regime (drive rate α₀=1), a time-dependent mass gap m(Δt)=m₀ e^{-πα₀Δt} emerges; for long times or fast drives, the system becomes asymptotically free and approaches the SU(2)₁ WZNW model.
en.help_to_user: Provides an exactly solvable model for understanding non-equilibrium dynamics and dimensional transmutation in time-dependent quantum field theory.

idea_spark.idea: Use time-dependent coupling to mimic static RG flow and realize dynamical dimensional transmutation.
idea_spark.risk: Applicable only to specific integrable models; may not hold in generic field theories.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treating time as an RG flow parameter offers a new perspective for studying non-equilibrium quantum field theories.

papers.title: Symmetric Bessmertnyĭ Realizations and Field Extension Problems in Characteristic 2 - A Differential Algebra Approach
papers.summary: We present a short, purely algebraic proof of the Symmetric Bessmertnyĭ Realization Theorem in the characteristic $2$ case recently proved in [EOW26]. Symmetric Bessmertnyĭ realizations are Schur complements of affine linear symmetric matrix pencils, and they arise naturally as state-space representations in linear systems theory. In contrast with the algorithmic approach in [EOW26], we use differential algebra: by defining formal partial derivatives on multivariate rational functions over fields of positive characteristic and considering their corresponding field of constants, we obtain scalar criteria for symmetric and homogeneous symmetric realizability in characteristic $2$, effectively reducing the matrix-valued problem to its diagonal entries. As a consequence, we prove a new theorem on the field extension problem for symmetric and homogeneous symmetric Bessmertnyĭ realizations. Finally, in the scalar case, we identify realizable rational functions with vector spaces over appropriate fields of constants and quantify the abundance of counterexamples in characteristic $2$.

ai.tldr: 本文在特征2情形下，用微分代数方法给出了对称Bessmertnyĭ实现定理的纯代数证明，并解决了相关的域扩张问题。
ai.motivation: 已有算法证明复杂，希望用微分代数简化证明并推广到特征2情形。
ai.method: 在正特征多元有理函数上定义形式偏导和常数域，将矩阵实现问题转化为标量判据。
