en.tldr: We give a short algebraic proof of the Symmetric Bessmertnyĭ Realization Theorem in characteristic 2 using differential algebra, and solve the associated field extension problem.
en.motivation: Existing algorithmic proof is complex; we aim to simplify and extend to characteristic 2 via differential algebra.
en.method: Define formal partial derivatives on multivariate rational functions over fields of positive characteristic and use the field of constants to reduce matrix realizability to scalar criteria.
en.result: Obtain scalar criteria for symmetric and homogeneous symmetric realizability in characteristic 2, prove a new field extension theorem, and characterize scalar realizable functions as vector spaces over constant fields.
en.help_to_user: Provides concise algebraic tools and criteria for state-space representations in linear systems over characteristic 2.

idea_spark.idea: Use formal partial derivatives to construct constant fields, reducing matrix problems to scalar ones.
idea_spark.risk: Formal derivatives in positive characteristic may lose analytic properties; careful handling required.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine algebra with systems theory to solve classical realizability problems using purely algebraic means.

papers.title: FlowDIS: Language-Guided Dichotomous Image Segmentation with Flow Matching
papers.summary: Accurate image segmentation is essential for modern computer vision applications such as image editing, autonomous driving, and medical image analysis. In recent years, Dichotomous Image Segmentation (DIS) has become a standard task for training and evaluating highly accurate segmentation models. Existing DIS approaches often fail to preserve fine-grained details or fully capture the semantic structure of the foreground. To address these challenges, we present FlowDIS, a novel dichotomous image segmentation method built on the flow matching framework, which learns a time-dependent vector field to transport the image distribution to the corresponding mask distribution, optionally conditioned on a text prompt. Moreover, with our Position-Aware Instance Pairing (PAIP) training strategy, FlowDIS offers strong controllability through text prompts, enabling precise, pixel-level object segmentation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches both with and without language guidance. Compared with the best prior DIS method, FlowDIS achieves a 5.5% higher $F_β^ω$ measure and 43% lower MAE ($\mathcal{M}$) on the DIS-TE test set. The code is available at: https://github.com/Picsart-AI-Research/FlowDIS

ai.tldr: 提出FlowDIS，基于流匹配框架实现文本引导的二值图像分割，显著提升细粒度与语义结构保持能力。
ai.motivation: 现有二值图像分割方法难以保留细节并充分捕获前景语义结构。
ai.method: 利用流匹配学习时间相关向量场，将图像分布映射到掩码分布，并引入位置感知实例配对训练策略实现文本可控分割。
ai.result: 在DIS-TE测试集上，Fβω指标提升5.5%，MAE降低43%，超越现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供高精度、文本可控的二值分割工具，适用于图像编辑、自动驾驶和医学图像分析。

idea_spark.idea: 将位置感知实例配对策略扩展到多模态分割，如结合语音或草图引导。

en.motivation: Existing DIS methods fail to preserve fine-grained details and fully capture foreground semantic structure.

papers.title: Sampling Simultaneous Edge-Colorings
papers.summary: We study the sampling problem for simultaneous edge colorings. Given a pair of graphs $G_1=(V,E_1)$ and $G_2=(V,E_2)$ which are on the same vertex set $V$, a simultaneous edge coloring is an edge coloring of $G_1\cup G_2$ so that each of the individual graphs is properly colored. When each of $G_1$ and $G_2$ are of maximum degree $Δ$, then it is conjectured that $Δ+2$ colors suffice, and recent work asymptotically establishes the conjecture.   We study Markov chains for randomly sampling from the uniform distribution over simultaneous edge colorings. Straightforward applications of Jerrum's classical coupling argument establish rapid mixing of the Glauber dynamics on the corresponding line graph when $k>8Δ$. We present a simple weighted Hamming distance for which Jerrum's coupling yields optimal mixing time (up to constant factors) of $O(m\log{n})$ when $k>(6+δ)Δ$ for any fixed $δ>0$. Moreover, utilizing the flip dynamics with our new metric, we obtain $O(m\log{n})$ mixing of the flip dynamics with a local choice of flip parameters, which flips only bounded-size components, when $k\geq 5.95Δ$. The proof adapts previous coupling analyses for the flip dynamics to the setting of simultaneous edge colorings.

ai.tldr: 研究同时边着色的采样问题，提出加权汉明距离并证明在特定颜色数下马尔可夫链快速混合。
ai.motivation: 同时边着色是图论中的基本问题，其均匀采样对统计物理和算法设计有重要意义。
ai.method: 使用Jerrum耦合论证分析Glauber动力学和翻转动力学，引入加权汉明距离度量。
ai.result: 当颜色数k>(6+δ)Δ时，Glauber动力学在O(m log n)时间内混合；当k≥5.95Δ时，翻转动力学同样达到O(m log n)混合时间。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了同时边着色采样的理论保证和高效算法，可应用于组合优化和随机图生成。

idea_spark.idea: 利用局部翻转策略和加权距离，降低对颜色数的要求，实现快速混合。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖于特定参数范围，实际应用中颜色数可能不满足条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从经典耦合论证出发，通过调整度量函数优化混合时间上界。

en.tldr: Studies the sampling problem for simultaneous edge colorings, proposes a weighted Hamming distance, and proves rapid mixing of Markov chains under certain color counts.
en.motivation: Simultaneous edge coloring is a fundamental graph problem; uniform sampling is important for statistical physics and algorithm design.
en.method: Uses Jerrum's coupling argument to analyze Glauber dynamics and flip dynamics, introducing a weighted Hamming distance metric.
en.result: When the number of colors k > (6+δ)Δ, Glauber dynamics mixes in O(m log n) time; when k ≥ 5.95Δ, flip dynamics also achieves O(m log n) mixing time.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical guarantees and efficient algorithms for sampling simultaneous edge colorings, applicable to combinatorial optimization and random graph generation.

idea_spark.idea: Leveraging local flip strategies and weighted distances reduces the required number of colors for rapid mixing.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results depend on specific parameter ranges; practical color counts may not meet conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from classical coupling arguments, optimizing the metric improves mixing time bounds.

papers.title: UniPCB: A Generation-Assisted Detection Framework for PCB Defect Inspection
papers.summary: Printed Circuit Board (PCB) defect inspection faces two compounding challenges: scarce and imbalanced defect samples that limit model training, and insufficient feature representation under complex circuit backgrounds. Existing generation methods rely on single-modality conditions with coarse structural control, while detection methods improve architectures without addressing the data bottleneck. To resolve both challenges jointly, we propose a generation-assisted PCB defect inspection framework that integrates controlled defect synthesis with task-specific defect detection. On the generation side, a Multi-modal Condition Generator extracts complementary edge, depth, and text conditions in parallel. A ScaleEncoder then embeds these conditions into the diffusion U-Net at four resolutions, and a Condition Modulation applies FiLM-style spatially-adaptive modulation at each scale, enabling structurally aligned and defect-aware sample synthesis. On the detection side, an Inverted Residual Shift Attention couples self-attention with shift-wise convolution to jointly capture global context and local texture, and a Cross-level Complementary Fusion Block generates pixel-level gates for selective cross-level feature fusion. The synthesized samples directly enrich the detection training set, so that improvements in generation compound with improvements in detection. Extensive experiments on DsPCBSD+ demonstrate that UniPCB achieves mAP@0.5 of 98.0% and mAP@0.5:0.95 of 61.8% on defect detection, surpassing all compared methods, while the generation branch attains an FID of 129.61 and SSIM of 0.619, outperforming existing conditional generation approaches.

ai.tldr: 提出UniPCB框架，通过生成辅助检测解决PCB缺陷检测中数据稀缺和特征表示不足的问题。
ai.motivation: PCB缺陷检测面临缺陷样本稀少且类别不平衡、复杂电路背景下特征表示不足的双重挑战。
ai.method: 生成侧采用多模态条件生成器提取边缘、深度和文本条件，经ScaleEncoder嵌入扩散U-Net，Condition Modulation进行空间自适应调制；检测侧使用倒残差移位注意力捕获全局和局部特征，跨级互补融合块实现像素级门控融合。
ai.result: 在DsPCBSD+数据集上，缺陷检测mAP@0.5达98.0%，mAP@0.5:0.95达61.8%；生成分支FID为129.61，SSIM为0.619，均优于对比方法。
ai.help_to_user: 可帮助用户理解如何结合生成模型与检测模型解决工业缺陷检测中的数据瓶颈问题。

en.tldr: Proposes UniPCB, a generation-assisted detection framework to address data scarcity and insufficient feature representation in PCB defect inspection.
en.motivation: PCB defect inspection suffers from scarce and imbalanced defect samples, and poor feature representation under complex circuit backgrounds.
en.method: Generation side uses a Multi-modal Condition Generator to extract edge, depth, and text conditions, embedded into diffusion U-Net via ScaleEncoder and Condition Modulation with FiLM-style spatial-adaptive modulation. Detection side employs Inverted Residual Shift Attention for global-local features and Cross-level Complementary Fusion Block for pixel-level gated fusion.

en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to combine generative models with detection to overcome data bottlenecks in industrial defect inspection.

idea_spark.risk: Generated sample quality may be limited by training data diversity, and multi-modal condition extraction requires extra computation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using generated samples to dynamically augment training sets creates a virtuous cycle between generation and detection, inspiring closed-loop training paradigms.

papers.title: Super Krawtchouk Polynomials via Lie Superalgebras
papers.summary: Multivariate extensions of the Krawtchouk polynomials have been studied by numerous authors in recent decades by exploring new connections to probability, representation theory and quantum integrability. We develop a theory of multivariate super Krawtchouk polynomials using the representation theory of the general linear Lie superalgebra, extending results of the first author in the classical setting. Specifically, in the present work we generalize the classical Krawtchouk polynomials, prove their orthogonality, construct certain recurrence relations, and discuss their connections with zonal spherical functions arising from a fermionic Fock-space framework in quantum mechanics.

ai.tldr: 利用一般线性李超代数的表示论，发展了多元超Krawtchouk多项式理论，推广了经典Krawtchouk多项式，证明了正交性并构造了递推关系。
ai.motivation: 将经典Krawtchouk多项式推广到超代数框架，建立与量子力学中费米子Fock空间球面函数的联系。
ai.method: 基于一般线性李超代数的表示论，构造多元超Krawtchouk多项式，并利用代数方法证明正交性和递推关系。
ai.result: 得到了超Krawtchouk多项式的正交性、递推关系及其与费米子Fock空间球面函数的联系。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究超对称量子可积系统和多元正交多项式提供新的代数工具。

en.tldr: Using representation theory of the general linear Lie superalgebra, we develop a theory of multivariate super Krawtchouk polynomials, generalizing classical Krawtchouk polynomials, proving orthogonality, and constructing recurrence relations.
en.motivation: To extend classical Krawtchouk polynomials to a superalgebraic framework and connect with zonal spherical functions in a fermionic Fock space in quantum mechanics.
en.method: Based on representation theory of the general linear Lie superalgebra, we construct multivariate super Krawtchouk polynomials and prove orthogonality and recurrence relations algebraically.

en.help_to_user: Provides new algebraic tools for studying supersymmetric quantum integrable systems and multivariate orthogonal polynomials.

idea_spark.inspiration: Combining Lie superalgebra representation theory with orthogonal polynomials may open new directions in supersymmetric special functions.

papers.title: From Diffusion to Rectified Flow: Rethinking Text-Based Segmentation
papers.summary: Text-based image segmentation aims to delineate object boundaries within an image from text prompts, offering higher flexibility and broader application scope compared to traditional fixed-category segmentation tasks. Recent studies have shown that diffusion models (e.g., Stable Diffusion) can provide rich multimodal semantic features, leading to studies of using diffusion models as feature extractors for segmentation tasks. Such methods, however, inherit the generative natures of diffusion models that are harmful to discriminative segmentation tasks. In response, we propose RLFSeg, a novel framework that leverages Rectified Flow to learn direct mapping from the image to the segmentation mask within the latent space. The model is thus freed from the noise-denoise process and the need to optimize the time step of diffusion models, resulting in substantially better performance than previous diffusion-based methods, especially on zero-shot scenarios. By introducing label refinement and an Adaptive One-Step Sampling strategy, the model achieves higher accuracy even on a single inference step. The framework redirects a pretrained generative model to the discriminative segmentation task with zero modification to model structure, thus reveals promising application potential and significant research value.

ai.tldr: 提出RLFSeg框架，利用Rectified Flow替代扩散模型，实现文本引导的图像分割，在零样本场景下表现更优。
ai.motivation: 扩散模型用于分割时继承生成特性，不利于判别任务，且需优化时间步长。
ai.method: 使用Rectified Flow学习图像到分割掩码的直接映射，引入标签细化和自适应一步采样策略。
ai.result: 在零样本场景下性能显著优于扩散方法，单步推理即可达到高精度。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需修改模型结构即可将预训练生成模型用于判别分割任务的新思路。

idea_spark.idea: 将Rectified Flow与多模态提示结合，实现更灵活的交互式分割。

idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴生成模型中的流匹配方法，简化判别任务的训练流程。

idea_spark.idea: 将Rectified Flow与多模态提示结合，实现更灵活的交互式分割。
idea_spark.risk: 在复杂场景下，一步采样可能丢失细节，需平衡速度与精度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴生成模型中的流匹配方法，简化判别任务的训练流程。

en.tldr: Proposes RLFSeg, a framework using Rectified Flow instead of diffusion models for text-guided segmentation, achieving superior zero-shot performance.
en.motivation: Diffusion models inherit generative natures harmful to discriminative segmentation and require time-step optimization.
en.method: Uses Rectified Flow to learn direct image-to-mask mapping, with label refinement and adaptive one-step sampling.
en.result: Significantly outperforms diffusion-based methods in zero-shot scenarios, achieving high accuracy even with single-step inference.
en.help_to_user: Offers a new approach to repurpose pretrained generative models for discriminative segmentation without structural modification.

idea_spark.idea: Combine Rectified Flow with multimodal prompts for more flexible interactive segmentation.
idea_spark.risk: One-step sampling may lose details in complex scenes, requiring trade-off between speed and accuracy.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage flow matching from generative models to simplify training pipelines for discriminative tasks.

papers.title: Dissipation and c-Entropy in Nevanlinna-Pick Interpolation
papers.summary: We study interpolation L-systems realizing finite Nevanlinna-Pick data sets and analyze their structural and quantitative characteristics. Explicit formulas are derived for the c-entropy and dissipation coefficient, two intrinsic invariants that describe the dissipative structure of interpolation L-systems. These quantities depend only on the geometric placement of interpolation nodes in $\mathbb{C}_+$, attaining maximal finite values for purely imaginary nodes. The interpolation model $Θ_Δ$ and its unitary equivalents reveal that these invariants form a direct link between analytic interpolation data and the dynamical properties of L-systems. Particular attention is given to symmetric configurations, where the impedance function admits an explicit rational representation and a natural physical interpretation in terms of equivalent $LC$-networks.

ai.tldr: 研究了实现有限Nevanlinna-Pick数据集的插值L-系统，推导了c-熵和耗散系数的显式公式，并揭示了它们与插值节点几何位置的关系。
ai.motivation: 理解插值L-系统的内在不变量及其与解析插值数据的联系。
ai.method: 通过分析插值模型Θ_Δ及其酉等价形式，推导c-熵和耗散系数的显式表达式。
ai.result: c-熵和耗散系数仅依赖于插值节点在复上半平面中的几何位置，纯虚节点时达到最大有限值；对称配置下阻抗函数具有显式有理表示和LC网络物理解释。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了分析耗散系统结构不变量的一种解析工具，可用于网络综合和系统理论。

idea_spark.idea: 利用插值节点的对称性设计具有特定耗散特性的LC网络。
idea_spark.risk: 纯虚节点情形下不变量达到最大值，可能对应物理上难以实现的极限情况。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将解析插值数据与动力系统属性直接关联，启发基于几何的系统设计方法。

en.tldr: We study interpolation L-systems realizing finite Nevanlinna-Pick data sets, derive explicit formulas for c-entropy and dissipation coefficient, and reveal their dependence on the geometric placement of interpolation nodes.
en.motivation: To understand intrinsic invariants of interpolation L-systems and their connection to analytic interpolation data.
en.method: By analyzing the interpolation model Θ_Δ and its unitary equivalents, explicit expressions for c-entropy and dissipation coefficient are derived.
en.result: c-entropy and dissipation coefficient depend only on the geometric placement of interpolation nodes in the upper half-plane, attaining maximal finite values for purely imaginary nodes; symmetric configurations yield explicit rational impedance functions interpretable as equivalent LC-networks.
en.help_to_user: Provides an analytic tool for analyzing structural invariants of dissipative systems, applicable to network synthesis and system theory.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit symmetry of interpolation nodes to design LC-networks with specific dissipative properties.
idea_spark.risk: Maximal invariants at purely imaginary nodes may correspond to physically unrealizable limiting cases.
idea_spark.inspiration: Directly linking analytic interpolation data to dynamical system properties inspires geometry-based system design methods.

papers.title: Ground4D: Spatially-Grounded Feedforward 4D Reconstruction for Unstructured Off-Road Scenes
papers.summary: Feedforward Gaussian Splatting has recently emerged as an efficient paradigm for 4D reconstruction in autonomous driving. However, in unstructured off-road scenes, its performance degrades due to high-frequency geometry, ego-motion jitter, and increased non-rigid dynamics. These factors introduce conflicting Gaussian observations across timestamps, leading to either over-smoothed renderings or structural artifacts. To address this issue, we propose Ground4D, a spatially-grounded 4D feedforward framework for pose-free off-road reconstruction. The key idea is to resolve temporal conflicts through spatially localized conditioning. Specifically, we introduce voxel-grounded temporal Gaussian aggregation, which partitions the canonical Gaussian space into spatial voxels and performs query-conditioned temporal attention within each voxel. Intra-voxel softmax normalization ensures that temporal selectivity and spatial occupancy become mutually reinforcing rather than conflicting. We furthermore introduce surface normal cues as auxiliary geometric guidance to regularize the geometry of Gaussian primitives. Extensive experiments on ORAD-3D and RELLIS-3D demonstrate that Ground4D consistently outperforms existing feedforward methods in reconstruction quality and generalizes zero-shot to unseen off-road domains. Project page and code:https://github.com/wsnbws/Ground4D.

ai.tldr: 提出Ground4D，一种基于空间体素约束的前馈4D重建框架，用于无结构越野场景的位姿自由重建。
ai.motivation: 现有前馈高斯泼溅方法在越野场景中因高频几何、自运动抖动和非刚性动态导致时序观测冲突，产生过平滑或结构伪影。
ai.method: 将规范高斯空间划分为空间体素，在每个体素内执行查询条件时序注意力，并通过体素内softmax归一化使时序选择性与空间占用相互增强；同时引入表面法线作为辅助几何约束。
ai.result: 在ORAD-3D和RELLIS-3D上优于现有前馈方法，且零样本泛化到未见越野域。
ai.help_to_user: 为越野自动驾驶场景提供高质量4D重建方案，无需位姿先验。

idea_spark.idea: 将表面法线作为几何正则化项，与体素注意力联合优化，提升重建几何精度。
idea_spark.risk: 体素划分粒度对性能敏感，过粗或过细可能导致信息丢失或计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受空间局部性原理启发，通过体素约束解决时序冲突，类似分治策略。

en.tldr: Proposes Ground4D, a spatially-grounded feedforward 4D reconstruction framework for pose-free reconstruction in unstructured off-road scenes.
en.motivation: Existing feedforward Gaussian splatting methods degrade in off-road scenes due to high-frequency geometry, ego-motion jitter, and non-rigid dynamics, causing conflicting temporal observations and artifacts.
en.method: Partitions canonical Gaussian space into spatial voxels, performs query-conditioned temporal attention within each voxel, and uses intra-voxel softmax normalization to make temporal selectivity and spatial occupancy mutually reinforcing; also introduces surface normal cues as auxiliary geometric guidance.
en.result: Outperforms existing feedforward methods on ORAD-3D and RELLIS-3D, and generalizes zero-shot to unseen off-road domains.
en.help_to_user: Provides high-quality 4D reconstruction for off-road autonomous driving without requiring pose priors.

idea_spark.idea: Use surface normals as geometric regularization jointly optimized with voxel attention to improve reconstruction geometry.
idea_spark.risk: Voxel granularity is sensitive; too coarse or too fine may cause information loss or high computation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by spatial locality principle, resolving temporal conflicts via voxel constraints, akin to divide-and-conquer.

papers.title: The Scaling Properties of Implicit Deductive Reasoning in Transformers
papers.summary: We investigate the scaling properties of implicit deductive reasoning over Horn clauses in depth-bounded Transformers. By systematically decorrelating provability from spurious features and enforcing algorithmic alignment, we find that in sufficiently deep models with a bidirectional prefix mask, implicit reasoning approaches explicit CoT performance across graph topologies and problem widths, though CoT remains necessary for depth extrapolation.

ai.tldr: 研究了深度受限Transformer中隐式演绎推理的缩放性质，发现足够深的双向前缀掩码模型能接近显式思维链性能，但思维链在深度外推上仍必要。
ai.motivation: 探索Transformer隐式演绎推理的缩放规律，以及如何通过算法对齐和去相关虚假特征提升推理能力。
ai.method: 在Horn子句上系统去相关可证明性与虚假特征，强制算法对齐，使用双向前缀掩码训练深度受限Transformer。
ai.result: 足够深的模型在多种图拓扑和问题宽度上，隐式推理接近显式思维链性能，但思维链在深度外推上仍必要。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解Transformer隐式推理的缩放特性，指导模型深度和掩码设计以提升推理效率。

idea_spark.idea: 探索在更复杂逻辑系统（如一阶逻辑）中隐式推理的缩放性质。
idea_spark.risk: 深度外推的局限性可能限制隐式推理在需要严格逻辑深度的场景中的应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合隐式推理与思维链的混合方法可能平衡效率与泛化能力。

en.tldr: Investigates scaling properties of implicit deductive reasoning over Horn clauses in depth-bounded Transformers, showing that sufficiently deep models with bidirectional prefix mask approach explicit CoT performance, though CoT remains necessary for depth extrapolation.
en.motivation: To explore scaling laws of implicit deductive reasoning in Transformers and how algorithmic alignment and decorrelation of spurious features can enhance reasoning.
en.method: Systematically decorrelates provability from spurious features over Horn clauses, enforces algorithmic alignment, and trains depth-bounded Transformers with bidirectional prefix mask.
en.result: Sufficiently deep models approach explicit CoT performance across graph topologies and problem widths, but CoT remains necessary for depth extrapolation.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand scaling properties of implicit reasoning in Transformers, guiding model depth and mask design for efficient reasoning.

idea_spark.idea: Explore scaling properties of implicit reasoning in more complex logical systems, such as first-order logic.
idea_spark.risk: Limitations in depth extrapolation may restrict implicit reasoning in scenarios requiring strict logical depth.
idea_spark.inspiration: Hybrid approaches combining implicit reasoning and CoT may balance efficiency and generalization.

papers.title: Anchored random clusters and SLE excursions
papers.summary: We provide a pedagogical review of CFT techniques to compute certain Schramm-Loewner Evolution (SLE) observables in the upper half-plane. The approach relies on the ability to express the observables as bulk-boundary correlation functions that involve degenerate boundary operators and, therefore, obey certain differential equations. In particular, we recover Schramm's left-passage probability for SLE, the SLE Green's functions, and the generalized densities of ``anchored'' critical percolation clusters first obtained by Kleban, Simmons, and Ziff. We also obtain new formulas corresponding to the densities of pivotal points between critical Fortuin-Kasteleyn (FK) clusters.

ai.tldr: 本文用共形场论技术计算上半平面中Schramm-Loewner演化（SLE）的可观测量，包括左穿概率、格林函数和锚定临界渗流簇密度，并得到FK簇枢轴点密度的新公式。
ai.motivation: 为SLE可观测量提供统一且教学性的共形场论推导框架。
ai.method: 将可观测量表示为体-边关联函数，利用简并边界算符满足的微分方程求解。
ai.result: 复现了Schramm左穿概率、SLE格林函数及Kleban等人关于锚定临界渗流簇密度的结果，并推导了FK簇枢轴点密度的新公式。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何用CFT方法计算SLE中的关键概率和密度。

idea_spark.idea: 将SLE可观测量与渗流簇的几何性质（如枢轴点）直接关联。
idea_spark.risk: 推导依赖特定边界条件，可能不适用于更一般的几何或随机过程。
idea_spark.inspiration: 用CFT解析计算随机几何中的关键统计量，启发其他渗流或随机曲线模型的研究。

en.tldr: This paper uses conformal field theory techniques to compute Schramm-Loewner Evolution observables in the upper half-plane, including left-passage probability, Green's functions, and anchored critical percolation cluster densities, and obtains new formulas for pivotal point densities in FK clusters.
en.motivation: To provide a pedagogical and unified CFT derivation framework for SLE observables.
en.method: Express observables as bulk-boundary correlation functions and solve differential equations arising from degenerate boundary operators.
en.result: Recovers Schramm's left-passage probability, SLE Green's functions, and Kleban et al.'s anchored percolation cluster densities, and derives new formulas for FK cluster pivotal point densities.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to compute key probabilities and densities in SLE using CFT methods.

idea_spark.idea: Directly link SLE observables to geometric properties of percolation clusters, such as pivotal points.
idea_spark.risk: Derivation relies on specific boundary conditions and may not generalize to arbitrary geometries or stochastic processes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using CFT to analytically compute key statistics in random geometry inspires research on other percolation or random curve models.

papers.title: Tropical resolutions of configuration hypersurfaces
papers.summary: Configuration polynomials generalize the Kirchhoff polynomial of a graph, as well as the Symanzik polynomials that appear in the denominators of Feynman integrands. The configuration hypersurfaces cut out by such polynomials are typically highly singular, which poses a challenge for the evaluation of Feynman integrals even in simplified settings.   In this paper, we provide a two-step recipe for a resolution of singularities of any irreducible configuration hypersurface. We first consider the normalization of the Nash blow-up, which we identify with an incidence variety introduced by Bloch. This variety is typically still not smooth, but it is the closure of a smooth subvariety of a torus. The latter then a smooth, tropical compactification, using work of Tevelev. We construct explicitly such a compactification and a morphism to the normalized Nash blow-up for every configuration, described in terms of bipermutohedral matroid combinatorics introduced by Ardila, Denham and Huh.   Along the way, we find that the normalized Nash blow-up of the configuration hypersurface has strongly $F$-regular singularities in positive characteristic. We deduce this by certifying $F$-rationality of its biprojective cone, and infer from it that the normalized Nash blow-up has rational singularities over the complex numbers.

ai.tldr: 本文为不可约配置超曲面提供了两步奇点消解方案，结合Nash爆发的正规化与热带紧化，并利用双置换拟阵组合学显式构造。
ai.motivation: 配置多项式（如Kirchhoff和Symanzik多项式）定义的超曲面通常高度奇异，阻碍了费曼积分的计算。
ai.method: 先取Nash爆发的正规化（与Bloch引入的关联簇等同），再通过Tevelev的工作构造光滑热带紧化，并用双置换拟阵组合学描述态射。
ai.result: 证明了正规化Nash爆发在正特征下具有强F-正则奇点，在复数域上具有有理奇点。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了显式的奇点消解构造，有助于简化费曼积分在简化设置中的评估。

idea_spark.idea: 利用热带几何与拟阵理论结合，为高奇异代数簇提供系统性的奇点消解方法。
idea_spark.risk: 构造依赖于特定组合结构，可能不适用于一般配置超曲面。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将Nash爆发与热带紧化结合，为奇点消解提供新路径，启发类似组合-几何混合方法。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将Nash爆发与热带紧化结合，为奇点消解提供新路径，启发类似组合-几何混合方法。

en.tldr: This paper provides a two-step resolution of singularities for irreducible configuration hypersurfaces, combining normalization of the Nash blow-up with a tropical compactification, explicitly constructed via bipermutohedral matroid combinatorics.
en.motivation: Configuration hypersurfaces defined by polynomials like Kirchhoff and Symanzik are often highly singular, hindering evaluation of Feynman integrals.
en.method: First take the normalization of the Nash blow-up (identified with an incidence variety of Bloch), then construct a smooth tropical compactification using Tevelev's work, with morphisms described by bipermutohedral matroid combinatorics.
en.result: The normalized Nash blow-up has strongly F-regular singularities in positive characteristic and rational singularities over complex numbers.
en.help_to_user: Provides an explicit resolution construction that can simplify evaluation of Feynman integrals in simplified settings.

idea_spark.idea: Combine tropical geometry and matroid theory to systematically resolve singularities of highly singular algebraic varieties.
idea_spark.risk: The construction relies on specific combinatorial structures and may not apply to general configuration hypersurfaces.
idea_spark.inspiration: Merging Nash blow-up with tropical compactification offers a new path for singularity resolution, inspiring similar combinatorial-geometric hybrid methods.

papers.title: Ultra Low-Power SDM-based Circuit-Switching for Networks-on-Chip
papers.summary: In many modern AI chips and multicore systems-on-chip, embedded applications exhibit predictable inter-core traffic behavior that can be characterized at design time. For such applications, a variety of design-time traffic management and network optimization techniques can be employed to improve NoC power and performance. To exploit this predictability, we propose a novel low-power circuit-switched NoC design. It uses the Spatial Division Multiplexing (SDM) technique to establish circuits, implemented as subsets of NoC wires, for the communication flows of a target application. To further reduce the power profile of SDM, the design incorporates a new router architecture that combines hard-wired switches with conventional programmable crossbars. The architecture is complemented by an algorithm that maps application tasks onto a mesh NoC and assigns an SDM route with adequate bit-width to each circuit built for inter-task communication flows. Compared with a conventional packet-switched NoC, the proposed approach achieves approximately 38% lower NoC power consumption, 19% smaller area, and 12% lower packet latency.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于空分复用的超低功耗电路交换片上网络设计，利用可预测的核间流量，结合硬连线开关和可编程交叉开关，实现功耗、面积和延迟的显著降低。
ai.motivation: 现代AI芯片和多核SoC中，嵌入式应用具有可预测的核间流量行为，传统分组交换NoC功耗较高，需要利用设计时流量特征来优化NoC的功耗和性能。
ai.method: 采用空分复用技术建立电路，将NoC线束的子集分配给通信流；提出新型路由器架构，融合硬连线开关与可编程交叉开关；并设计任务映射与SDM路由分配算法。

ai.help_to_user: 为低功耗NoC设计提供了一种结合SDM和混合路由器的具体方案，适用于可预测流量的嵌入式系统。

en.tldr: Proposes an ultra low-power circuit-switched NoC based on Spatial Division Multiplexing, leveraging predictable inter-core traffic with a hybrid router architecture combining hard-wired switches and programmable crossbars, achieving significant power, area, and latency reductions.
en.motivation: In modern AI chips and multicore SoCs, embedded applications exhibit predictable inter-core traffic; conventional packet-switched NoCs consume high power, motivating design-time traffic optimization.
en.method: Uses SDM to establish circuits as subsets of NoC wires; introduces a router architecture mixing hard-wired switches with programmable crossbars; and provides a task mapping and SDM route assignment algorithm.
en.result: Compared to a conventional packet-switched NoC, the approach achieves approximately 38% lower power, 19% smaller area, and 12% lower packet latency.
en.help_to_user: Offers a concrete low-power NoC design combining SDM and hybrid routers, suitable for embedded systems with predictable traffic.

idea_spark.idea: Could SDM circuit switching be combined with dynamic voltage and frequency scaling for further power savings?
idea_spark.risk: Hard-wired switches may reduce flexibility and be sensitive to traffic pattern changes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage design-time traffic prediction to pre-configure partial circuits, reducing runtime dynamic power.

papers.title: 3D Ultrasound-Derived Pseudo-CT Synthesis Using a Transformer-Augmented Residual Network for Real-Time Operator Guidance
papers.summary: Computed tomography (CT) is indispensable for clinical diagnosis and image-guided interventions but exposes patients to ionizing radiation, motivating the development of safer imaging alternatives. Ultrasound (US) is non-ionizing and widely accessible; however, it is highly operator dependent and lacks quantitative tissue characterization, often leading to diagnostic uncertainty and unnecessary CT examinations. This work presents a 3D ultrasound-derived pseudo-CT (UD-pCT) framework that generates CT-like anatomical reference volumes inferred from US, without aiming to reproduce physically accurate Hounsfield Units. Paired 3D kidney US and CT volumes from the TRUSTED dataset are first spatially aligned using a landmark-based multimodal registration pipeline, creating high-quality paired inputs for supervised training of an adversarial framework. The proposed Bottleneck Transformer Residual U-Net3D (BT-ResUNet3D) model employs a 3D residual encoder-decoder generator augmented with a transformer bottleneck, enabling effective modeling of fine-grained local anatomical structures as well as long-range volumetric dependencies, while a 3D Conditional PatchGAN discriminator enforces local structural realism in the synthesized pseudo-CT volumes. Quantitative evaluation using PSNR and SSIM demonstrates that the proposed method outperforms established baselines in structural fidelity and perceptual image quality. The UD-pCT volumes provide real-time anatomical reference for operator guidance, potentially reducing acquisition variability and unnecessary CT use. A limitation of this study is the relatively small paired dataset, which may limit the generalizability of the proposed model.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于Transformer增强残差网络的3D超声衍生伪CT合成方法，用于实时操作引导。
ai.motivation: CT有电离辐射，超声无辐射但依赖操作者且缺乏定量组织表征，导致诊断不确定和不必要的CT检查。
ai.method: 使用TRUSTED数据集的配对3D肾脏超声和CT体积，通过地标多模态配准对齐，采用Bottleneck Transformer Residual U-Net3D生成器与3D条件PatchGAN判别器进行对抗训练。
ai.result: 在PSNR和SSIM指标上优于基线方法，合成的伪CT体积可提供实时解剖参考，减少采集变异和不必要的CT使用。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用超声生成CT样参考图像，减少辐射暴露并提高操作一致性。

idea_spark.idea: 探索使用无监督或半监督学习，利用大量未配对超声和CT数据提升模型泛化性。
idea_spark.risk: 小数据集可能导致过拟合，伪CT的临床可靠性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合扩散模型或神经辐射场（NeRF）可能进一步提升合成图像的质量和三维一致性。

en.tldr: A transformer-augmented residual network for 3D ultrasound-derived pseudo-CT synthesis enabling real-time operator guidance.
en.motivation: CT involves ionizing radiation; ultrasound is non-ionizing but operator-dependent and lacks quantitative tissue characterization, leading to diagnostic uncertainty and unnecessary CT exams.
en.method: Paired 3D kidney US and CT volumes from the TRUSTED dataset are aligned via landmark-based multimodal registration, then used to train an adversarial framework with a Bottleneck Transformer Residual U-Net3D generator and a 3D Conditional PatchGAN discriminator.
en.result: Outperforms baselines in PSNR and SSIM; synthesized pseudo-CT volumes provide real-time anatomical reference, potentially reducing acquisition variability and unnecessary CT use.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to generate CT-like reference images from ultrasound, reducing radiation exposure and improving operator consistency.

idea_spark.idea: Explore unsupervised or semi-supervised learning using large unpaired US and CT datasets to improve model generalization.
idea_spark.risk: Small dataset may cause overfitting; clinical reliability of pseudo-CT needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Incorporating diffusion models or neural radiance fields (NeRF) could further enhance synthesis quality and 3D consistency.

papers.title: RaguTeam at SemEval-2026 Task 8: Meno and Friends in a Judge-Orchestrated LLM Ensemble for Faithful Multi-Turn Response Generation
papers.summary: We present our winning system for Task~B (generation with reference passages) in SemEval-2026 Task~8: MTRAGEval. Our method is a heterogeneous ensemble of seven LLMs with two prompting variants, where a GPT-4o-mini judge selects the best candidate per instance. We ranked 1st out of 26 teams, achieving a conditioned harmonic mean of 0.7827 and outperforming the strongest baseline (gpt-oss-120b, 0.6390). Ablations show that diversity in model families, scales, and prompting strategies is essential, with the ensemble consistently beating any single model. We also introduce Meno-Lite-0.1, a 7B domain-adapted model with a strong cost--performance trade-off, and analyse MTRAGEval, highlighting annotation limitations and directions for improvement. Our code is publicly available: https://github.com/RaguTeam/ragu_mtrag_semeval

ai.tldr: 提出一个由七个不同大语言模型组成的异构集成系统，通过GPT-4o-mini裁判选择最佳输出，在SemEval-2026任务8中排名第一。
ai.motivation: 多轮对话生成中需要忠实于参考段落，但单一模型难以兼顾多样性和可靠性。
ai.method: 构建七个LLM的异构集成，每个模型使用两种提示变体，由GPT-4o-mini裁判为每个实例选择最佳候选。
ai.result: 条件调和均值0.7827，超越最强基线（0.6390），消融实验证明模型多样性至关重要。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种实用的多模型集成框架，可提升生成任务的忠实度和鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 探索更轻量的裁判模型或自适应选择策略，减少计算开销。
idea_spark.risk: 裁判模型可能引入偏差，需评估其对不同输出风格的偏好。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用模型多样性而非单一模型优化，可能成为提升生成质量的新范式。

idea_spark.inspiration: 利用模型多样性而非单一模型优化，可能成为提升生成质量的新范式。

en.tldr: A heterogeneous ensemble of seven LLMs with a GPT-4o-mini judge selects the best output, achieving first place in SemEval-2026 Task 8.
en.motivation: Multi-turn generation requires faithfulness to reference passages, but single models struggle with both diversity and reliability.
en.method: Ensemble of seven LLMs with two prompting variants each, using a GPT-4o-mini judge to select the best candidate per instance.
en.result: Conditioned harmonic mean of 0.7827, outperforming the strongest baseline (0.6390); ablations show model diversity is key.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical multi-model ensemble framework to improve faithfulness and robustness in generation tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Explore lighter judge models or adaptive selection strategies to reduce computational cost.
idea_spark.risk: The judge model may introduce bias; evaluate its preference for different output styles.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging model diversity rather than single-model optimization could become a new paradigm for improving generation quality.

papers.title: Out-of-the-Box Global Optimization for Packing Problems: New Models and Improved Solutions
papers.summary: Recent LLM-driven discoveries have renewed interest in geometric packing problems. In this paper, we study several classes of such packing problems through the lens of modern global nonlinear optimization. Starting from comparatively direct nonlinear formulations, we consider packing circles in squares and fixed-perimeter rectangles, packing circles into minimum-area ellipses, packing regular polygons into regular polygons, and packing Platonic solids into Platonic solids. For ellipse packing, we derive a novel containment formulation based on the S-lemma. For polygon and Platonic solid packing, we develop compact non-overlap formulations based on the Farkas lemma and study several natural modeling variants computationally.   Using off-the-shelf global optimization solvers, namely FICO Xpress and SCIP, we obtain numerous new incumbent solutions as well as first solutions for previously unstudied variants without any problem-specific solver modifications beyond writing down the models. Our computational results analyze the impact of various formulation choices.   Beyond the individual packing results, the paper illustrates a broader point. It provides further evidence that global nonlinear optimization has matured into an increasingly practical model-and-solve technology for highly nonconvex problems.

ai.tldr: 本文利用现代全局非线性优化技术，针对多类几何装箱问题（如圆、椭圆、正多边形、柏拉图立体装箱）提出新模型，并使用现成求解器获得改进解。
ai.motivation: 近期LLM驱动的发现重新激发了对几何装箱问题的兴趣，但现有方法常需问题特定修改。本文旨在展示全局非线性优化作为通用、实用的模型求解技术，无需定制即可高效处理高度非凸的装箱问题。
ai.method: 基于S引理推导椭圆装箱的包含约束，基于Farkas引理构建多边形和柏拉图立体的紧凑非重叠模型，并使用FICO Xpress和SCIP等现成全局优化求解器直接求解。
ai.result: 获得了多个新最优解，并为先前未研究的变体提供了首批解；分析了不同建模选择对计算性能的影响。
ai.help_to_user: 为从事几何装箱或相关组合优化问题的研究者提供可直接使用的通用建模框架和求解策略，避免繁琐的算法定制。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将本文的建模方法扩展到三维不规则物体装箱或动态装箱问题。
idea_spark.risk: 现成求解器对大规模实例可能效率不足，需结合启发式或分解方法。
idea_spark.inspiration: 全局非线性优化作为“模型即求解”技术，可降低非凸问题求解门槛，启发更多跨学科应用。

en.tldr: This paper presents new models for several classes of geometric packing problems using modern global nonlinear optimization, achieving improved solutions with off-the-shelf solvers without problem-specific modifications.
en.motivation: Recent LLM-driven discoveries have renewed interest in geometric packing, but existing methods often require problem-specific modifications. This work aims to demonstrate that global nonlinear optimization has matured into a practical model-and-solve technology for highly nonconvex packing problems.
en.method: Derives novel containment formulations for ellipse packing via the S-lemma and compact non-overlap formulations for polygons and Platonic solids via the Farkas lemma, then solves directly using off-the-shelf global solvers FICO Xpress and SCIP.
en.result: Obtains numerous new incumbent solutions and first solutions for previously unstudied variants; analyzes the impact of different modeling choices on computational performance.
en.help_to_user: Provides researchers in geometric packing and related combinatorial optimization with a general modeling framework and solution strategy that avoids custom algorithm development.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the modeling approach to 3D irregular object packing or dynamic packing problems.
idea_spark.risk: Off-the-shelf solvers may be inefficient for large-scale instances, requiring hybridization with heuristics or decomposition.
idea_spark.inspiration: Global nonlinear optimization as a 'model-and-solve' technology lowers the barrier for solving nonconvex problems, inspiring broader interdisciplinary applications.

papers.title: Budget-aware Auto Optimizer Configurator
papers.summary: Optimizer states occupy massive GPU memory in large-scale model training. However, gradients in different network blocks exhibit distinct behaviors, such as varying directional stability and scale anisotropy, implying that expensive optimizer states are not universally necessary and using a global optimizer is often memory-inefficient. We propose the Budget-Aware Optimizer Configurator (BAOC) to reduce memory cost by assigning suitable optimizer configurations to individual blocks under given budgets. Specifically, BAOC samples gradient streams to derive statistical metrics that quantify the potential performance risk of applying cheaper configurations (e.g., low precision or removing momentum). It then solves a constrained allocation problem to minimize total risk under memory and time budgets, selecting a budget-feasible configuration for each block. Experiments across vision, language, and diffusion workloads demonstrate that BAOC maintains training quality while significantly reducing the memory usage of optimizer states. The code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/BAOC-45C6.

ai.tldr: 提出预算感知优化器配置器（BAOC），通过为不同网络块分配合适的优化器配置，在给定预算下减少优化器状态的内存占用。
ai.motivation: 大规模模型训练中优化器状态占用大量GPU内存，但不同网络块的梯度行为不同，全局优化器内存效率低。
ai.method: 采样梯度流计算统计指标，量化使用低成本配置的性能风险，然后求解约束分配问题，在内存和时间预算下最小化总风险。
ai.result: 在视觉、语言和扩散任务上，BAOC在保持训练质量的同时显著减少优化器状态内存。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户在大模型训练中根据预算自动选择每层的优化器配置，降低显存开销而不牺牲性能。

idea_spark.idea: 结合梯度统计和约束优化，实现细粒度的优化器配置分配。
idea_spark.risk: 梯度统计可能增加少量计算开销，且预算设置不当可能影响训练稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从不同网络块梯度行为差异出发，打破全局统一优化器的惯例。

zh.tldr: 提出预算感知优化器配置器（BAOC），通过为不同网络块分配合适的优化器配置，在给定预算下减少优化器状态的内存占用。
zh.motivation: 大规模模型训练中优化器状态占用大量GPU内存，但不同网络块的梯度行为不同，全局优化器内存效率低。

zh.result: 在视觉、语言和扩散任务上，BAOC在保持训练质量的同时显著减少优化器状态内存。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户在大模型训练中根据预算自动选择每层的优化器配置，降低显存开销而不牺牲性能。

idea_spark.risk: 梯度统计可能增加少量计算开销，且预算设置不当可能影响训练稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从不同网络块梯度行为差异出发，打破全局统一优化器的惯例。

en.tldr: Proposes Budget-Aware Optimizer Configurator (BAOC) that assigns suitable optimizer configurations to individual network blocks under given budgets to reduce memory usage of optimizer states.
en.motivation: Optimizer states consume massive GPU memory in large-scale training, but gradients across blocks behave differently, making a global optimizer memory-inefficient.
en.method: Samples gradient streams to derive statistical metrics quantifying performance risk of cheaper configurations, then solves a constrained allocation problem to minimize total risk under memory and time budgets.
en.result: On vision, language, and diffusion workloads, BAOC maintains training quality while significantly reducing optimizer state memory.
en.help_to_user: Helps users automatically select per-block optimizer configurations under budget constraints, reducing memory overhead without sacrificing performance.

idea_spark.idea: Combines gradient statistics with constrained optimization for fine-grained optimizer configuration allocation.
idea_spark.risk: Gradient statistics may introduce slight computational overhead, and improper budget settings could affect training stability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging gradient behavior differences across blocks to break the convention of a single global optimizer.

papers.title: A Queueing-Theoretic Framework for Stability Analysis of LLM Inference with KV Cache Memory Constraints
papers.summary: The rapid adoption of large language models (LLMs) has created significant challenges for efficient inference at scale. Unlike traditional workloads, LLM inference is constrained by both computation and the memory overhead of key-value (KV) caching, which accelerates decoding but quickly exhausts GPU memory. In this paper, we introduce the first queueing-theoretic framework that explicitly incorporates both computation and GPU memory constraints into the analysis of LLM inference. Based on this framework, we derive rigorous stability and instability conditions that determine whether an LLM inference service can sustain incoming demand without unbounded queue growth. This result offers a powerful tool for system deployment, potentially addressing the core challenge of GPU provisioning. By combining an estimated request arrival rate with our derived stable service rate, operators can calculate the necessary cluster size to avoid both costly over-purchasing and performance-violating under-provisioning. We further validate our theoretical predictions through extensive experiments in real GPU production environments. Our results show that the predicted stability conditions are highly accurate, with deviations typically within 10%.

ai.tldr: 提出首个排队论框架，将计算和GPU内存约束纳入LLM推理稳定性分析，推导出稳定条件，并通过实验验证误差在10%以内。
ai.motivation: LLM推理受计算和KV缓存内存双重约束，现有方法缺乏统一理论框架来指导GPU资源配置。
ai.method: 建立排队论模型，同时考虑计算和内存约束，推导稳定与不稳定条件，并基于到达率计算所需集群规模。
ai.result: 理论预测的稳定条件与真实GPU生产环境实验高度吻合，偏差通常在10%以内。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助运维人员根据请求到达率计算所需GPU数量，避免过度采购或性能违规。

idea_spark.risk: 模型假设可能过于简化，实际系统中的请求到达模式和服务时间分布可能更复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将传统排队论应用于现代AI系统资源管理，为跨学科研究提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes the first queueing-theoretic framework incorporating both computation and GPU memory constraints for LLM inference stability analysis, deriving stability conditions validated within 10% error in real production environments.
en.motivation: LLM inference is constrained by both computation and KV cache memory, lacking a unified theoretical framework for GPU resource provisioning.
en.method: Builds a queueing model considering both constraints, derives stability and instability conditions, and computes required cluster size from arrival rate.
en.result: Theoretical stability predictions closely match real GPU production experiments, with deviations typically under 10%.
en.help_to_user: Enables operators to calculate necessary GPU cluster size from request arrival rate, avoiding over-provisioning and under-provisioning.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporate dynamic KV cache compression or eviction strategies to further optimize stable service rate and reduce GPU demand.
idea_spark.risk: Model assumptions may oversimplify real-world request arrival patterns and service time distributions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Applying classical queueing theory to modern AI system resource management opens new interdisciplinary research directions.

papers.title: A dynamical approach to Schur's Theorem
papers.summary: A classical result of Schur of 1904 shows that an infinite (discrete) group $E$ with finite central quotient $E/Z(E)$ should have finite derived subgroup $[E,E]$. Schur's Theorem has many important consequences, which have been extensively investigated in the literature. Here we focus on topological Hausdorff groups, which are not necessarily discrete groups, and show a dynamical version of Schur's Theorem via the notion of topological entropy of Adler, Konheim and McAndrew. Their perspective follows some original intuitions of Kolmogov and Sinai from the area of the dynamical systems. Firstly, we investigate the topological entropy of continuous endomorphisms of maximal almost periodic groups whose closed derived subgroup is compact. The properties of these groups were known to Takahashi in 1952 and among them we find the $\mathsf{Z}$-groups of Grosser and Moskowitz. Secondly, we give a new dynamical interpretation of the Schur's Theorem, showing that a $\mathsf{Z}$-group $G$ with continuous endomorphisms of finite topological entropy should have closed derived subgroup $\overline{[G,G]}$ with continuous endomorphisms of finite topological entropy. Finally, we illustrate a series of constructions and examples, which allow us to justify our interpretation of Schur's Theorem as generalization of the original version.

ai.tldr: 将Schur定理推广到拓扑Hausdorff群，通过拓扑熵给出动力系统版本。
ai.motivation: 经典Schur定理在离散群中成立，但拓扑群情形尚未有类似结果。
ai.method: 利用Adler-Konheim-McAndrew拓扑熵，研究极大几乎周期群及其闭导子群。
ai.result: 证明了Z-群上有限拓扑熵的连续自同态保持闭导子群也具有有限拓扑熵。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解群论与动力系统交叉领域的新结果。

idea_spark.idea: 探索非交换群上拓扑熵与代数结构（如导子群）的深层联系。
idea_spark.risk: 拓扑熵定义依赖于紧性，非紧情形可能需要其他熵概念。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将经典代数定理转化为动力系统语言，启发其他代数定理的类似推广。

en.motivation: Classical Schur's Theorem holds for discrete groups, but no analogous result exists for topological groups.
en.method: Uses Adler-Konheim-McAndrew topological entropy to study maximal almost periodic groups and their closed derived subgroups.
en.result: Proves that a Z-group with continuous endomorphisms of finite topological entropy has its closed derived subgroup also with continuous endomorphisms of finite topological entropy.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand new results at the intersection of group theory and dynamical systems.

idea_spark.risk: Definition of topological entropy relies on compactness; non-compact cases may require alternative entropy concepts.
idea_spark.inspiration: Translating classical algebraic theorems into dynamical language inspires similar generalizations of other algebraic results.

papers.title: Optimizing Bit-Labeling of Voronoi Constellations
papers.summary: We define a novel search method and performance metric as a technique for optimizing the bit-to-symbol map of the $D_4$ and $E_8$ root lattices in reference to bit error rate. We hold other sources of lattice gain constant by fixing the lattice constellation, and consider basis matrices that permute the integer labelings of the lattice points. After searching the possible basis matrices for $D_4$ and $E_8$, we found 0.1 dB of gain in $D_4$ bit error rate curves, and 0.5 dB of gain in $E_8$ compared to the standard bases commonly used in literature at a BER of $10^{-4}$.

ai.tldr: 提出一种针对D4和E8根格Voronoi星座的比特标签优化方法，通过搜索基矩阵，在BER为10^-4时分别获得0.1 dB和0.5 dB的增益。
ai.motivation: 现有Voronoi星座的比特标签方案未充分优化，导致误码率性能受限。
ai.method: 固定格星座，仅改变基矩阵以置换整数标签，并定义新的搜索方法和性能指标。
ai.result: 在D4和E8格上分别获得0.1 dB和0.5 dB的误码率增益。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种提升格星座通信系统误码率性能的实用标签优化技术。

idea_spark.idea: 将基矩阵搜索与深度学习结合，自动发现更优的比特标签映射。
idea_spark.risk: 搜索空间随维度指数增长，高维格可能面临计算复杂度问题。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受格理论中基变换对性能影响的启发，探索标签排列对误码率的系统影响。

en.tldr: A novel search method and metric optimize the bit-to-symbol map for D4 and E8 root lattice Voronoi constellations, yielding 0.1 dB and 0.5 dB BER gains at 10^-4.
en.motivation: Existing bit-labeling schemes for Voronoi constellations are suboptimal, limiting bit error rate performance.
en.method: Fix the lattice constellation, permute integer labelings via basis matrix search, and define a new search method and performance metric.
en.result: Achieved 0.1 dB gain for D4 and 0.5 dB gain for E8 at BER 10^-4 compared to standard bases.

papers.title: Densification and forecasting of Sentinel-2 time series from multimodal SAR and Optical satellite data using deep generative models
papers.summary: Optical satellite image time series are extensively used in many Earth observation applications, including agriculture, climate monitoring, and land surface analysis. However, clouds and swath edges result in irregular sampling along the temporal dimension, limiting continuous monitoring. To address this issue, a growing body of work has focused on temporal densification and reconstruction of satellite image time series, with the objective of filling missing or cloud-contaminated observations within the temporal extent of the available data. While these approaches improve temporal continuity, they are inherently restricted to the reconstruction of the gaps within the observed time periods, and do not address the prediction of future observations. This work proposes a probabilistic deep learning framework for the densification and forecasting of Sentinel-2 time series by generating optical images at arbitrary past or future dates. The approach leverages multimodal satellite data by jointly exploiting Sentinel-2 optical and Sentinel-1 SAR observations. Unlike most existing works, we propose to focus on the uncertainty of the generated images. Experimental results demonstrate effective densification and forecasting, on sparse and temporally misaligned time series.

ai.tldr: 提出一种概率深度学习框架，利用多模态SAR和光学卫星数据对Sentinel-2时间序列进行加密和预测，并关注生成图像的不确定性。
ai.motivation: 光学卫星图像时间序列因云层和条带边缘导致采样不规则，限制连续监测；现有方法仅能重建历史缺失观测，无法预测未来。
ai.method: 构建概率深度学习模型，联合利用Sentinel-2光学和Sentinel-1 SAR观测，生成任意过去或未来日期的光学图像，并量化不确定性。
ai.result: 在稀疏且时间不对齐的时间序列上实现了有效的加密和预测。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用多模态卫星数据和深度学习实现光学时间序列的连续化与未来预测，并评估预测可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 结合扩散模型或变分自编码器，进一步提升生成图像的时间一致性和物理合理性。
idea_spark.risk: 模型依赖多模态数据配准质量，且生成图像可能缺乏真实地物细节，需结合物理约束。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将不确定性估计引入时间序列预测，可启发其他领域（如气象、金融）的鲁棒预测方法。

en.tldr: Proposes a probabilistic deep learning framework for densification and forecasting of Sentinel-2 time series using multimodal SAR and optical satellite data, with a focus on uncertainty estimation.
en.motivation: Optical satellite time series suffer from irregular sampling due to clouds and swath edges, limiting continuous monitoring; existing methods only reconstruct past gaps and cannot predict future observations.
en.method: Builds a probabilistic deep learning model that jointly exploits Sentinel-2 optical and Sentinel-1 SAR observations to generate optical images at arbitrary past or future dates, while quantifying uncertainty.
en.result: Achieves effective densification and forecasting on sparse and temporally misaligned time series.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to leverage multimodal satellite data and deep learning for continuous optical time series and future prediction, with reliability assessment.

idea_spark.idea: Combine diffusion models or variational autoencoders to further improve temporal consistency and physical plausibility of generated images.
idea_spark.risk: Model relies on quality of multimodal data registration; generated images may lack real surface details, requiring physical constraints.
idea_spark.inspiration: Incorporating uncertainty estimation into time series forecasting can inspire robust prediction methods in other domains (e.g., meteorology, finance).

keywords_raw: multimodal sar and optical satellite data

papers.title: Binary Image-Based Intrusion Detection for Operational Technology Networks: Extending the SPHBI Methodology from IoT to Modbus TCP
papers.summary: This paper extends the Single Packet Header Binary Image (SPHBI) intrusion detection methodology from IoT to Modbus TCP, evaluating five approaches spanning a gradient of protocol depth on the CIC Modbus 2023 dataset (11.4 million packets, eight detectable attack types). TCP/IP headers alone achieve only 51.8% binary accuracy, confirming that header-level heterogeneity exploited in IoT traffic is absent in uniform SCADA environments. Adding eight bytes of application-layer information improves binary accuracy to 98.1% with just 63 parameters, directly relevant to per-packet classification on resource-constrained OT edge devices. The best-performing approach achieves 94.4% +/- 2.2pp multiclass accuracy across nine classes (95% CI [92.9%, 95.9%], 10 seeds) with 56,873 parameters, roughly 430 times fewer than comparable ResNet50-based approaches. Per-class recall analysis shows seven of eight detectable attack types identified with recall above 94%, while replay attacks remain structurally undetectable by any single-packet method.

ai.tldr: 将SPHBI入侵检测方法从IoT扩展到Modbus TCP，在CIC Modbus 2023数据集上评估五种协议深度方案，最佳方法以56,873参数达到94.4%多类准确率，参数数量仅为ResNet50的1/430。
ai.motivation: 现有基于报头异构性的IoT入侵检测方法在均匀的SCADA环境中失效，需要针对OT网络设计轻量级单包分类方案。
ai.method: 基于单包报头二进制图像（SPHBI）方法，从仅TCP/IP报头到包含8字节应用层信息，逐步增加协议深度，使用卷积神经网络进行分类。
ai.result: 仅TCP/IP报头准确率51.8%，添加8字节应用层信息后二分类准确率98.1%（63参数），最佳多类方案准确率94.4%±2.2pp，重放攻击无法被任何单包方法检测。
ai.help_to_user: 为OT网络入侵检测提供了轻量级、高准确率的解决方案，特别适合资源受限的边缘设备。

idea_spark.idea: 结合时序特征或跨包上下文，可能解决重放攻击的检测难题。
idea_spark.risk: 对未知攻击或协议变种的泛化能力需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用极少量应用层信息即可大幅提升检测性能，启发在OT场景中优先提取关键协议字段。

en.tldr: Extends SPHBI intrusion detection from IoT to Modbus TCP, evaluating five protocol-depth approaches on CIC Modbus 2023 dataset; best method achieves 94.4% multiclass accuracy with 56,873 parameters, roughly 430x fewer than ResNet50.
en.motivation: Existing header-heterogeneity-based IoT intrusion detection fails in uniform SCADA environments, necessitating lightweight single-packet classification for OT networks.
en.method: Extends Single Packet Header Binary Image (SPHBI) methodology by incrementally adding protocol depth from pure TCP/IP headers to including 8 bytes of application-layer data, using CNNs for classification.
en.result: TCP/IP headers alone yield 51.8% accuracy; adding 8 application-layer bytes boosts binary accuracy to 98.1% (63 parameters); best multiclass approach achieves 94.4%±2.2pp; replay attacks remain undetectable by any single-packet method.
en.help_to_user: Provides a lightweight, high-accuracy intrusion detection solution for OT networks, especially suitable for resource-constrained edge devices.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporating temporal features or cross-packet context may address the detection of replay attacks.
idea_spark.risk: Generalization to unknown attacks or protocol variants requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging minimal application-layer information dramatically improves performance, inspiring prioritization of key protocol fields in OT scenarios.

papers.title: Almost-Orthogonality in Lp Spaces: A Case Study with Grok
papers.summary: Carbery proposed the following sharpened form of triangle inequality for many functions: for any $p\ge 2$ and any finite sequence $(f_j)_j\subset L^p$ we have \[ \Big\|\sum_j f_j\Big\|_p \ \le\ \left(\sup_{j} \sum_{k} α_{jk}^{\,c}\right)^{1/p'} \Big(\sum_j \|f_j\|_p^p\Big)^{1/p}, \] where $c=2$, $1/p+1/p'=1$, and $α_{jk}=\sqrt{\frac{\|f_{j}f_{k}\|_{p/2}}{\|f_{j}\|_{p}\|f_{k}\|_{p}}}$. In the first part of this paper we construct a counterexample showing that this inequality fails for every $p>2$. We then prove that if an estimate of the above form holds, the exponent must satisfy $c\le p'$. Finally, at the critical exponent $c=p'$, we establish the inequality for all integer values $p\ge 2$.   In the second part of the paper we obtain a sharp three-function bound \[ \Big\|\sum_{j=1}^{3} f_j\Big\|_p \ \le\ \left(1+2Γ^{c(p)}\right)^{1/p'} \Big(\sum_{j=1}^{3} \|f_j\|_p^p\Big)^{1/p}, \] where $p \geq 3$, $c(p) = \frac{2\ln(2)}{(p-2)\ln(3)+2\ln(2)}$ and $Γ=Γ(f_1,f_2,f_3)\in[0,1]$ quantifies the degree of orthogonality among $f_1,f_2,f_3$. The exponent $c(p)$ is optimal, and improves upon the power $r(p) = \frac{6}{5p-4}$ obtained previously by Carlen, Frank, and Lieb. Some intermediate lemmas and inequalities appearing in this work were explored with the assistance of the large language model Grok.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了Lp空间中函数序列的几乎正交性，构造了Carbery不等式在p>2时的反例，并得到了最优的三函数界。
ai.motivation: 改进经典的三角不等式，探索函数序列在Lp空间中的正交性对范数上界的影响。
ai.method: 通过构造反例和精细的范数估计，确定Carbery不等式中指数c的最优范围，并利用Grok辅助推导中间引理。
ai.result: Carbery不等式在p>2时失效；临界指数c=p'时对所有整数p≥2成立；三函数界中的指数c(p)是最优的。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解Lp空间中函数正交性对范数上界的影响，以及如何利用大语言模型辅助数学证明。

idea_spark.idea: 利用大语言模型自动探索类似不等式的反例构造或最优指数猜测。

zh.tldr: 本文研究了Lp空间中函数序列的几乎正交性，构造了Carbery不等式在p>2时的反例，并得到了最优的三函数界。
zh.motivation: 改进经典的三角不等式，探索函数序列在Lp空间中的正交性对范数上界的影响。
zh.method: 通过构造反例和精细的范数估计，确定Carbery不等式中指数c的最优范围，并利用Grok辅助推导中间引理。
zh.result: Carbery不等式在p>2时失效；临界指数c=p'时对所有整数p≥2成立；三函数界中的指数c(p)是最优的。

en.tldr: This paper studies almost-orthogonality in Lp spaces, constructs a counterexample to Carbery's inequality for p>2, and obtains an optimal three-function bound.
en.motivation: To sharpen the triangle inequality and understand how orthogonality among functions affects norm bounds in Lp spaces.
en.method: Constructing counterexamples and refined norm estimates to determine the optimal range of exponent c in Carbery's inequality, with intermediate lemmas assisted by Grok.
en.result: Carbery's inequality fails for p>2; holds at critical exponent c=p' for all integer p≥2; the exponent c(p) in the three-function bound is optimal.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the role of orthogonality in Lp norm bounds and demonstrates the use of large language models in mathematical proof.

idea_spark.idea: Use large language models to automatically explore counterexamples or optimal exponent conjectures for similar inequalities.
idea_spark.risk: Large language models may produce incorrect or non-rigorous reasoning, requiring human verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine AI-assisted proof with classical analysis to accelerate conjecture formulation and verification.

papers.title: Global well-posedness and decay rates for the three dimensional incompressible active liquid crystals
papers.summary: This paper investigates the global well-posedness and large-time behavior of 3D incompressible active liquid crystals under constant activity, modeled by a coupled system of forced incompressible Navier-Stokes equations for the velocity and a parabolic system for the $Q$-tensor order parameter. By employing refined commutator estimates, the existence and uniqueness of global strong solutions are proved for small initial data $(Q_0,u_0)\in H^{s+1}\times H^s$ $(s\geq 2)$ with activity $c>c_\star$, which improves a previous result in \cite{active-limit}. In addition, if the initial data further belong to $L^1$ and $s\geq 4$, we obtain a mixing decay estimate on $\|\partial^kQ(t)\|_{L^2}$ that combines both an extra exponential decay factor at a rate proportional to $(c-c_\star)Γ$ and the optimal algebraic decay rate that coincides with that of the heat kernel, where $k\leq s-1$. This result reveals that, in the high activity regime, active nematics become isotropic with an activity-dependent exponential convergence rate, and the estimate is stable in the infinite rotational viscosity limit, as $Γ\rightarrow 0$. Meanwhile, the sharp decay estimate on $\|\partial^ku(t)\|_{L^2}$ is also derived for $k\leq s-2$ with an additional initial assumption. The proof is established via a combination of the Green's function method and the time-weighted energy method. To the best of our knowledge, these results are the first reported for active/passive nematic liquid crystals within the Beris-Edwards framework, and the enhanced decay effect of the orientational field is essentially derived from the free energy. Furthermore, in the passive setting, our result implies the phase transition of thermotropic liquid crystals at high temperatures.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了三维不可压缩活性液晶在恒定活性下的整体适定性和长时间行为，证明了小初始数据下全局强解的存在唯一性，并获得了混合衰减估计。

ai.method: 结合精细交换子估计、Green函数法和时间加权能量法。
ai.result: 证明了高活性区域中活性向列相以活性依赖的指数速率各向同性化，并获得了速度场的最优衰减估计。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了活性液晶系统全局解的存在性和衰减率的严格数学证明。

idea_spark.idea: 利用自由能增强取向场的衰减效应，可能用于设计更快的自组装过程。

idea_spark.inspiration: 活性依赖的指数衰减率启发我们探索活性调控材料性能的新途径。

en.tldr: This paper investigates global well-posedness and large-time behavior of 3D incompressible active liquid crystals under constant activity, proving existence and uniqueness of global strong solutions and obtaining mixing decay estimates.
en.motivation: Mathematical models for active liquid crystals are complex and existing results are limited, requiring deeper theoretical analysis.
en.method: Combination of refined commutator estimates, Green's function method, and time-weighted energy method.
en.result: Proved that in the high activity regime active nematics become isotropic with an activity-dependent exponential convergence rate, and obtained optimal decay estimates for the velocity field.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous mathematical proofs for existence and decay rates of global solutions for active liquid crystal systems.

idea_spark.idea: Using free energy to enhance decay of the orientational field may inspire design of faster self-assembly processes.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results rely on small initial data assumption; large perturbations may behave differently.
idea_spark.inspiration: Activity-dependent exponential decay rates suggest new ways to tune material properties via activity.

papers.title: Information Coordination as a Bridge: A Neuro-Symbolic Architecture for Reliable Autonomous Driving Scene Understanding
papers.summary: Reliable autonomous driving requires scene understanding that is semantically consistent across heterogeneous sensors and verifiable at the reasoning stage. However, many recent LLM-driven driving systems attach the language model as a post-processor and force it to reason over redundant or conflicting perception outputs, which can amplify hallucinated entities and unsafe conclusions. This paper proposes InfoCoordiBridge, a BEV-centric neuro-symbolic architecture that inserts an explicit coordination bridge between perception and language reasoning. InfoCoordiBridge comprises (i) a unified multi-agent perception layer that outputs typed structured facts together with modality-focused synopses, (ii) an ICA module that aligns and fuses multi-source outputs into a single SceneSummary, and (iii) an SSRE module that performs SceneSummary-grounded reasoning with verification. Experiments on nuScenes and Waymo show that ICA preserves competitive 3D detection accuracy while substantially improving fusion consistency, reducing redundancy to below 1% and achieving about 98% attribute agreement. On NuScenes-QA and a template-aligned Waymo-QA benchmark, SSRE improves factual grounding and reduces hallucinated entity mentions compared with representative VLM and agentic baselines. Overall, by coordinating multi-sensor outputs into a single conflict-aware SceneSummary before prompting, InfoCoordiBridge prevents redundant and cross-modally inconsistent perception evidence from propagating into high-level reasoning.

ai.tldr: 提出一种以BEV为中心的神经符号架构InfoCoordiBridge，通过显式的协调桥接感知与语言推理，减少冗余和冲突，提升自动驾驶场景理解的可靠性与事实性。
ai.motivation: 现有LLM驱动的驾驶系统将语言模型作为后处理器，被迫对冗余或冲突的感知输出进行推理，容易放大幻觉实体和不安全结论。
ai.method: 构建三层架构：统一多智能体感知层输出类型化结构化事实与模态摘要；ICA模块对齐融合多源输出为单一SceneSummary；SSRE模块基于SceneSummary进行可验证推理。
ai.result: 在nuScenes和Waymo上，ICA保持竞争性3D检测精度，融合冗余低于1%，属性一致约98%；SSRE在NuScenes-QA和Waymo-QA上减少幻觉实体提及，提升事实基础。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可验证、低幻觉的自动驾驶场景理解方案，适用于安全关键系统。

idea_spark.idea: 将冲突感知的SceneSummary作为中间表示，可进一步用于在线主动感知调度。
idea_spark.risk: SceneSummary的构建依赖预定义类型化事实，可能限制对未知场景的泛化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类多感官协调机制启发，先整合再推理的策略可减少下游幻觉。

en.tldr: Proposes InfoCoordiBridge, a BEV-centric neuro-symbolic architecture that inserts an explicit coordination bridge between perception and language reasoning to reduce redundancy and conflict, improving reliability and factual grounding in autonomous driving scene understanding.
en.motivation: Existing LLM-driven driving systems attach the language model as a post-processor, forcing it to reason over redundant or conflicting perception outputs, which can amplify hallucinated entities and unsafe conclusions.
en.method: Builds a three-layer architecture: a unified multi-agent perception layer outputting typed structured facts with modality-focused synopses; an ICA module that aligns and fuses multi-source outputs into a single SceneSummary; and an SSRE module performing SceneSummary-grounded reasoning with verification.
en.result: On nuScenes and Waymo, ICA preserves competitive 3D detection accuracy while reducing fusion redundancy below 1% and achieving about 98% attribute agreement; SSRE reduces hallucinated entity mentions and improves factual grounding on NuScenes-QA and a template-aligned Waymo-QA benchmark.
en.help_to_user: Provides a verifiable, low-hallucination scene understanding solution for safety-critical autonomous driving systems.

idea_spark.idea: The conflict-aware SceneSummary as an intermediate representation could be further used for online active perception scheduling.
idea_spark.risk: Construction of SceneSummary relies on predefined typed facts, which may limit generalization to unseen scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by human multi-sensory coordination, the strategy of integrating before reasoning can reduce downstream hallucinations.

papers.title: LLMs Uncertainty Quantification via Adaptive Conformal Semantic Entropy
papers.summary: LLMs' overconfidence, particularly when hallucinating, poses a significant challenge for the deployment of the models in safety-critical settings and makes a reliable estimation of uncertainty necessary. Existing approaches for uncertainty quantification typically prioritize lexical or probabilistic measures; however, these techniques often ignore the semantic variance of different responses with similar meaning. In this paper, we propose Adaptive Conformal Semantic Entropy (ACSE), a method for estimating prompt-level uncertainty by adaptively measuring semantic dispersion in LLMs outputs. Our uncertainty scoring function is based on clustering semantic entropy of multiple diverse responses to the same prompt. The function adaptively adjusts the uncertainty score based on semantic features of each cluster. To ensure statistical reliability of our score, we use conformal calibration to apply a decision rule to accept/abstain the prompts, providing a finite-sample, distribution-free guarantee such that the error rate among the accepted responses remains bounded by a user-specified tolerance. Our extensive experimental evaluations using different LLMs and datasets, demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art uncertainty quantification baselines using discriminative performance, conformal guarantees, and probabilistic calibration indicators. As a highlight, for TriviaQA dataset, AUROC of our approach is 0.88 compared to 0.65 produced by the token entropy approach.

ai.tldr: 提出自适应共形语义熵（ACSE）方法，通过聚类语义熵和共形校准实现LLM输出不确定性量化，在多个数据集上优于现有基线。
ai.motivation: 现有不确定性量化方法多基于词法或概率度量，忽略语义相似但表达不同的响应间的语义差异，导致对模型过度自信（尤其是幻觉）的估计不准确。
ai.method: 对同一提示的多个多样响应进行聚类，计算每个聚类的语义熵，并自适应调整不确定性分数；再通过共形校准提供有限样本、无分布假设的统计保证，决定接受或放弃该提示。
ai.result: 在TriviaQA等数据集上，AUROC达到0.88，远超词元熵方法的0.65，并在判别性能、共形保证和概率校准指标上持续优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户判断LLM输出是否可靠，在安全关键场景中决定是否采纳模型回答。

idea_spark.idea: 将语义聚类与共形预测结合，实现无需分布假设的可靠不确定性量化。
idea_spark.risk: 聚类质量依赖响应多样性，若响应过于同质可能降低区分度；共形校准需足够校准集。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从语义熵和共形预测的交叉点出发，解决LLM幻觉检测中语义等价但表达不同的问题。

zh.tldr: 提出自适应共形语义熵（ACSE）方法，通过聚类语义熵和共形校准实现LLM输出不确定性量化，在多个数据集上优于现有基线。

idea_spark.idea: 将语义聚类与共形预测结合，实现无需分布假设的可靠不确定性量化。
idea_spark.risk: 聚类质量依赖响应多样性，若响应过于同质可能降低区分度；共形校准需足够校准集。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从语义熵和共形预测的交叉点出发，解决LLM幻觉检测中语义等价但表达不同的问题。

en.tldr: Proposes Adaptive Conformal Semantic Entropy (ACSE) for LLM uncertainty quantification via clustering semantic entropy and conformal calibration, outperforming baselines on multiple datasets.
en.motivation: Existing methods rely on lexical or probabilistic measures, ignoring semantic variance among responses with similar meaning, leading to poor estimation of model overconfidence, especially during hallucination.
en.method: Clusters multiple diverse responses to the same prompt, computes semantic entropy per cluster, adaptively adjusts uncertainty scores, and applies conformal calibration for finite-sample distribution-free guarantees to accept or abstain prompts.
en.result: Achieves AUROC of 0.88 on TriviaQA vs. 0.65 for token entropy, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art baselines in discriminative performance, conformal guarantees, and probabilistic calibration.
en.help_to_user: Helps users assess reliability of LLM outputs, enabling informed decisions in safety-critical applications.

idea_spark.idea: Integrates semantic clustering with conformal prediction for distribution-free reliable uncertainty quantification.
idea_spark.risk: Clustering quality depends on response diversity; homogeneous responses may reduce discriminability; conformal calibration requires a sufficient calibration set.
idea_spark.inspiration: Bridges semantic entropy and conformal prediction to address hallucination detection where semantically equivalent responses vary in expression.

papers.title: Quantum Dynamics: A Dilation-Based Approach
papers.summary: In the study of open quantum systems, one commonly describes the evolution of a system of interest through reduced dynamics, obtained by treating the environment indirectly rather than as a part of the full model. This thesis presents an expository account of an alternative, dilation-based viewpoint in the finite-dimensional setting, where a family of reduced dynamics is represented through unitary evolution on a larger system consisting of the original system together with an ancillary environment. After reviewing the reduced-dynamics perspective and the language of quantum channels, we formulate finite-dimensional quantum dynamics as channel-valued dynamical curves and use this framework to discuss Stinespring dilations of such curves. We then present exact dilation results for analytic dynamical curves, explain the singular behavior that can arise at t=0, and describe approximation results showing that Lipschitz-continuous dynamical curves admit approximate finite-dimensional Stinespring dilations. The thesis therefore provides a mathematically focused introduction to dilation-based modeling of quantum dynamics and argues that a change of perspective can lead to new ways of formulating problems in the theory of open quantum systems.

ai.tldr: 本文以数学视角介绍基于扩张的量子动力学建模方法，将约化动力学表示为包含辅助环境的更大系统上的酉演化，并讨论解析和Lipschitz连续动力学曲线的精确与近似扩张结果。
ai.motivation: 传统开放量子系统通过间接处理环境来获得约化动力学，本文提出一种替代的扩张视角，旨在通过酉扩张统一描述动力学曲线，为开放系统问题提供新思路。
ai.method: 在有限维设定下，将量子动力学表述为通道值动力学曲线，利用Stinespring扩张定理对曲线进行精确扩张，并针对t=0处的奇异行为及Lipschitz连续曲线给出近似扩张结果。
ai.result: 解析动力学曲线存在精确有限维Stinespring扩张，Lipschitz连续曲线存在近似有限维Stinespring扩张，且t=0处可能出现奇异行为。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解基于扩张的量子动力学建模框架，掌握Stinespring扩张在动力学曲线中的应用及近似方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用扩张视角设计新的量子模拟算法，通过构造辅助环境实现特定非马尔可夫动力学。
idea_spark.risk: 扩张的维度可能随精度要求急剧增长，实际实现中需权衡近似误差与资源开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将动力学曲线视为通道值映射，启发我们探索更一般的非酉动力学表示，如通过张量网络或神经网络参数化扩张。

en.tldr: This thesis presents a mathematically focused introduction to dilation-based modeling of quantum dynamics, representing reduced dynamics as unitary evolution on a larger system with an ancillary environment, and discusses exact and approximate Stinespring dilations for analytic and Lipschitz-continuous dynamical curves.
en.motivation: Traditional open quantum systems treat the environment indirectly; this work proposes a dilation-based perspective to unify reduced dynamics via unitary dilations, offering new ways to formulate problems in open quantum systems.
en.method: In finite dimensions, quantum dynamics are formulated as channel-valued dynamical curves. Stinespring dilation is applied for exact dilation of analytic curves, and approximation results are given for Lipschitz-continuous curves, addressing singular behavior at t=0.
en.result: Exact finite-dimensional Stinespring dilations exist for analytic dynamical curves, and approximate dilations exist for Lipschitz-continuous curves, with possible singular behavior at t=0.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the dilation-based framework for quantum dynamics, including Stinespring dilations for dynamical curves and approximation methods.

idea_spark.idea: Use the dilation perspective to design new quantum simulation algorithms by constructing ancillary environments to realize specific non-Markovian dynamics.
idea_spark.risk: The dimension of the dilation may grow rapidly with required precision, posing trade-offs between approximation error and resource overhead in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Viewing dynamical curves as channel-valued maps inspires exploration of more general non-unitary representations, such as parameterizing dilations via tensor networks or neural networks.

papers.title: Stability and dynamics of dark-bright solitons in spin-orbit- and Rabi-coupled binary Bose-Einstein condensates
papers.summary: We investigate the stability and nonlinear dynamics of dark-bright solitons in a one-dimensional binary Bose-Einstein condensate subjected to synthetic spin-orbit and Rabi couplings. In the absence of spin-orbit coupling, we map the coupled Gross-Pitaevskii equations onto the integrable Manakov model and obtain exact dark-bright soliton solutions, providing a rigorous theoretical benchmark. We demonstrate that finite spin-orbit coupling breaks integrability by inducing spin-dependent phase gradients, which result in spatial separation of the spin components and the emergence of intrinsic density oscillations. By contrast, Rabi coupling enforces phase locking between components and supports robust breather-like excitations. Using imaginary-time propagation together with Bogoliubov-de Gennes analysis, we systematically characterise ground-state phases and excitation spectra for both symmetric and asymmetric interaction regimes in homogeneous and harmonically trapped systems. Real-time simulations further demonstrate that finite gauge fields and interaction quenches drive the system far from equilibrium, giving rise to diverse nonlinear phenomena, including multi-soliton fragmentation, breathing stripe patterns, and soliton dynamics. Our results highlight the interplay of synthetic gauge fields, external confinement, and interaction engineering as powerful tools for controlling the stability and dynamical behaviour of nonlinear excitations in multicomponent quantum gases.
