en.tldr: We investigate the stability and nonlinear dynamics of dark-bright solitons in a binary Bose-Einstein condensate with synthetic spin-orbit and Rabi couplings.
en.motivation: To explore how synthetic gauge fields and interaction engineering control the stability and dynamics of nonlinear excitations in multicomponent quantum gases.
en.method: Mapping to the integrable Manakov model for exact solutions, combined with imaginary-time propagation and Bogoliubov-de Gennes analysis for ground-state phases and excitation spectra, and real-time simulations.
en.result: Spin-orbit coupling breaks integrability, inducing spin separation and density oscillations; Rabi coupling enforces phase locking and supports breather-like excitations; gauge fields and interaction quenches drive far-from-equilibrium dynamics including multi-soliton fragmentation and breathing stripe patterns.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical guidance for controlling the stability and dynamical behavior of nonlinear excitations in multicomponent quantum gases.

idea_spark.idea: Design programmable soliton dynamics via interaction quenches and gauge fields for quantum information processing or simulation.
idea_spark.risk: Experimental implementation may face challenges in precise parameter control and decoherence.
idea_spark.inspiration: The interplay of synthetic gauge fields and nonlinear excitations opens new avenues for exploring nonequilibrium quantum many-body physics.

papers.title: Euler Singularities II: Interior Quadrupole Blow-Up for Smooth Axisymmetric Euler with Swirl in \texorpdfstring{$\mathbb R^3$}
papers.summary: We present a self-contained interior quadrupole mechanism for finite-time singularity formation in the axisymmetric three-dimensional incompressible Euler equations with swirl in the whole space. The construction is localized away from the axis. In local variables \[   x=r-r_*(t),\qquad y=z, \] centered at a tracked radial point, the active vorticity and swirl profiles are \[   G(x,y,t)\approx a(t)xy,   \qquad   Γ(x,y,t)\approx Γ_*(t)+\frac12 b(t)xy^2,   \qquad Γ_*(t)>0. \] The first profile produces a positive interior Biot--Savart hyperbolic strain; the second profile makes the Euler source term in the equation for \(G=ω^θ/r\) regenerate the same quadrupole shape. The active quantity is the full four-quadrant quadrupole score, while a narrow diagonal sector is used only as a coercive subscore. We give the notation and the 5D recovery formula connecting the 3D axisymmetric variables to the lifted elliptic problem, construct explicit smooth decaying divergence-free data, verify their initial entry into the quadrupole bootstrap, prove the master propagation estimates, and derive the comparison system \[   Q'(t)\ge cC(t),\qquad C'(t)\ge cQ(t)C(t),\qquad C(t)\ge κQ(t)^2. \] Consequently the tracked quadrupole score blows up in finite comparison time, and the strain lower bound gives blow-up of \(\norm{\nabla u(t)}_{L^\infty}\). All geometric and analytic constraints used by the construction are stated as named estimates: the interior quadrupole kernel sign expansion, source compatibility, swirl-jet amplification, full-score/coercive-subscore comparison, angular-profile defect persistence, radial-center tracking, neutral-jet hierarchy, and two-sided Dini bounds.   This is Part II of a two-paper Euler series; Part I treats boundary blow-up in a periodic cylinder.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种自包含的内部四极子机制，用于三维轴对称带涡旋不可压缩欧拉方程在有限时间内形成奇点。
ai.motivation: 研究光滑欧拉流中奇点形成的内部机制，特别是远离轴线的四极子型爆破。
ai.method: 通过局部坐标变换和四极子评分系统，建立比较微分不等式，证明有限时间爆破。
ai.result: 四极子评分在有限比较时间内爆破，速度梯度L无穷范数也爆破。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解欧拉方程中奇点形成的具体构造和证明框架。

idea_spark.idea: 利用局部坐标和评分函数量化非线性增长，通过比较不等式证明爆破。
idea_spark.risk: 构造高度依赖特定对称性和剖面假设，推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从涡旋和应变场的相互作用中提炼出四极子机制，启发类似非线性系统的奇点研究。

en.tldr: A self-contained interior quadrupole mechanism for finite-time singularity formation in axisymmetric 3D incompressible Euler equations with swirl, localized away from the axis.
en.motivation: To study interior singularity mechanisms in smooth Euler flows, specifically quadrupole-type blow-up away from the symmetry axis.
en.method: Using local coordinates and a quadrupole scoring system, derive comparison differential inequalities that prove finite-time blow-up.
en.result: The quadrupole score blows up in finite comparison time, and the strain lower bound implies blow-up of the velocity gradient L∞ norm.
en.help_to_user: Provides a concrete construction and proof framework for singularity formation in the Euler equations.

idea_spark.idea: Use local coordinates and scoring functions to quantify nonlinear growth, then prove blow-up via comparison inequalities.
idea_spark.risk: The construction relies heavily on specific symmetry and profile assumptions; generalization requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: The quadrupole mechanism extracted from vortex-strain interaction inspires singularity studies in similar nonlinear systems.

papers.title: Uncertainty Quantification Methods for Optimal Excitation Design in Parameter Identification
papers.summary: Parameter identification is crucial in virtual engineering processes, yet determining appropriate system excitations for identifying specific parameters remains challenging. In practice, extensive experimental programs often fail to generate data with sufficient information content for reliable parameter estimation. This work presents a systematic approach for deriving optimal excitations by maximizing the global sensitivity of target parameters across the space of possible excitation functions. To address the computational challenge of sensitivity evaluation during optimization, we develop two complementary approaches based on uncertainty quantification (UQ) methods. For systems with known mathematical structure, we present an intrusive polynomial chaos expansion (PCE) method that constructs deterministic surrogate models, enabling rapid sensitivity computation. For black-box models where intrusive approaches are not feasible, we introduce a novel non-intrusive method based on optimal transport theory, specifically using Wasserstein distances to quantify sensitivity measures without requiring knowledge of internal system dynamics. Both methods significantly reduce computational costs, making optimal excitation design practical for complex engineering systems. We demonstrate the effectiveness of both approaches on vehicle dynamics models, showing substantial improvements in parameter identification capability. The benefit for parameter identification is further validated experimentally on a test vehicle and compared to the state of the art.

ai.tldr: 提出基于不确定性量化的最优激励设计方法，通过最大化全局灵敏度来提升参数辨识能力，并开发了侵入式多项式混沌展开和非侵入式最优传输两种高效计算方案。
ai.motivation: 参数辨识中激励设计困难，传统实验常无法产生信息量足够的数据，导致参数估计不可靠。
ai.method: 以全局灵敏度最大化为目标，对已知结构系统采用侵入式多项式混沌展开构建确定性代理模型；对黑箱系统引入基于最优传输理论的Wasserstein距离非侵入式方法。
ai.result: 两种方法均显著降低计算成本，在车辆动力学模型上验证了参数辨识能力的提升，并通过实车实验与现有技术对比。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用不确定性量化方法高效设计最优激励，从而在复杂工程系统中实现可靠参数辨识。

idea_spark.idea: 将Wasserstein距离与贝叶斯优化结合，进一步自适应地探索激励空间。
idea_spark.risk: 非侵入式方法对高维参数空间可能面临计算瓶颈，且最优传输的数值稳定性需关注。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从最优传输理论中借鉴距离度量来量化灵敏度，为黑箱模型提供了一种无需内部动力学的替代方案。

en.tldr: Proposes uncertainty quantification methods for optimal excitation design by maximizing global sensitivity, with an intrusive polynomial chaos expansion and a novel non-intrusive Wasserstein distance approach. Both reduce computational cost and improve parameter identification, validated on vehicle dynamics models and experimentally.
en.motivation: Excitation design for parameter identification is challenging; conventional experiments often yield data with insufficient information for reliable estimation.
en.method: Maximizes global sensitivity over excitation functions; uses intrusive polynomial chaos expansion for known-structure systems and a non-intrusive Wasserstein distance method for black-box models.
en.result: Both methods significantly lower computational cost, demonstrate improved parameter identification on vehicle dynamics models, and are validated experimentally against state-of-the-art.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to leverage uncertainty quantification for efficient optimal excitation design, enabling reliable parameter estimation in complex engineering systems.

idea_spark.idea: Combine Wasserstein distance with Bayesian optimization to adaptively explore the excitation space.
idea_spark.risk: Non-intrusive method may face computational bottlenecks in high-dimensional parameter spaces; numerical stability of optimal transport needs attention.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrowing distance metrics from optimal transport theory to quantify sensitivity offers a novel, dynamics-free alternative for black-box models.

papers.title: On a Partial Voigt Regularization of the 3D Magnetohydrodynamic Equations in Velocity-Vorticity Form
papers.summary: The Velocity-Vorticity (VV) formulation of the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations has become popular in recent years, especially in numerical studies, due to its structural advantages. Recently, with L. Rebholz, we introduced a Voigt regularization to the momentum equation in this formulation, establishing global well-posedness of the regularized system in 3D, along with convergence results and a blow-up criterion. In the present work, we extend these ideas to the 3D magnetohydrodynamics (MHD) equations. While it may seem that a ``VV-type'' split on the magnetic equation is required, we show that no such modification is necessary, and global well-posedness holds with a Voigt regularization only on the momentum equation, preserving the structure of both the vorticity and magnetic equations. We also prove that the regularized system converges to the original system, up to a possible blow-up time, and we establish a blow-up criterion for solutions to the original 3D MHD system.

ai.tldr: 本文对三维磁流体动力学方程在速度-涡量形式下引入部分Voigt正则化，证明了正则化系统的全局适定性、收敛性及爆破准则。
ai.motivation: 速度-涡量形式在数值研究中具有结构优势，但三维MHD方程的正则化理论尚不完善，需要建立全局适定性并保留方程结构。
ai.method: 仅在动量方程上施加Voigt正则化，保持涡量方程和磁方程结构不变，利用能量估计和紧性方法证明适定性和收敛性。
ai.result: 正则化系统全局适定，且收敛到原系统直到可能的爆破时间；同时给出了原系统解的一个爆破准则。
ai.help_to_user: 为三维MHD方程的数值模拟提供了理论依据，正则化方法可简化计算并保证解的稳定性。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将Voigt正则化仅应用于方程中非线性最强的部分，以平衡适定性与物理保真度。
idea_spark.risk: 正则化可能改变系统的长期动力学行为，需验证对湍流等关键现象的捕捉能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受速度-涡量形式在Navier-Stokes方程中成功应用的启发，将其扩展到磁流体动力学。

en.tldr: This paper introduces a partial Voigt regularization to the 3D magnetohydrodynamic equations in velocity-vorticity form, proving global well-posedness, convergence, and a blow-up criterion.
en.motivation: The velocity-vorticity formulation offers structural advantages for numerics, but regularization theory for 3D MHD equations is incomplete; global well-posedness preserving the equation structure is needed.
en.method: Apply Voigt regularization only to the momentum equation, leaving the vorticity and magnetic equations unchanged; use energy estimates and compactness arguments to prove well-posedness and convergence.
en.result: The regularized system is globally well-posed and converges to the original system up to a possible blow-up time; a blow-up criterion for the original 3D MHD system is established.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical support for numerical simulations of 3D MHD equations; the regularization simplifies computation while ensuring solution stability.

idea_spark.idea: Try applying Voigt regularization only to the most nonlinear part of the equations to balance well-posedness and physical fidelity.
idea_spark.risk: Regularization may alter long-term dynamics; verification of its ability to capture key phenomena like turbulence is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the successful application of velocity-vorticity form in Navier-Stokes equations, extended to magnetohydrodynamics.

papers.title: ARMATA: Auto-Regressive Multi-Agent Task Assignment
papers.summary: Coordinating multi-agent systems over spatially distributed areas requires solving a complex hierarchical problem: first distributing areas among agents (allocation) and subsequently determining the optimal visitation order (routing). Existing methods typically decouple these stages ignoring inter-stage dependencies or rely on decentralized heuristics that lack global context. In this work, we propose a centralized, fully end-to-end auto-regressive framework that jointly generates allocation decisions and routing sequences. The core contribution of our approach is a multi-stage decoding mechanism that unifies high-level allocation and low-level routing in a single autoregressive pass while maintaining a centralized global state. This enables the model to implicitly balance workload distribution with routing efficiency, avoiding local optima common in decentralized methods. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms diverse baselines, achieving up to a 20\% improvement in solution quality over industrial solvers such as Google OR-Tools, IBM CPLEX, and LKH-3, while reducing computation time from hours to seconds.

ai.tldr: 提出一种端到端自回归框架ARMATA，联合优化多智能体系统的区域分配与路径规划。
ai.motivation: 现有方法将分配与路由解耦或依赖分散启发式，忽略阶段间依赖且缺乏全局视角。
ai.method: 设计多阶段解码机制，在单次自回归过程中统一高层分配与低层路由，并维护集中全局状态。
ai.result: 相比Google OR-Tools、IBM CPLEX、LKH-3等工业求解器，解质量提升高达20%，计算时间从小时级降至秒级。
ai.help_to_user: 为多智能体空间协同任务提供高效、全局最优的联合求解方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将分配与路由的联合优化建模为序列生成任务，利用Transformer解码器隐式平衡负载与效率。
idea_spark.risk: 集中式框架可能面临大规模智能体时的可扩展性挑战，且依赖全局状态通信。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受自然语言处理中自回归生成启发，将组合优化转化为序列决策问题。

en.tldr: Proposes ARMATA, an end-to-end auto-regressive framework for joint allocation and routing in multi-agent systems.
en.motivation: Existing methods decouple allocation and routing or rely on decentralized heuristics, ignoring inter-stage dependencies and lacking global context.
en.method: A multi-stage decoding mechanism unifies high-level allocation and low-level routing in a single auto-regressive pass with a centralized global state.
en.result: Achieves up to 20% improvement in solution quality over industrial solvers like Google OR-Tools, IBM CPLEX, and LKH-3, reducing computation from hours to seconds.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient, globally optimal joint solution for spatially distributed multi-agent coordination tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Model allocation and routing as a sequence generation task, using a Transformer decoder to implicitly balance workload and efficiency.
idea_spark.risk: Centralized framework may face scalability issues with large agent counts and relies on global state communication.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by auto-regressive generation in NLP, transforming combinatorial optimization into a sequential decision problem.

papers.title: Contact Matrix: Enhancing Dance Motion Synthesis with Precise Interaction Modeling
papers.summary: Generating realistic reactive motions, in which one person reacts to the fixed motions of others, is challenging due to strict interaction constraints and a limited feasible solution space. This paper focuses on a typical scenario: duet dance, where high-quality data is scarce, motion patterns are complex, and the details of human interactions are both intricate and abundant. To tackle these challenges, we propose a novel two-stage framework. In the first stage, we introduce a motion VQ-VAE with separate body-part encoders and a joint decoder, enabling specialized codebooks to enhance representation capacity while dynamically modeling dependencies across body parts during decoding, thereby preventing inconsistencies in the generated motions. In the second stage, we propose a contact-aware diffusion model for reactive motion generation that jointly generates motion and a contact matrix between individuals, enabling explicit interaction modeling and providing guidance toward more precise and constrained interaction dynamics during sampling. Experiments show that our method outperforms Duolando with lower $\text{FID}_k$ (8.89 vs. 25.30) and $\text{FID}_{cd}$ (8.01 vs. 9.97), as well as a higher BED (0.4606 vs. 0.2858), indicating improved interaction fidelity and rhythmic synchronization.

ai.tldr: 提出两阶段框架，通过运动VQ-VAE和接触感知扩散模型生成双人舞反应动作，显式建模接触矩阵以提升交互精度。
ai.motivation: 双人舞中反应动作生成面临交互约束严格、数据稀缺、运动模式复杂等挑战，现有方法难以精确建模人体间接触细节。
ai.method: 第一阶段用分离身体部位编码器和联合解码器的运动VQ-VAE增强表示能力；第二阶段用接触感知扩散模型联合生成运动与接触矩阵，实现显式交互建模。
ai.result: 在双人舞数据集上，FIDk（8.89 vs 25.30）、FIDcd（8.01 vs 9.97）和BED（0.4606 vs 0.2858）均优于Duolando。
ai.help_to_user: 可帮助用户生成更自然、节奏同步的双人舞蹈动画，适用于虚拟角色互动、游戏或影视制作。

idea_spark.idea: 将接触矩阵扩展为时空图，结合图神经网络预测交互演化，或引入物理约束（如力、动量）提升真实感。

en.tldr: Proposes a two-stage framework with motion VQ-VAE and contact-aware diffusion model to generate reactive duet dance motions, explicitly modeling contact matrix for precise interaction.
en.motivation: Reactive motion generation in duet dance faces strict interaction constraints, scarce data, and complex motion patterns; existing methods struggle to model fine-grained human contact details.
en.method: Stage 1 uses a motion VQ-VAE with separate body-part encoders and a joint decoder to enhance representation; Stage 2 uses a contact-aware diffusion model to jointly generate motion and contact matrix for explicit interaction modeling.

idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by contact matrix, explore explicit modeling of other interaction modalities (e.g., gaze, speech) for multimodal reactive generation.

papers.title: Exact SU(2) Yang-Mills Waves from a Simple Ansatz
papers.summary: We propose a simple ansatz to construct exact wave solutions of the sourceless SU(2) Yang-Mills equations in (3+1) dimensions. The ansatz employs a $y$-dependent rotated Pauli basis and assumes a phase $θ=kz-ωt$ dependence for the gauge potentials. Owing to this ansatz, the nonlinear field equations reduce to nine algebraic constraints, whose complete solution yields three families of exact waves. Family I describes linear (Abelian) electromagnetic waves embedded in the non-Abelian theory; all commutator terms vanish and the dispersion relation is $ω=kc$. Family II represents genuinely nonlinear self-interacting waves that also propagate at the speed of light but exhibit a constant field offset, nonvanishing commutators, and do not obey superposition. The constant offset is gauge-invariant and gives rise to a non-zero time-averaged color-electric field. The energy density has nodes whose position ($θ=0$ or $θ=π$) is controlled by a discrete topological parameter $ξη=\pm1$, providing an observable signature. Family III is a pure gauge solution with vanishing field strengths, valid for arbitrary $k$ and $ω$ without any dispersion relation. All solutions are closed-form and provide new insights into how non-Abelian self-interactions fundamentally alter wave propagation.

ai.tldr: 提出一个简单ansatz，精确构造(3+1)维无源SU(2)杨-米尔斯方程的波解，得到三个波族。
ai.motivation: 寻找非阿贝尔规范场中非线性自相互作用的精确波解，以理解其与线性电磁波的根本差异。
ai.method: 采用y依赖的旋转Pauli基，假设规范势具有相位θ=kz-ωt，将非线性场方程简化为九个代数约束，完全求解得到三个波族。
ai.result: 族I为嵌入的线性电磁波；族II为非线性自相互作用波，以光速传播，具有规范不变的常数偏移和非零时间平均色电场，能量密度节点由拓扑参数ξη=±1控制；族III为纯规范解。
ai.help_to_user: 提供精确闭式解，可用于检验数值方法、研究非阿贝尔自相互作用对波传播的影响。

idea_spark.idea: 利用拓扑参数控制能量密度节点，可能用于构造可观测的非阿贝尔波特征。
idea_spark.risk: 族II的常数偏移可能破坏某些对称性，需验证其物理可实现性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将非线性场方程简化为代数约束的思路，可启发其他非线性偏微分方程的精确解构造。

en.tldr: A simple ansatz yields exact wave solutions of sourceless SU(2) Yang-Mills equations in (3+1) dimensions, producing three families of waves.
en.motivation: To construct exact wave solutions in non-Abelian gauge theory and understand how nonlinear self-interactions fundamentally alter wave propagation.
en.method: Using a y-dependent rotated Pauli basis and assuming a phase θ=kz-ωt dependence, the nonlinear field equations reduce to nine algebraic constraints, solved completely to yield three wave families.

en.help_to_user: Provides closed-form exact solutions useful for testing numerical methods and studying non-Abelian self-interaction effects on wave propagation.

idea_spark.idea: Using topological parameters to control energy density nodes may lead to observable signatures of non-Abelian waves.
idea_spark.risk: The constant offset in Family II might break certain symmetries; physical realizability needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Reducing nonlinear PDEs to algebraic constraints can inspire exact solution construction for other nonlinear systems.

papers.title: Sharp Dirichlet eigenvalue inequalities on triangles
papers.summary: We prove sharp Dirichlet eigenvalue inequalities for planar triangles. We settle a conjecture of Laugesen and Siudeja by showing that the equilateral triangle uniquely minimizes a scale-invariant functional of the first Dirichlet eigenvalue, area, and perimeter. Consequences include an optimal two-term lower bound for the first Dirichlet eigenvalue in terms of area and perimeter. We also prove a Cheeger-type inequality with an explicit best constant considered by Parini. To prove these conjectures we propose a new method for proving Dirichlet eigenvalue inequalities on triangles. Our method is based on a new computable lower bound for second-order directional shape derivatives under vertex perturbations. It also uses validated finite-element error estimates and recently developed analytic estimates for eigenvalues of nearly degenerate triangles. The method is not specific to the functionals considered in this paper and it can be used to prove various other eigenvalue inequalities on triangles.

ai.tldr: 证明了平面三角形上尖锐的Dirichlet特征值不等式，解决了Laugesen和Siudeja的猜想，并提出了基于顶点扰动下方向形状导数下界的新方法。
ai.motivation: 解决关于等边三角形最小化第一Dirichlet特征值、面积和周长尺度不变泛函的猜想，并得到最优的两项下界。
ai.method: 提出一种新方法，利用顶点扰动下二阶方向形状导数的可计算下界，结合验证的有限元误差估计和近退化三角形的解析估计。
ai.result: 等边三角形唯一最小化该泛函，得到第一Dirichlet特征值关于面积和周长的最优两项下界，并证明了具有显式最佳常数的Cheeger型不等式。
ai.help_to_user: 为三角形区域上的特征值问题提供了精确的解析界，可用于数值验证和形状优化。

idea_spark.idea: 利用顶点扰动下的形状导数下界，结合数值验证，证明几何泛函的极值性质。
idea_spark.risk: 对复杂形状或高维问题，形状导数的计算和误差控制可能变得困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将解析估计与验证的数值方法结合，为证明几何不等式提供了新范式。

en.tldr: Proves sharp Dirichlet eigenvalue inequalities on planar triangles, settling a conjecture of Laugesen and Siudeja, and introduces a new method based on computable lower bounds for second-order directional shape derivatives under vertex perturbations.
en.motivation: To resolve the conjecture that the equilateral triangle uniquely minimizes a scale-invariant functional of the first Dirichlet eigenvalue, area, and perimeter, and to obtain an optimal two-term lower bound.
en.method: Proposes a new method using computable lower bounds for second-order directional shape derivatives under vertex perturbations, combined with validated finite-element error estimates and analytic estimates for nearly degenerate triangles.
en.result: The equilateral triangle uniquely minimizes the functional, yielding an optimal two-term lower bound for the first Dirichlet eigenvalue in terms of area and perimeter, and a Cheeger-type inequality with an explicit best constant.
en.help_to_user: Provides precise analytic bounds for eigenvalue problems on triangles, useful for numerical validation and shape optimization.

idea_spark.idea: Use shape derivative lower bounds under vertex perturbations combined with numerical validation to prove extremal properties of geometric functionals.
idea_spark.risk: For complex shapes or higher dimensions, computing shape derivatives and controlling errors may become challenging.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining analytic estimates with validated numerical methods offers a new paradigm for proving geometric inequalities.

papers.title: Think-Aloud Reshapes Automated Cognitive Model Discovery Beyond Behavior
papers.summary: Computational cognitive models discovered using large language models have so far relied solely on behavioral data. However, it is well-known that models produced from the behavioral trajectory alone are typically under-determined. In this work, we explore the use of Think Aloud traces as an additional form of data constraint during automated model discovery. When applied to the domain of risky decision-making, we find that the models discovered with think-aloud achieve significantly improved predictive performance on held-out data. Additionally, we find that the discovered models belong to different structural classes than those discovered from behavior alone for the majority of participants (69.4\%), specifically, it shifts from Explicit comparator towards Integrated utility. These results suggest that process-level language data not only improve model fit, but also systematically reshape the structure of the discovered cognitive models, enabling the identification of mechanisms that are not recoverable from behavior alone.

ai.tldr: 利用出声思维数据约束大语言模型自动发现的认知模型，在风险决策领域显著提升预测性能，并改变模型结构类别。
ai.motivation: 仅依赖行为数据发现的认知模型通常欠定，需要额外约束来识别更准确的机制。
ai.method: 在自动模型发现过程中引入出声思维轨迹作为额外数据约束，应用于风险决策任务。
ai.result: 出声思维发现的模型在留出数据上预测性能显著提升，且69.4%参与者的模型结构从显式比较转向集成效用类。
ai.help_to_user: 展示如何利用语言过程数据改进认知模型自动发现，提升模型可解释性和预测力。

en.tldr: Using think-aloud traces as additional constraints in LLM-based automated cognitive model discovery improves predictive performance and shifts model structure classes in risky decision-making.
en.motivation: Models discovered from behavior alone are under-determined; additional constraints are needed to identify more accurate mechanisms.
en.method: Incorporating think-aloud traces as extra data constraints during automated model discovery, applied to risky decision-making.
en.result: Models discovered with think-aloud show significantly better predictive performance on held-out data, and 69.4% of participants' models shift from Explicit comparator to Integrated utility class.
en.help_to_user: Demonstrates how process-level language data can improve automated cognitive model discovery, enhancing interpretability and predictive power.

idea_spark.idea: Explore joint use of think-aloud and behavioral data for automated discovery of reinforcement learning or psychometric models.
idea_spark.risk: Think-aloud data may vary due to individual expression differences, requiring standardized collection and preprocessing.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires broader use of natural language process data as model constraints in cognitive science, moving beyond pure behavioral analysis.

papers.title: Recent progress in generalized Hamiltonian gradient flow: Singularities
papers.summary: This paper is a survey of the generalized Hamiltonian gradient flow (GHGF) framework for Hamilton-Jacobi equations, with an emphasis on the propagation of singularities and its connections to weak KAM theory, optimal transport and mean field control.   In addition to reviewing the main ideas and known results, we present two new contributions. First, we provide a variational construction of generalized characteristics via a minimizing movement scheme; by taking the weak limit of approximate solutions and using Young measure compactness, we show that the limiting curve satisfies the generalized characteristic differential inclusion. Second, we lift the forward dynamics of strict singular characteristics to a semi-flow on the space of trajectories and study its invariant probability measures. We prove that the only invariant measures of the GHGF semi-flow that attain the critical value \(c[H]\) are precisely the projected Mather measures, thereby giving a new dynamical characterization of Mather's minimal measures as well as Mañé's critical value.   Finally, we discuss a number of open problems that arise from the GHGF perspective, including questions on uniqueness of strict singular characteristics, rectifiability of cut loci, stability under perturbations, contact Hamiltonian systems, vanishing noise limits, and extensions to non-convex or low-regularity Hamiltonians. These problems highlight the deeper connections between singular dynamics, ergodic theory, optimal transport, and geometric analysis, and indicate directions for future research.

ai.tldr: 本文综述了广义哈密顿梯度流框架在Hamilton-Jacobi方程中的应用，重点讨论了奇点传播及其与弱KAM理论、最优输运和平均场控制的联系，并提出了两个新贡献：变分构造广义特征线以及将严格奇异特征的前向动力学提升为轨迹半流并研究其不变测度。
ai.motivation: 为了统一理解Hamilton-Jacobi方程中奇点传播的动力学机制，并揭示其与弱KAM理论、最优输运和平均场控制之间的深层联系。
ai.method: 采用变分法构造广义特征线，通过极小移动方案和Young测度紧性得到极限曲线满足广义特征微分包含；将严格奇异特征的前向动力学提升为轨迹半流，并分析其不变概率测度。
ai.result: 证明了GHGF半流中达到临界值的唯一不变测度正是投影Mather测度，从而给出了Mather极小测度和Mañé临界值的新动力学刻画。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解Hamilton-Jacobi方程中奇点传播的几何与动力学本质，以及GHGF框架如何连接多个数学物理领域。

idea_spark.idea: 利用GHGF半流的不变测度刻画来研究接触Hamilton系统的奇点传播和稳定性。
idea_spark.risk: 非凸或低正则性情形下变分构造的收敛性和唯一性可能难以保证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将Mather理论与最优输运中的Wasserstein梯度流结合，可能为平均场控制问题提供新的动力学视角。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将Mather理论与最优输运中的Wasserstein梯度流结合，可能为平均场控制问题提供新的动力学视角。

en.tldr: This paper surveys the generalized Hamiltonian gradient flow framework for Hamilton-Jacobi equations, focusing on singularity propagation and connections to weak KAM theory, optimal transport, and mean field control, and presents two new contributions: a variational construction of generalized characteristics and a lift of strict singular characteristic dynamics to a semi-flow on trajectory space with invariant measure analysis.
en.motivation: To unify the understanding of singularity propagation dynamics in Hamilton-Jacobi equations and reveal deep connections with weak KAM theory, optimal transport, and mean field control.
en.method: Variational construction of generalized characteristics via a minimizing movement scheme and Young measure compactness; lifting forward dynamics of strict singular characteristics to a semi-flow on trajectory space and studying its invariant probability measures.
en.result: Proved that the only invariant measures of the GHGF semi-flow attaining the critical value are the projected Mather measures, providing a new dynamical characterization of Mather's minimal measures and Mañé's critical value.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the geometric and dynamical nature of singularity propagation in Hamilton-Jacobi equations and how the GHGF framework connects multiple areas of mathematical physics.

idea_spark.idea: Use invariant measure characterization of GHGF semi-flow to study singularity propagation and stability in contact Hamiltonian systems.
idea_spark.risk: Convergence and uniqueness of variational constructions may be difficult to guarantee in non-convex or low-regularity settings.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining Mather theory with Wasserstein gradient flows in optimal transport may provide new dynamical perspectives for mean field control problems.

papers.title: AllSERP: Exhaustive Per-Element Enrichment of the Versatile AdSERP Dataset
papers.summary: We release AllSERP, a typed AOI and per-element behavioral enrichment of the AdSERP commercial-intent SERP corpus [4]. AdSERP ships 2,776 trials of full-page screenshots, captured SERP HTML, 150 Hz Gazepoint eye tracking, evtrack mouse telemetry, scroll, and pupil signals against real Google SERPs collected before AI Overviews -- but its bounding boxes cover only ad surfaces (15.5 % of attributable clicks). AllSERP adds pixel-accurate organic and widget bboxes via screenshot-anchored CV, semantic types across thirteen element types via an HTML parser, an inter-result gap-fill flavor (typed_gapfill), and X+Y click attribution that reaches 91.7 % of the corpus while flagging the rest at trial level. The Phase C ad-vs-non-ad partition is internally consistent with the shipped ad rectangles (0 disagreements across 38,250 classifications). We ship the pipeline, per-trial JSONs, a corpus CSV, and a browser-based replay viewer; everything is reproducible from the AdSERP Zenodo volume. The release enables per-element click, fixation, regression, and above-fold analyses that the shipped ads-vs-organic split could not resolve.

ai.tldr: 发布AllSERP，对AdSERP数据集进行逐元素的行为和类型增强，实现91.7%的点击归因。
ai.motivation: AdSERP数据集仅标注广告区域，无法支持有机结果和小部件的逐元素分析。
ai.method: 通过截图锚定的计算机视觉添加像素级边界框，利用HTML解析器标注13种语义类型，并实现点击归因。
ai.result: 点击归因覆盖91.7%的语料，广告与非广告分区与原始标注完全一致。
ai.help_to_user: 提供逐元素的点击、注视、回归和折叠上方分析能力。

idea_spark.idea: 结合视觉和HTML解析实现高精度逐元素行为归因。

idea_spark.inspiration: 利用多模态信息（截图+HTML+眼动）提升行为分析粒度。

idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage multimodal information (screenshots + HTML + eye tracking) to refine behavioral analysis granularity.

papers.title: A Factor-Graph Formulation of CSS Syndrome Decoding: Joint BP and Four-State BP
papers.summary: For CSS syndrome decoding, the two check matrices impose binary parity-check constraints on the two Pauli error components. The posterior can therefore be written as a binary factor graph with two Tanner graphs coupled by the local joint prior at each qubit. We call the sum-product algorithm on this factorization joint belief propagation (joint BP). Joint BP retains the local channel correlation between the two Pauli components. This note compares joint BP with the four-state Pauli-label factor graph used for four-state BP. The two algorithms are shown to have the same posterior weights, messages, and beliefs after relabeling the four local Pauli states and marginalizing the irrelevant binary component.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种基于因子图的CSS综合征解码方法，将联合BP与四态BP统一起来。
ai.motivation: 现有的CSS综合征解码方法中，联合BP和四态BP被视为不同算法，但两者之间存在深层联系，需要澄清其等价性。
ai.method: 将CSS码的两个校验矩阵对应的二分图通过每个量子比特的局部联合先验耦合，形成二元因子图，并应用和积算法得到联合BP；同时构建四态Pauli标签因子图实现四态BP。
ai.result: 证明了联合BP与四态BP在重新标记四个局部Pauli态并边缘化无关二元分量后，具有相同的后验权重、消息和置信度。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解两种BP解码算法在CSS码下的等价关系，为选择或改进解码方案提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 利用因子图框架统一不同BP变体，可设计更高效的混合解码策略，例如在联合BP中引入自适应消息调度。
idea_spark.risk: 等价性证明依赖于特定假设（如局部先验形式），实际实现中可能因近似或简化而偏离理论等价。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从消息传递角度统一解码算法，启发未来研究将更多BP变体纳入统一框架，简化解码器设计。

zh.motivation: 现有的CSS综合征解码方法中，联合BP和四态BP被视为不同算法，但两者之间存在深层联系，需要澄清其等价性。

en.tldr: A factor-graph formulation of CSS syndrome decoding unifies joint BP and four-state BP by showing their equivalence.
en.motivation: Joint BP and four-state BP were considered distinct algorithms for CSS decoding; their relationship needed clarification.
en.method: Construct a binary factor graph coupling two Tanner graphs via local joint priors at each qubit, yielding joint BP; also build a four-state Pauli-label factor graph for four-state BP.
en.result: After relabeling the four local Pauli states and marginalizing the irrelevant binary component, both algorithms produce identical posterior weights, messages, and beliefs.
en.help_to_user: Clarifies the equivalence between two BP decoding approaches for CSS codes, aiding algorithm selection and improvement.

idea_spark.idea: Unify different BP variants under a factor-graph framework to design more efficient hybrid decoders, e.g., with adaptive message scheduling.
idea_spark.risk: Equivalence proof relies on specific assumptions (e.g., local prior form); practical implementations may deviate due to approximations.
idea_spark.inspiration: Unifying decoding algorithms from a message-passing perspective inspires future work to incorporate more BP variants into a common framework, simplifying decoder design.

papers.title: Computer-Aided Design Generation by Cascaded Discrete Diffusion Model
papers.summary: Recent deep learning approaches seek to automate CAD creation by representing a model as a sequence of discrete commands and parameters, and then generating them using autoregressive models or continuous diffusion operating in Euclidean embedding space. However, continuous diffusion perturbs representations in a continuous Euclidean domain that does not reflect the inherently discrete and heterogeneous nature of CAD tokens, often producing perturbed representations that map to semantically invalid symbols. To overcome this limitation, we propose a cascaded discrete diffusion framework for CAD generation, which consists of a command diffusion for generating CAD commands and a parameter diffusion conditioned on CAD commands. Unlike isotropic Gaussian perturbation, the forward process of our approach operates directly over categorical token distributions using delicate transition matrices. For commands, we adopt an absorbing-state transition matrix that progressively corrupts tokens to a designated symbol; for parameters, we introduce specific transition matrices tailored to heterogeneous attributes: a Gaussian kernel for coordinate continuity, a scale-invariant kernel for dimensional values, and a prior-preserving kernel for boolean attributes. The reverse process is achieved by two denoising networks: a Transformer-based encoder for command recovery, and a parameter network with extra local self-attention for command-level interaction and cross-attention for conditional injection. Experiments on the DeepCAD dataset show that the proposed approach surpasses existing autoregressive and continuous diffusion models on unconditional generation metrics, while qualitative results validate effective controllability in conditional generation tasks. Source codes will be released.

ai.tldr: 提出级联离散扩散框架，直接在离散令牌分布上操作，用于CAD命令和参数生成，优于自回归和连续扩散模型。
ai.motivation: 连续扩散在欧氏空间扰动CAD令牌，产生语义无效符号，而CAD令牌本质是离散异构的。
ai.method: 命令扩散采用吸收态转移矩阵逐步腐蚀令牌；参数扩散针对坐标、尺寸、布尔属性设计专用核（高斯核、尺度不变核、先验保持核）；两个去噪网络（Transformer编码器+参数网络）实现逆向过程。
ai.result: 在DeepCAD数据集上，无条件生成指标超越现有自回归和连续扩散模型；条件生成任务中验证了有效可控性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何用离散扩散模型生成CAD模型，避免连续扩散的语义无效问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将异构属性专用核思想扩展到更多模态（如图形、音频）的离散生成。
idea_spark.risk: 专用核设计可能依赖领域先验，泛化到新属性类型需重新设计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 吸收态转移矩阵与条件参数扩散的结合，为离散生成提供新范式。

idea_spark.risk: 专用核设计可能依赖领域先验，泛化到新属性类型需重新设计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 吸收态转移矩阵与条件参数扩散的结合，为离散生成提供新范式。

en.tldr: Proposes a cascaded discrete diffusion framework operating directly on categorical token distributions for CAD command and parameter generation, outperforming autoregressive and continuous diffusion models.
en.motivation: Continuous diffusion perturbs CAD tokens in Euclidean space, producing semantically invalid symbols, while CAD tokens are inherently discrete and heterogeneous.
en.method: Command diffusion uses an absorbing-state transition matrix to progressively corrupt tokens; parameter diffusion designs specialized kernels (Gaussian, scale-invariant, prior-preserving) for heterogeneous attributes; two denoising networks (Transformer encoder + parameter network) achieve reverse process.
en.result: On DeepCAD dataset, unconditional generation metrics surpass existing autoregressive and continuous diffusion models; conditional generation tasks validate effective controllability.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to generate CAD models with discrete diffusion, avoiding semantic invalidity of continuous diffusion.

idea_spark.idea: Extend heterogeneous attribute kernel idea to more modalities (e.g., graphics, audio) for discrete generation.
idea_spark.risk: Specialized kernel design may rely on domain priors; generalization to new attribute types requires redesign.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combination of absorbing-state transition matrix and conditional parameter diffusion offers a new paradigm for discrete generation.

papers.title: LEGO: LoRA-Enabled Generator-Oriented Framework for Synthetic Image Detection
papers.summary: The rapid advancement of generative technologies has made synthetic images nearly indistinguishable from real ones, thereby creating an urgent need for robust detectors to counter misinformation. However, existing methods mainly rely on universal artifact features that are shared across multiple generators. We observe that as the diversity of generators increases, the overlap of these common features gradually decreases. This severely undermines model generalization. In contrast, focusing only on unique artifacts tends to cause overfitting to specific forgery patterns. To address this challenge, we propose LEGO (LoRA-Enabled Generator-Oriented Framework). The core mechanism of LEGO employs an MLP to modulate multiple LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) blocks, each pretrained to capture the unique artifacts of a specific generator, followed by attention-based feature fusion. Unlike conventional methods that seek a single universal solution, LEGO delegates unique artifact extraction to specialized LoRA modules by dividing its training procedure into two stages. Each LoRA module is individually trained on a single-generator dataset to learn generator-specific representations, then MLP and attention layers are trained on mixed datasets to dynamically regulate the contribution of each module. Benefiting from its modular yet robust design, LEGO can be naturally extended by incorporating new LoRA modules for adaptation to newly emerging next-generation datasets, while still achieving substantially better performance than prior SOTA methods with fewer than 30,000 training images, less than 10% of their training data, and only 5 epochs in each training stage.

ai.tldr: 提出LEGO框架，通过LoRA模块捕获生成器特有伪影，结合MLP调制与注意力融合，实现高效合成图像检测。
ai.motivation: 现有方法依赖通用伪影特征，但生成器多样性增加导致特征重叠减少，泛化性差；仅关注特有伪影又易过拟合。
ai.method: LEGO采用MLP调制多个预训练的LoRA模块，每个模块学习单一生成器的特有伪影，再通过注意力融合特征；训练分两阶段：先单独训练LoRA，再联合训练MLP和注意力层。
ai.result: 在少于30,000张训练图像、5个epoch下，性能超越先前SOTA方法，且可自然扩展至新生成器。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种模块化、数据高效的合成图像检测方案，便于快速适应新兴生成技术。

idea_spark.idea: 将LoRA模块替换为其他轻量适配方法（如Adapter、Prefix Tuning），探索不同调制策略。
idea_spark.risk: LoRA模块数量增加可能带来计算开销，且对未见生成器的泛化性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受生成器多样性挑战启发，模块化设计可推广至任何多源特征分离问题。

zh.tldr: 提出LEGO框架，通过LoRA模块捕获生成器特有伪影，结合MLP调制与注意力融合，实现高效合成图像检测。
zh.motivation: 现有方法依赖通用伪影特征，但生成器多样性增加导致特征重叠减少，泛化性差；仅关注特有伪影又易过拟合。
zh.method: LEGO采用MLP调制多个预训练的LoRA模块，每个模块学习单一生成器的特有伪影，再通过注意力融合特征；训练分两阶段：先单独训练LoRA，再联合训练MLP和注意力层。
zh.result: 在少于30,000张训练图像、5个epoch下，性能超越先前SOTA方法，且可自然扩展至新生成器。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种模块化、数据高效的合成图像检测方案，便于快速适应新兴生成技术。

idea_spark.idea: 将LoRA模块替换为其他轻量适配方法（如Adapter、Prefix Tuning），探索不同调制策略。
idea_spark.risk: LoRA模块数量增加可能带来计算开销，且对未见生成器的泛化性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受生成器多样性挑战启发，模块化设计可推广至任何多源特征分离问题。

en.tldr: Proposes LEGO, a framework using LoRA modules to capture generator-specific artifacts with MLP modulation and attention fusion for efficient synthetic image detection.
en.motivation: Existing methods rely on universal artifact features, but increasing generator diversity reduces feature overlap, harming generalization; focusing on unique artifacts causes overfitting.
en.method: LEGO uses an MLP to modulate multiple pretrained LoRA blocks, each learning unique artifacts of a single generator, followed by attention-based feature fusion; training is two-stage: individual LoRA training then joint MLP and attention training.
en.result: Outperforms prior SOTA with fewer than 30,000 training images and 5 epochs per stage, and naturally extends to new generators.
en.help_to_user: Provides a modular, data-efficient solution for synthetic image detection that adapts to emerging generative technologies.

idea_spark.idea: Replace LoRA modules with other lightweight adaptation methods (e.g., Adapter, Prefix Tuning) and explore different modulation strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Increasing LoRA modules may raise computational cost; generalization to unseen generators needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the challenge of generator diversity, modular design can generalize to any multi-source feature separation problem.

papers.title: An Optimal Regularity Theory for Immersed Stable Minimal Hypersurfaces with Small Singular Set
papers.summary: We show that if $M^n$ is a properly immersed, two-sided, stable minimal hypersurface in $B^{n+1}_1(0)\setminus S$, where $S$ is closed with $\mathcal{H}^{n-2}(S)=0$, then $\text{dim}_{\mathcal{H}}\text{sing}(M)\leq n-7$, namely $\overline{M}\cap B^{n+1}_1(0)$ is represented by a smooth minimal immersion outside a closed set of generally unavoidable singularities which has Hausdorff dimension at most $n-7$. This provides the optimal a priori size assumption on the non-immersed singular set in order to guarantee optimal regularity. Consequently, such objects form a compact class under mass upper bounds.

ai.tldr: 证明了在适当浸入的双边稳定极小超曲面中，若奇异集的Hausdorff维数不超过n-7，则超曲面在奇异集外是光滑的，且该维数条件是最优的。
ai.motivation: 研究浸入稳定极小超曲面在奇异集很小情况下的最优正则性，并确定奇异集可允许的最大尺寸。
ai.method: 利用几何测度论和变分法，通过分析奇异集的Hausdorff维数条件，建立正则性结论。
ai.result: 当奇异集的Hausdorff维数≤n-7时，浸入稳定极小超曲面在奇异集外光滑，且该条件是最优的；在此条件下，这类超曲面在质量上界下构成紧类。
ai.help_to_user: 为极小曲面理论提供了奇异集尺寸与正则性之间的精确关系，有助于理解高维极小超曲面的结构。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将奇异集维数条件从Hausdorff维数推广到更一般的测度论条件，或研究非稳定情形下的类似结论。
idea_spark.risk: 非稳定情形可能缺乏所需的变分结构，导致正则性结论不成立或需要更强的条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受几何测度论中极小曲面正则性经典结果的启发，思考奇异集维数作为正则性门槛的普适性。

zh.result: 当奇异集的Hausdorff维数≤n-7时，浸入稳定极小超曲面在奇异集外光滑，且该条件是最优的；在此条件下，这类超曲面在质量上界下构成紧类。

en.tldr: We prove that for a properly immersed two-sided stable minimal hypersurface, if the singular set has Hausdorff dimension at most n-7, then the hypersurface is smooth outside the singular set, and this dimension bound is optimal.
en.motivation: To determine the optimal a priori size of the non-immersed singular set that guarantees optimal regularity for immersed stable minimal hypersurfaces.
en.method: Using geometric measure theory and calculus of variations, we analyze the Hausdorff dimension condition on the singular set to establish the regularity result.
en.result: When the singular set has Hausdorff dimension ≤ n-7, the immersed stable minimal hypersurface is smooth outside the singular set, and this condition is optimal; under this condition, such hypersurfaces form a compact class under mass upper bounds.
en.help_to_user: Provides a precise relationship between singular set size and regularity in minimal surface theory, aiding understanding of high-dimensional minimal hypersurfaces.

idea_spark.idea: Attempt to generalize the singular set dimension condition from Hausdorff dimension to more general measure-theoretic conditions, or study analogous results in the unstable case.
idea_spark.risk: The unstable case may lack the necessary variational structure, causing the regularity conclusion to fail or require stronger conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by classical regularity results for minimal surfaces in geometric measure theory, we consider the universality of singular set dimension as a regularity threshold.

papers.title: Evolving Idea Graphs with Learnable Edits-and-Commits for Multi-Agent Scientific Ideation
papers.summary: LLM-empowered multi-agent systems offer new potential to accelerate scientific discovery by generating novel research ideas. However, existing methods typically coordinate agents through temporary texts, such as drafts or chat logs; it is difficult to pinpoint the weaknesses in the generated ideas and how the agents refine them. To this end, we introduce \textbf{Evolving Idea Graphs} (EIG), a graph-based multi-agent scientific ideation framework that can generate high-performance research ideas across various benchmark-native metrics, such as novelty, feasibility, and clarity. Instead of coordinating solely through texts, EIG represents a partially formed proposal as an evolving idea graph, where nodes capture scientific claims and edges encode relations (e.g., support and conflict), enabling unresolved weaknesses to remain identifiable throughout the idea evolving process. Specifically, a learned two-head controller operates over the evolving graph to guide the ideation: one head selects graph edits for agents to execute, while the other decides when the graph is ready for commit as final proposal synthesis. On AI Idea Bench 2025 and LiveIdeaBench, EIG outperforms all compared systems on both automatic benchmark scores and blind expert ratings. Ablations further show that explicit graph state provides the main performance gains, and learned edit-and-commit control adds consistent improvements.

ai.tldr: 提出Evolving Idea Graphs（EIG）框架，通过可学习的编辑-提交机制在多智能体科学构思中生成高质量研究想法。
ai.motivation: 现有方法依赖临时文本协调智能体，难以定位想法缺陷及改进过程。
ai.method: 将部分形成的提案表示为演化图，节点为科学主张，边为关系；双头控制器选择图编辑并决定提交时机。
ai.result: 在AI Idea Bench 2025和LiveIdeaBench上，EIG在自动评分和专家盲评中均优于所有对比系统。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户系统化生成和迭代研究想法，明确识别弱点并优化。

idea_spark.idea: 将图演化与强化学习结合，自动学习最优编辑策略。
idea_spark.risk: 图规模增长可能导致计算开销，需设计高效剪枝方法。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受软件版本控制启发，将构思过程建模为可追踪的图编辑序列。

en.tldr: Proposes Evolving Idea Graphs (EIG), a graph-based multi-agent framework with learnable edit-and-commit control for generating high-quality research ideas.
en.motivation: Existing methods rely on temporary texts, making it hard to pinpoint weaknesses and track how agents refine ideas.
en.method: Represents a partially formed proposal as an evolving graph with nodes (claims) and edges (relations); a two-head controller selects graph edits and decides when to commit.
en.result: EIG outperforms all compared systems on AI Idea Bench 2025 and LiveIdeaBench in both automatic scores and blind expert ratings.
en.help_to_user: Helps users systematically generate and iterate research ideas, clearly identifying weaknesses and improvements.

idea_spark.idea: Combine graph evolution with reinforcement learning to automatically learn optimal editing strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Graph size may grow large, requiring efficient pruning methods.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by software version control, modeling ideation as a traceable sequence of graph edits.

papers.title: Remarks on pairwise comparisons, transition amplitudes, and qubit states
papers.summary: We discuss a pairwise-comparison viewpoint on finite families of qubit states. Starting from transition amplitudes between pure states, we distinguish three associated levels of comparison data: complex amplitudes, transition probabilities, and phase-valued pairwise comparisons. In the non-orthogonal case, the phase data define a \(U(1)\)-valued reciprocal pairwise comparison structure. We show that the corresponding triangular defects are naturally related to normalized Bargmann invariants and therefore to geometric phases. This gives a simple interpretation of inconsistency-type quantities in terms of quantum kinematics. We also comment on realizability constraints coming from Gram matrices of rank at most two, and on the passage from unitary phase data to more general transition data. The aim of the paper is mainly conceptual: to isolate a common language between pairwise comparisons and elementary quantum geometry.

ai.tldr: 本文从成对比较的视角研究有限族量子比特态，通过跃迁振幅区分三种比较数据，并揭示非正交情形下相位数据与几何相位的关系。
ai.motivation: 为成对比较与初等量子几何建立共同语言，澄清量子运动学中不一致性量的几何解释。
ai.method: 分析跃迁振幅、跃迁概率和相位成对比较三个层次，利用归一化Bargmann不变量和Gram矩阵秩约束。
ai.result: 非正交相位数据定义U(1)值互反成对比较结构，三角缺陷与几何相位自然关联。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解量子态比较中的几何结构，以及成对比较数据与量子运动学的联系。

idea_spark.idea: 利用相位缺陷作为量子态非正交性的几何度量，可能用于量子信息处理中的态区分。
idea_spark.risk: 理论框架需实验验证，且对混合态或噪声环境的适用性待研究。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将决策理论中的成对比较一致性概念引入量子几何，启发新的量子态相似性度量。

en.tldr: This paper discusses a pairwise-comparison viewpoint on finite families of qubit states, distinguishing three levels of comparison data and relating phase data to geometric phases via Bargmann invariants.
en.motivation: To establish a common language between pairwise comparisons and elementary quantum geometry, clarifying the geometric interpretation of inconsistency-type quantities in quantum kinematics.
en.method: Analyzes three levels of comparison data from transition amplitudes, using normalized Bargmann invariants and Gram matrix rank constraints.
en.result: Non-orthogonal phase data define a U(1)-valued reciprocal pairwise comparison structure, with triangular defects naturally linked to geometric phases.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the geometric structure in quantum state comparisons and the connection between pairwise comparison data and quantum kinematics.

idea_spark.idea: Using phase defects as geometric measures of non-orthogonality may aid state discrimination in quantum information processing.
idea_spark.risk: The theoretical framework requires experimental validation, and applicability to mixed states or noisy environments needs investigation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Introducing consistency concepts from decision theory into quantum geometry inspires new similarity measures for quantum states.

papers.title: Physics-Guided Regime Unmixing
papers.summary: The Linear Mixing Model (LMM) dominates spectral unmixing for its simplicity, but fails under multiple scattering; existing nonlinear models compensate by applying a fixed regime uniformly across entire scenes. We propose Physics-Guided Regime Unmixing (PGRU), which estimates a pixel-wise scalar $ξ_i \in [0,1]$ from observable physical features to activate nonlinear mixing only where justified. Residuals from the Generalized Bilinear Model (GBM), the Post-Nonlinear Mixing Model (PPNM), and Hapke are combined via learned attention, yielding interpretable regime maps. Experiments on Samson, Jasper Ridge, and Urban show consistent improvements over baselines, with physical coherence $ρ> 0.90$.

ai.tldr: 提出物理引导的混合模型切换方法，逐像素判断是否启用非线性混合，提升光谱解混精度。
ai.motivation: 线性混合模型在多次散射场景下失效，而现有非线性模型对整幅图像统一应用固定模型，无法适应空间异质性。
ai.method: 从可观测物理特征逐像素估计标量ξ，决定是否激活非线性混合；通过注意力机制融合GBM、PPNM和Hapke模型的残差，生成可解释的混合模式图。
ai.result: 在Samson、Jasper Ridge和Urban数据集上一致优于基线方法，物理一致性ρ>0.90。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可解释的逐像素混合模型选择策略，帮助用户理解场景中不同区域的光学混合机制。

idea_spark.idea: 利用物理特征引导模型选择，结合注意力融合多个物理模型的残差。
idea_spark.risk: 物理特征的选择和标量ξ的估计可能依赖先验知识，泛化至新传感器或场景需重新校准。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从遥感光谱解混出发，启发在医学成像或材料科学中根据局部物理条件动态选择模型。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从遥感光谱解混出发，启发在医学成像或材料科学中根据局部物理条件动态选择模型。

en.tldr: Proposes Physics-Guided Regime Unmixing that estimates a pixel-wise scalar to activate nonlinear mixing only where justified, improving spectral unmixing accuracy.
en.motivation: Linear mixing model fails under multiple scattering; existing nonlinear models apply a fixed regime uniformly across entire scenes, ignoring spatial heterogeneity.
en.method: Estimates a pixel-wise scalar ξ from observable physical features to decide whether to activate nonlinear mixing; combines residuals from GBM, PPNM, and Hapke via learned attention to produce interpretable regime maps.
en.result: Consistent improvements over baselines on Samson, Jasper Ridge, and Urban datasets, with physical coherence ρ > 0.90.
en.help_to_user: Provides an interpretable pixel-wise model selection strategy to understand optical mixing mechanisms in different regions of a scene.

idea_spark.idea: Use physical features to guide model selection and fuse residuals from multiple physical models via attention.
idea_spark.risk: Selection of physical features and estimation of scalar ξ may rely on prior knowledge; generalization to new sensors or scenes may require recalibration.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by remote sensing spectral unmixing, suggests dynamically selecting models based on local physical conditions in medical imaging or materials science.

papers.title: UAV as Urban Construction Change Monitor: A New Benchmark and Change Captioning Model
papers.summary: Remote Sensing Image Change Captioning (RSICC) aims to generate spatially grounded natural language descriptions of scene evolution from bi-temporal imagery, moving beyond binary change masks toward semantic-level understanding. However, existing methods rely on implicit feature differencing without explicitly modeling structured change semantics, and struggle to reconcile the conflicting representation demands of change detection and caption generation. In addition, current benchmarks provide limited coverage of high-resolution urban construction scenarios. To address these challenges, we propose PTNet, a prototype-guided task-adaptive framework for joint change captioning and detection. PTNet explicitly models structured change semantics through a learnable prototype bank that guides cross-temporal interaction, disentangles task-specific representations via multi-head gating, and injects detection-derived spatial priors into caption generation, enabling coherent semantic correspondence while preserving fine-grained spatial sensitivity. Furthermore, we construct UCCD, a large-scale UAV-based benchmark comprising 9,000 high-resolution image pairs and 45,000 annotated sentences for urban construction monitoring. Extensive experiments on UCCD and WHU-CDC demonstrate that PTNet consistently outperforms existing methods. The dataset and source code are publicly available at https://github.com/G124556/ptnet.

ai.tldr: 提出面向城市建设的无人机遥感图像变化描述基准UCCD和原型引导任务自适应框架PTNet，实现变化检测与描述联合建模。
ai.motivation: 现有遥感图像变化描述方法隐式差分特征，缺乏结构化变化语义建模，且难以协调变化检测与描述生成之间的表示冲突；同时缺乏高分辨率城市建设的专用基准。
ai.method: 设计可学习原型库引导跨时相交互，通过多头门控解耦任务特定表示，并将检测空间先验注入描述生成，实现语义对应与空间敏感性的平衡。
ai.result: 在UCCD和WHU-CDC上，PTNet一致优于现有方法，数据集和代码已开源。
ai.help_to_user: 提供高分辨率无人机城市变化描述基准和联合检测-描述框架，可用于智慧城市、施工监管等场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将变化描述与检测联合建模，利用原型库显式编码变化语义，并解耦任务表示。
idea_spark.risk: 原型库设计依赖先验知识，可能限制对新变化类型的泛化；多头门控增加模型复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从变化检测与描述的任务冲突出发，通过结构化语义建模和解耦表示来调和矛盾，思路可推广至其他多任务学习场景。

idea_spark.risk: 原型库设计依赖先验知识，可能限制对新变化类型的泛化；多头门控增加模型复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从变化检测与描述的任务冲突出发，通过结构化语义建模和解耦表示来调和矛盾，思路可推广至其他多任务学习场景。

en.tldr: Proposes a UAV-based urban construction change captioning benchmark UCCD and a prototype-guided task-adaptive framework PTNet for joint change detection and captioning.
en.motivation: Existing RSICC methods rely on implicit feature differencing without structured change semantics and struggle with representation conflicts between detection and captioning; also lack high-resolution urban construction benchmarks.
en.method: Designs a learnable prototype bank to guide cross-temporal interaction, disentangles task-specific representations via multi-head gating, and injects detection-derived spatial priors into caption generation.
en.result: PTNet consistently outperforms existing methods on UCCD and WHU-CDC; dataset and code are publicly available.
en.help_to_user: Provides a high-resolution UAV urban change captioning benchmark and a joint detection-captioning framework for smart city and construction monitoring applications.

idea_spark.idea: Jointly model change captioning and detection by explicitly encoding change semantics via a prototype bank and decoupling task representations.
idea_spark.risk: Prototype bank design may rely on prior knowledge, limiting generalization to novel change types; multi-head gating increases model complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Addressing task conflicts between change detection and captioning through structured semantic modeling and representation decoupling can inspire other multi-task learning scenarios.

papers.title: CPCANet: Deep Unfolding Common Principal Component Analysis for Domain Generalization
papers.summary: Domain Generalization (DG) aims to learn representations that remain robust under out-of-distribution (OOD) shifts and generalize effectively to unseen target domains. While recent invariant learning strategies and architectural advances have achieved strong performance, explicitly discovering a structured domain-invariant subspace through second-order statistics remains underexplored. In this work, we propose CPCANet, a novel framework grounded in Common Principal Component Analysis (CPCA), which unrolls the iterative Flury-Gautschi (FG) algorithm into fully differentiable neural layers. This approach integrates the statistical properties of CPCA into an end-to-end trainable framework, enforcing the discovery of a shared subspace across diverse domains while preserving interpretability. Experiments on four standard DG benchmarks demonstrate that CPCANet achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in zero-shot transfer. Moreover, CPCANet is architecture-agnostic and requires no dataset-specific tuning, providing a simple and efficient approach to learning robust representations under distribution shift. Code is available at https://github.com/wish44165/CPCANet.

ai.tldr: 提出CPCANet，将公共主成分分析（CPCA）的迭代FG算法展开为可微神经网络层，实现端到端训练，在域泛化任务中学习跨域共享子空间。
ai.motivation: 现有域泛化方法多依赖一阶统计量或复杂架构，缺乏利用二阶统计量显式发现结构化域不变子空间的可解释方法。
ai.method: 将Flury-Gautschi迭代算法展开为可微神经网络层，构建CPCANet框架，通过端到端训练强制学习跨域共享子空间。
ai.result: 在四个标准域泛化基准上达到零样本迁移的SOTA性能，且无需数据集特定调参。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种简单、可解释且与架构无关的域泛化方法，适用于分布偏移下的鲁棒表示学习。

idea_spark.idea: 结合CPCA的统计特性与深度学习的灵活性，设计可解释的域不变特征提取器。
idea_spark.risk: FG算法展开可能增加计算复杂度，且对高维数据需谨慎处理收敛性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从统计方法中汲取灵感，将迭代优化过程转化为可学习网络，平衡可解释性与性能。

zh.tldr: 提出CPCANet，将公共主成分分析（CPCA）的迭代FG算法展开为可微神经网络层，实现端到端训练，在域泛化任务中学习跨域共享子空间。
zh.motivation: 现有域泛化方法多依赖一阶统计量或复杂架构，缺乏利用二阶统计量显式发现结构化域不变子空间的可解释方法。

zh.help_to_user: 提供一种简单、可解释且与架构无关的域泛化方法，适用于分布偏移下的鲁棒表示学习。

idea_spark.idea: 结合CPCA的统计特性与深度学习的灵活性，设计可解释的域不变特征提取器。
idea_spark.risk: FG算法展开可能增加计算复杂度，且对高维数据需谨慎处理收敛性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从统计方法中汲取灵感，将迭代优化过程转化为可学习网络，平衡可解释性与性能。

en.tldr: Proposes CPCANet, which unrolls the iterative Flury-Gautschi algorithm of Common Principal Component Analysis into differentiable neural layers for end-to-end domain generalization. It discovers a shared subspace across domains while preserving interpretability.
en.motivation: Existing DG methods often rely on first-order statistics or complex architectures, lacking an interpretable approach to explicitly discover a structured domain-invariant subspace via second-order statistics.
en.method: Unrolls the Flury-Gautschi algorithm into differentiable neural layers, forming CPCANet that enforces learning a shared subspace across domains through end-to-end training.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot transfer performance on four standard DG benchmarks without dataset-specific tuning.
en.help_to_user: Offers a simple, interpretable, and architecture-agnostic method for robust representation learning under distribution shift.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the statistical properties of CPCA with deep learning flexibility to design interpretable domain-invariant feature extractors.
idea_spark.risk: Unrolling the FG algorithm may increase computational complexity and require careful convergence handling for high-dimensional data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw inspiration from statistical methods to transform iterative optimization into learnable networks, balancing interpretability and performance.

papers.title: Hybrid Congestion Classification Framework Using Flow-Guided Attention and Empirical Mode Decomposition
papers.summary: Accurate traffic congestion classification requires models that jointly capture roadway scene context and non-stationary traffic motion, yet most prior work treats these requirements in isolation. Vision-based methods often depend on appearance cues with standard temporal pooling, which can bias predictions toward static infrastructure, whereas signal-based approaches characterize temporal dynamics but lack the spatial context needed for scene-level localization. These complementary limitations motivate a unified framework that links motion evidence to spatial feature selection while preserving data-adaptive temporal characterization. This study therefore proposes FLO-EMD, a hybrid approach that couples motion-guided attention with empirical, data-driven temporal decomposition. Dense optical flow guides channel and spatial attention so that RGB features are refined toward motion-relevant regions. In parallel, aggregated flow statistics form compact motion traces that are decomposed using Empirical Mode Decomposition (EMD) to extract intrinsic temporal components. The resulting EMD embedding is fused with learned spatiotemporal representations to classify light, medium, and heavy congestion. Experiments on 1,050 five-second clips from four surveillance networks show that FLO-EMD achieves 97.5% overall test accuracy (weighted F1 = 0.9742), outperforming established baselines and remaining robust across diverse environmental conditions; ablation and sensitivity analyses further quantify the contributions of EMD, the number of intrinsic mode functions, and the selected motion descriptors.

ai.tldr: 提出FLO-EMD混合框架，结合光流引导的注意力机制与经验模态分解，实现交通拥堵的准确分类。
ai.motivation: 现有视觉方法依赖外观线索和标准时间池化，易偏向静态基础设施；信号方法缺乏空间上下文。两者互补局限促使统一框架。
ai.method: 密集光流引导通道和空间注意力，使RGB特征聚焦运动区域；聚合流统计量经EMD分解提取内在时间成分，与学习到的时空表示融合后分类。
ai.result: 在1050个5秒片段上达到97.5%准确率（加权F1=0.9742），优于基线，且在不同环境条件下鲁棒。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种融合运动引导注意力和数据自适应时间分解的交通拥堵分类方法。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将EMD分解应用于其他非平稳时间序列特征（如传感器数据）与视觉特征的融合。
idea_spark.risk: 光流计算可能增加推理延迟，且EMD对噪声敏感，需注意预处理。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用数据自适应分解（如EMD）替代固定时间池化，可提升对动态场景的建模能力。

en.tldr: Proposes FLO-EMD, a hybrid framework combining flow-guided attention and empirical mode decomposition for accurate traffic congestion classification.
en.motivation: Vision methods rely on appearance cues and standard temporal pooling, biasing toward static infrastructure; signal methods lack spatial context. Complementary limitations motivate a unified framework.
en.method: Dense optical flow guides channel and spatial attention to refine RGB features toward motion-relevant regions; aggregated flow statistics are decomposed via EMD to extract intrinsic temporal components, fused with learned spatiotemporal representations for classification.
en.result: Achieves 97.5% accuracy (weighted F1=0.9742) on 1,050 five-second clips, outperforming baselines and remaining robust across diverse conditions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a traffic congestion classification method that integrates motion-guided attention and data-adaptive temporal decomposition.

idea_spark.idea: Explore applying EMD decomposition to other non-stationary time series features (e.g., sensor data) fused with visual features.
idea_spark.risk: Optical flow computation may increase inference latency, and EMD is sensitive to noise, requiring careful preprocessing.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using data-adaptive decomposition (e.g., EMD) instead of fixed temporal pooling can improve modeling of dynamic scenes.

papers.title: ScriptHOI: Learning Scripted State Transitions for Open-Vocabulary Human-Object Interaction Detection
papers.summary: Open-vocabulary human-object interaction (HOI) detection requires recognizing interaction phrases that may not appear as annotated categories during training. Recent vision-language HOI detectors improve semantic transfer by matching human-object features with text embeddings, but their predictions are often dominated by object affordance and phrase-level co-occurrence. As a result, a model may predict \textit{cut cake} from the presence of a knife and a cake without verifying whether the hand, tool, target, contact pattern, and object state jointly support the action. We propose \textbf{ScriptHOI}, a structured framework that represents each interaction phrase as a soft scripted state transition. Rather than treating a phrase as a single class token, ScriptHOI decomposes it into body-role, contact, geometry, affordance, motion, and object-state slots. A visual state tokenizer parses each detected human-object pair into corresponding state tokens, and a slot-wise matcher estimates both script coverage and script conflict. These two quantities calibrate HOI logits, expose missing visual evidence, and provide training constraints for incomplete annotations. To avoid suppressing valid but unannotated interactions, we further introduce interval partial-label learning, which constrains unannotated candidates with script-derived lower and upper probability bounds instead of assigning closed-world negatives. A counterfactual script contrast loss swaps individual script slots to discourage object-only shortcuts. Experiments on HICO-DET, V-COCO, and open-vocabulary HOI splits show that ScriptHOI improves rare and unseen interaction recognition while substantially reducing affordance-conflict false positives.

ai.tldr: 提出ScriptHOI框架，将交互短语分解为软脚本状态转移，通过视觉状态分词器、槽位匹配器和区间部分标签学习，提升开放词汇HOI检测的准确性和泛化能力。
ai.motivation: 现有开放词汇HOI检测器常被物体可供性和短语共现主导，忽略手、工具、目标、接触模式和物体状态是否共同支持动作，导致预测不可靠。
ai.method: 将每个交互短语表示为软脚本状态转移，分解为身体角色、接触、几何、可供性、运动和物体状态槽位；视觉状态分词器解析人-物对为状态令牌；槽位匹配器计算脚本覆盖度和冲突度以校准HOI logits；引入区间部分标签学习处理未标注候选；反事实脚本对比损失抑制物体捷径。
ai.result: 在HICO-DET、V-COCO和开放词汇HOI分割上，显著提升罕见和未见交互识别，大幅减少可供性冲突假阳性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过结构化状态建模和弱监督学习提升开放词汇HOI检测的鲁棒性和可解释性。

idea_spark.idea: 将交互分解为多维度状态槽位，并利用脚本覆盖度和冲突度进行校准，结合区间部分标签学习处理不完整标注。
idea_spark.risk: 脚本槽位定义依赖领域知识，可能难以覆盖所有交互类型；区间部分标签学习需要合理设定上下界。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从脚本理论出发，将动作视为状态转移序列，启发我们重新思考视觉关系推理的结构化表示。

en.tldr: Proposes ScriptHOI, a framework that decomposes interaction phrases into soft scripted state transitions, using a visual state tokenizer, slot-wise matcher, and interval partial-label learning to improve open-vocabulary HOI detection.
en.motivation: Existing open-vocabulary HOI detectors are often dominated by object affordance and phrase co-occurrence, ignoring whether hand, tool, target, contact pattern, and object state jointly support the action, leading to unreliable predictions.
en.method: Represents each interaction phrase as a soft scripted state transition with slots for body-role, contact, geometry, affordance, motion, and object-state; a visual state tokenizer parses human-object pairs into state tokens; a slot-wise matcher computes script coverage and conflict to calibrate HOI logits; interval partial-label learning handles unannotated candidates; counterfactual script contrast loss discourages object shortcuts.
en.result: On HICO-DET, V-COCO, and open-vocabulary HOI splits, significantly improves rare and unseen interaction recognition while substantially reducing affordance-conflict false positives.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how structured state modeling and weak supervision can enhance robustness and interpretability in open-vocabulary HOI detection.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose interactions into multi-dimensional state slots and calibrate using script coverage and conflict, combined with interval partial-label learning for incomplete annotations.
idea_spark.risk: Script slot definitions rely on domain knowledge and may not cover all interaction types; interval partial-label learning requires reasonable bounds.
idea_spark.inspiration: Drawing from script theory to treat actions as state transition sequences inspires rethinking structured representations for visual relation reasoning.

papers.title: Benchmarking POS Tagging for the Tajik Language: A Comparative Study of Neural Architectures on the TajPersParallel Corpus
papers.summary: This paper presents the first benchmark for the task of automatic part-of-speech (POS) tagging for the Tajik language. Despite the existence of multilingual language models demonstrating high effectiveness for many of the world's languages, their capacity for grammatical analysis of Tajik has remained unexplored until now. The aim of this study is to fill this gap through a systematic comparison of classical neural network architectures and modern multilingual transformers.   Experiments were conducted on the TajPersParallel corpus, a parallel lexical resource comprising approximately 44,000 dictionary entries. Due to the absence of full-fledged example sentences in the current version of the corpus, the task was performed at the level of isolated lexical units, representing a challenging case of context-independent classification. The study compares the following architectures: a recurrent BiLSTM-CRF model, as well as multilingual models XLM-RoBERTa (large), mBERT, ParsBERT (Persian), and ruBERT (Russian), adapted using the parameter-efficient fine-tuning method LoRA.   The testing results showed that the best performance is achieved by the mBERT + LoRA model (macro F1-score = 0.11, weighted F1-score = 0.62). It was established that in the absence of syntactic context, all models experience significant difficulty in resolving morphological ambiguity, successfully classifying primarily high-frequency classes ("noun," "adjective") while demonstrating zero effectiveness for rare function words. Zero-shot evaluation revealed the greatest typological proximity of Tajik to Persian (ParsBERT) and Russian (ruBERT). The obtained results form a foundation for further research and development in the field of automatic processing of the Tajik language.

ai.tldr: 首次为塔吉克语建立词性标注基准，在TajPersParallel语料库上比较多种神经网络架构，发现mBERT+LoRA表现最佳，但所有模型在缺乏上下文时对罕见词类效果极差。
ai.motivation: 塔吉克语缺乏自动词性标注的基准评测，多语言模型对该语言的语法分析能力未知。
ai.method: 在约4.4万条词典条目的平行语料上，以孤立词分类方式比较BiLSTM-CRF、XLM-RoBERTa、mBERT、ParsBERT、ruBERT（均用LoRA微调）。
ai.result: mBERT+LoRA取得最高加权F1=0.62，但宏F1仅0.11；模型仅能正确分类高频词类（名词、形容词），对功能词零效果。
ai.help_to_user: 为塔吉克语NLP提供首个基准结果和模型选择参考。

idea_spark.idea: 利用塔吉克语与波斯语、俄语的类型学相似性，设计跨语言数据增强策略。
idea_spark.risk: 孤立词分类任务过于简化，可能无法反映真实句子级标注的挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合形态分析器或词典信息来缓解上下文缺失导致的歧义问题。

zh.motivation: 塔吉克语缺乏自动词性标注的基准评测，多语言模型对该语言的语法分析能力未知。
zh.method: 在约4.4万条词典条目的平行语料上，以孤立词分类方式比较BiLSTM-CRF、XLM-RoBERTa、mBERT、ParsBERT、ruBERT（均用LoRA微调）。
zh.result: mBERT+LoRA取得最高加权F1=0.62，但宏F1仅0.11；模型仅能正确分类高频词类（名词、形容词），对功能词零效果。
zh.help_to_user: 为塔吉克语NLP提供首个基准结果和模型选择参考。

idea_spark.idea: 利用塔吉克语与波斯语、俄语的类型学相似性，设计跨语言数据增强策略。
idea_spark.risk: 孤立词分类任务过于简化，可能无法反映真实句子级标注的挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合形态分析器或词典信息来缓解上下文缺失导致的歧义问题。

en.tldr: First benchmark for Tajik POS tagging on TajPersParallel corpus; mBERT+LoRA achieves best weighted F1=0.62 but all models struggle with rare function words due to lack of context.
en.motivation: No prior evaluation of multilingual models for Tajik grammatical analysis exists.
en.method: Compared BiLSTM-CRF, XLM-RoBERTa, mBERT, ParsBERT, ruBERT (all with LoRA) on ~44k isolated lexical entries.
en.result: mBERT+LoRA achieved macro F1=0.11, weighted F1=0.62; only high-frequency classes (noun, adjective) were reliably tagged; function words scored zero.
en.help_to_user: Provides baseline results and model recommendations for Tajik NLP.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage typological proximity to Persian and Russian for cross-lingual data augmentation.
idea_spark.risk: Isolated-word task may not generalize to sentence-level POS tagging.
idea_spark.inspiration: Incorporate morphological analyzers or dictionary features to compensate for missing context.

papers.title: Height-Guided Projection Reparameterization for Camera-LiDAR Occupancy
papers.summary: 3D occupancy prediction aims to infer dense, voxel-wise scene semantics from sensor observations, where the 2D-to-3D view transformation serves as a crucial step in bridging image features and volumetric representations. Most previous methods rely on a fixed projection space, where 3D reference points are uniformly sampled along pillars. However, such sampling struggles to capture the sparsity and height variations of real-world scenes, leading to ambiguous correspondences and unreliable feature aggregation. To address these challenges, we propose HiPR, a camera-LiDAR occupancy framework with Height-Guided Projection Reparameterization. HiPR first encodes LiDAR into a BEV height map to capture the maximum height of the point cloud. HiPR then adjusts the sampling range of each pillar using the height prior, enabling adaptive reparameterization of the projection space. As a result, the projected points are redistributed into geometrically meaningful regions rather than fixed ranges. Meanwhile, we mask out the invalid parts of the height map to avoid misleading the feature aggregation. In addition, to alleviate the training instability caused by noisy LiDAR-derived heights, we introduce a training-time Progressive Height Conditioning strategy, which gradually transitions the conditioning signal from ground-truth heights to LiDAR heights. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HiPR consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods while maintaining real-time inference. The code and pretrained models can be found at https://github.com/Rayn-Wu/HiPR.

ai.tldr: 提出HiPR框架，利用LiDAR高度先验自适应重参数化投影空间，提升相机-激光雷达3D占用预测性能。
ai.motivation: 现有方法在固定投影空间均匀采样，难以捕捉场景稀疏性和高度变化，导致特征对应模糊。
ai.method: 将LiDAR编码为BEV高度图，据此调整每个柱体的采样范围，实现投影空间自适应重参数化；同时掩码无效高度区域，并引入渐进式高度条件训练策略。
ai.result: 在多个数据集上超越现有方法，保持实时推理速度。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种融合相机与激光雷达进行3D占用预测的高效方案，尤其适用于自动驾驶场景理解。

idea_spark.idea: 利用LiDAR高度先验动态调整投影空间，使采样点集中在几何有意义区域。
idea_spark.risk: LiDAR高度噪声可能引入训练不稳定，渐进式条件策略可缓解但需额外调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将稀疏点云的高度信息显式编码为BEV图，指导2D-3D特征映射，启发其他多模态融合方法。
