zh.result: 基于LID的幻觉过滤器性能优于近期提出的时间过滤器；IQ在多个基准上持续优于标准幻觉减少基线，并在医学成像中有效保证解剖一致性。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解扩散模型幻觉的几何根源，并提供一种无需额外训练即可减少幻觉的实用方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将LID作为训练过程中的正则化项，从源头抑制模型学习高维流形上的不稳定区域。
idea_spark.risk: LID计算可能增加推理开销；过度降低LID可能限制模型生成多样性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从流形几何视角重新审视生成模型的失败模式，启发基于拓扑或几何的鲁棒生成方法。

en.tldr: Proposes local intrinsic dimension (LID) as the driver of structural hallucinations in diffusion models and introduces Intrinsic Quenching (IQ) to mitigate them.
en.motivation: Diffusion models often produce hallucinations that match statistics but violate structural rules (e.g., hands with extra fingers); existing explanations are incomplete, requiring a new perspective.
en.method: Treats hallucinations as instabilities on the model-induced manifold, quantifies them via local intrinsic dimension (LID), and designs Intrinsic Quenching (IQ) to directly reduce LID and suppress hallucinations.
en.result: LID-based hallucination filter matches or outperforms the recent temporal filter; IQ consistently surpasses standard baselines across benchmarks and enforces anatomical consistency in medical imaging.
en.help_to_user: Provides a geometric understanding of diffusion model hallucinations and a practical, training-free method to reduce them.

idea_spark.idea: Use LID as a regularization term during training to suppress unstable regions on the learned manifold from the start.
idea_spark.risk: LID computation may increase inference cost; excessive LID reduction could limit generative diversity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Revisiting generative model failures from a manifold geometry perspective inspires robust generation methods based on topology or geometry.

papers.title: Telegraph English: Semantic Prompt Compression via Structured Symbolic Rewriting
papers.summary: We introduce Telegraph English (TE), a prompt-compression protocol that rewrites natural language into a symbol-rich, formally-structured dialect. Where token-deletion methods such as LLMLingua-2 train a classifier to delete low-importance tokens at a fixed ratio, TE performs a full semantic rewrite: it decomposes the input into atomic fact lines, substitutes verbose phrases with $\sim$40 logical and relational symbols, and lets the compression ratio adapt to each document's information density. A consequence of the line-structure rule is that compression and semantic chunking become the same operation -- each output line is an independently addressable fact, so the compressed representation is simultaneously a semantic index. We evaluate TE on 4{,}081 question-answer pairs from LongBench-v2 across five OpenAI models and two difficulty levels. At roughly 50\% token reduction, TE preserves 99.1\% accuracy on key facts with GPT-4.1 and outperforms LLMLingua-2 at matched compression ratios on every model and task tested. The gap widens on smaller models -- up to 11 percentage points on fine-detail tasks -- suggesting that explicit relational structure compensates for limited model capacity. We release the grammar specification, compression prompt, benchmark data, and reference implementation.

ai.tldr: 提出Telegraph English协议，通过符号化重写将自然语言压缩为结构化方言，在50%令牌缩减下保持99.1%关键事实准确率，优于LLMLingua-2。
ai.motivation: 现有令牌删除方法（如LLMLingua-2）固定压缩比且丢失语义结构，需要更智能的语义压缩方案。
ai.method: 将输入分解为原子事实行，用约40个逻辑和关系符号替换冗长短语，压缩比自适应文档信息密度，同时实现语义分块。
ai.result: 在LongBench-v2的4081个问答对上，GPT-4.1下50%压缩率保持99.1%准确率，所有模型和任务上优于LLMLingua-2，小模型上差距达11个百分点。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、可解释的提示压缩方法，减少令牌消耗而不损失关键信息，尤其适合资源受限场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将压缩与语义索引结合，每个输出行作为独立可寻址事实，可支持高效检索和推理。
idea_spark.risk: 符号集设计可能依赖领域知识，通用性需验证；重写过程可能引入歧义。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受结构化编程和逻辑形式启发，将自然语言转化为类似代码的符号化表示。

zh.tldr: 提出Telegraph English协议，通过符号化重写将自然语言压缩为结构化方言，在50%令牌缩减下保持99.1%关键事实准确率，优于LLMLingua-2。

zh.result: 在LongBench-v2的4081个问答对上，GPT-4.1下50%压缩率保持99.1%准确率，所有模型和任务上优于LLMLingua-2，小模型上差距达11个百分点。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、可解释的提示压缩方法，减少令牌消耗而不损失关键信息，尤其适合资源受限场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将压缩与语义索引结合，每个输出行作为独立可寻址事实，可支持高效检索和推理。
idea_spark.risk: 符号集设计可能依赖领域知识，通用性需验证；重写过程可能引入歧义。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受结构化编程和逻辑形式启发，将自然语言转化为类似代码的符号化表示。

en.tldr: Proposes Telegraph English, a prompt compression protocol that rewrites natural language into a symbol-rich structured dialect, achieving 99.1% accuracy on key facts at ~50% token reduction, outperforming LLMLingua-2.
en.motivation: Existing token deletion methods like LLMLingua-2 use fixed compression ratios and lose semantic structure, necessitating a more intelligent semantic compression approach.
en.method: Decomposes input into atomic fact lines, substitutes verbose phrases with ~40 logical and relational symbols, adapts compression ratio to information density, and unifies compression with semantic chunking.
en.result: On 4,081 QA pairs from LongBench-v2, achieves 99.1% accuracy with GPT-4.1 at 50% compression, outperforms LLMLingua-2 across all models and tasks, with up to 11 percentage point gain on smaller models.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient and interpretable prompt compression method that reduces token consumption without losing critical information, especially beneficial for resource-constrained settings.

idea_spark.idea: Combining compression with semantic indexing, where each output line is an independently addressable fact, enables efficient retrieval and reasoning.
idea_spark.risk: Symbol set design may be domain-dependent, requiring generalization validation; rewriting process may introduce ambiguity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by structured programming and logical forms, transforming natural language into a code-like symbolic representation.

papers.title: Reward-Decomposed Reinforcement Learning for Immersive Video Role-Playing
papers.summary: Text-based role-playing models can imitate character styles, yet they often fail to reflect a scene's atmosphere and evolving tension, both essential for immersive applications such as Virtual Reality (VR) games and interactive narratives. We study video-grounded role-playing dialogue and introduce EBM-RL (Eye-Brain-Mouth Reinforcement Learning), a decoupled GRPO-based framework that explicitly separates observation ([perception]), reasoning ([think]), and utterance ([answer]). This structure promotes human-like sensory grounding by compelling the model to first attend to visual cues, then form internal interpretations, and finally generate context-appropriate dialogue.   EBM-RL integrates four complementary rewards: (i) CLIP-based scene-text alignment to improve ambiance and emotion; (ii) a Perceptual-Cognitive reward that encourages [perception] and [think] processes that increase the likelihood of the reference response; (iii) answer accuracy to ensure faithfulness; and (iv) a dense format reward to enforce the desired structured output.   Extensive experiments demonstrate that EBM-RL substantially outperforms text-only role-playing baselines and larger-scale vision-language models on our immersive role-playing benchmark, delivering simultaneous gains in visual-atmosphere consistency and character authenticity. Beyond the role-playing domain, EBM-RL also exhibits strong zero-shot generalization: without any additional fine-tuning, it consistently improves performance on out-of-domain VideoQA benchmarks. We additionally release an open-source dataset for video-grounded role-playing dialogue.

ai.tldr: 提出EBM-RL框架，通过解耦感知、推理和回答步骤并设计四种奖励，显著提升视频角色扮演对话的沉浸感和角色真实性，并在零样本视频问答任务上表现优异。
ai.motivation: 现有文本角色扮演模型无法捕捉场景氛围和紧张感，难以满足VR游戏等沉浸式应用需求。
ai.method: 基于GRPO的解耦框架，将输出分为[perception]、[think]、[answer]三部分，并联合优化CLIP场景-文本对齐奖励、感知-认知奖励、答案准确率奖励和格式奖励。
ai.result: 在沉浸式角色扮演基准上大幅超越纯文本基线和更大规模视觉语言模型，同时零样本提升VideoQA性能。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种将视觉线索融入角色对话的强化学习训练方法，可用于构建更真实的交互式叙事或游戏NPC。

idea_spark.idea: 将感知-认知-回答的显式步骤与多种奖励结合，使模型学会先看再想后说，类似人类认知过程。
idea_spark.risk: 奖励权重调参敏感，可能影响收敛稳定性；结构化输出可能限制模型表达多样性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受认知科学中感知-认知-语言输出流程启发，将内部推理过程显式建模为可监督的中间步骤。

zh.tldr: 提出EBM-RL框架，通过解耦感知、推理和回答步骤并设计四种奖励，显著提升视频角色扮演对话的沉浸感和角色真实性，并在零样本视频问答任务上表现优异。

idea_spark.idea: 将感知-认知-回答的显式步骤与多种奖励结合，使模型学会先看再想后说，类似人类认知过程。
idea_spark.risk: 奖励权重调参敏感，可能影响收敛稳定性；结构化输出可能限制模型表达多样性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受认知科学中感知-认知-语言输出流程启发，将内部推理过程显式建模为可监督的中间步骤。

en.tldr: Proposes EBM-RL, a decoupled GRPO-based framework with four rewards that explicitly separates perception, reasoning, and utterance, significantly improving immersive video role-playing dialogue and achieving zero-shot gains on VideoQA.
en.motivation: Text-based role-playing models fail to capture scene atmosphere and evolving tension, limiting their use in immersive applications like VR games.
en.method: A decoupled framework based on GRPO that structures output into [perception], [think], and [answer], jointly optimized with CLIP scene-text alignment reward, Perceptual-Cognitive reward, answer accuracy reward, and format reward.
en.result: Substantially outperforms text-only baselines and larger vision-language models on an immersive role-playing benchmark, and consistently improves out-of-domain VideoQA performance without fine-tuning.
en.help_to_user: Provides a reinforcement learning training method that integrates visual cues into role-playing dialogue, useful for building more realistic interactive narratives or game NPCs.

idea_spark.idea: Combining explicit perception-cognition-answer steps with multiple rewards enables the model to learn a human-like 'look-think-then-speak' process.
idea_spark.risk: Reward weight tuning is sensitive and may affect convergence stability; structured output may limit expression diversity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the cognitive science pipeline of perception-cognition-language output, explicitly modeling internal reasoning steps as supervised intermediate stages.

papers.title: When Life Gives You BC, Make Q-functions: Extracting Q-values from Behavior Cloning for On-Robot Reinforcement Learning
papers.summary: Behavior Cloning (BC) has emerged as a highly effective paradigm for robot learning. However, BC lacks a self-guided mechanism for online improvement after demonstrations have been collected. Existing offline-to-online learning methods often cause policies to replace previously learned good actions due to a distribution mismatch between offline data and online learning. In this work, we propose Q2RL, Q-Estimation and Q-Gating from BC for Reinforcement Learning, an algorithm for efficient offline-to-online learning. Our method consists of two parts: (1) Q-Estimation extracts a Q-function from a BC policy using a few interaction steps with the environment, followed by online RL with (2) Q-Gating, which switches between BC and RL policy actions based on their respective Q-values to collect samples for RL policy training. Across manipulation tasks from D4RL and robomimic benchmarks, Q2RL outperforms SOTA offline-to-online learning baselines on success rate and time to convergence. Q2RL is efficient enough to be applied in an on-robot RL setting, learning robust policies for contact-rich and high precision manipulation tasks such as pipe assembly and kitting, in 1-2 hours of online interaction, achieving success rates of up to 100% and up to 3.75x improvement against the original BC policy. Code and video are available at https://pages.rai-inst.com/q2rl_website/

ai.tldr: 提出Q2RL算法，从行为克隆策略中提取Q函数，并通过Q门控实现离线到在线强化学习的高效转换。
ai.motivation: 行为克隆缺乏在线自我改进机制，现有离线到在线学习方法常因分布不匹配导致策略退化。
ai.method: Q2RL包含两部分：Q估计（用少量交互从BC策略提取Q函数）和Q门控（根据Q值在BC与RL动作间切换以收集样本）。
ai.result: 在D4RL和robomimic基准上，Q2RL在成功率和收敛速度上超越现有方法；在真实机器人上1-2小时交互即可学习鲁棒策略，成功率最高达100%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效将行为克隆策略转化为可在线优化的强化学习策略的方法，适用于接触式高精度操作任务。

idea_spark.idea: 利用少量在线交互从BC策略中提取Q函数，再通过Q门控平衡探索与利用，避免策略退化。
idea_spark.risk: Q函数估计依赖少量交互，可能因环境噪声或样本偏差导致估计不准确。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将行为克隆的稳定初始策略与强化学习的持续优化能力结合，启发其他离线到在线学习框架设计。

zh.tldr: 提出Q2RL算法，从行为克隆策略中提取Q函数，并通过Q门控实现离线到在线强化学习的高效转换。
zh.motivation: 行为克隆缺乏在线自我改进机制，现有离线到在线学习方法常因分布不匹配导致策略退化。
zh.method: Q2RL包含两部分：Q估计（用少量交互从BC策略提取Q函数）和Q门控（根据Q值在BC与RL动作间切换以收集样本）。
zh.result: 在D4RL和robomimic基准上，Q2RL在成功率和收敛速度上超越现有方法；在真实机器人上1-2小时交互即可学习鲁棒策略，成功率最高达100%。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种高效将行为克隆策略转化为可在线优化的强化学习策略的方法，适用于接触式高精度操作任务。

idea_spark.idea: 利用少量在线交互从BC策略中提取Q函数，再通过Q门控平衡探索与利用，避免策略退化。
idea_spark.risk: Q函数估计依赖少量交互，可能因环境噪声或样本偏差导致估计不准确。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将行为克隆的稳定初始策略与强化学习的持续优化能力结合，启发其他离线到在线学习框架设计。

en.tldr: Proposes Q2RL, which extracts Q-functions from a Behavior Cloning policy and uses Q-gating for efficient offline-to-online reinforcement learning.
en.motivation: Behavior Cloning lacks online self-improvement; existing offline-to-online methods suffer from distribution mismatch causing policy degradation.
en.method: Q2RL consists of Q-Estimation (extracting Q-function from BC with few interactions) and Q-Gating (switching between BC and RL actions based on Q-values for sample collection).
en.result: Outperforms SOTA baselines on D4RL and robomimic benchmarks in success rate and convergence speed; achieves up to 100% success on real robot tasks within 1-2 hours of online interaction.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient method to convert a Behavior Cloning policy into an online-optimizable RL policy, suitable for contact-rich and high-precision manipulation tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Use a few online interactions to extract Q-functions from BC, then balance exploration and exploitation via Q-gating to avoid policy degradation.
idea_spark.risk: Q-function estimation relies on limited interactions, which may be inaccurate due to environmental noise or sample bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining the stable initial policy of BC with the continuous optimization of RL inspires other offline-to-online learning frameworks.

papers.title: Nonconvex optimization methods for ground states in disordered continuous-spin models
papers.summary: This work explores the global optimization problem of finding lowest-energy configurations (ground states) in disordered continuous spins models from statistical physics, with a particular focus on the random field XY model. Due to an extremely non-convex nature of the associated energy landscape, this problem remains highly challenging. From an optimization perspective, we reformulate the traditional angular Hamiltonian as a constrained problem on the Cartesian product of spheres, allowing the application of Riemannian optimization techniques, which show better computational performances. We compare a MultiStart (MS) strategy against a Monotonic Basin Hopping (MBH) framework, with the aim of highlighting the limitations of standard approaches and the resulting need to resort to more advanced global optimization techniques. Our results demonstrate that MBH consistently outperforms MS in identifying lower-energy configurations, offering superior computational efficiency and numerical stability. This approach establishes a robust link between continuous-spin systems and continuous global optimization, providing a high-performance benchmark for exploring complex energy landscapes.

ai.tldr: 本文研究无序连续自旋模型（特别是随机场XY模型）中寻找基态（最低能量构型）的全局优化问题，通过将角度哈密顿量重新表述为球面笛卡尔积上的约束问题，应用黎曼优化技术，并比较了多起点策略与单调盆地跳跃框架，结果表明单调盆地跳跃在识别低能构型、计算效率和数值稳定性方面均优于多起点策略。
ai.motivation: 无序连续自旋模型的能量景观高度非凸，寻找基态极具挑战，现有标准优化方法存在局限性，需要更先进的全局优化技术。
ai.method: 将传统角度哈密顿量转化为球面笛卡尔积上的约束优化问题，采用黎曼优化方法，并对比多起点策略和单调盆地跳跃两种全局优化框架。
ai.result: 单调盆地跳跃始终优于多起点策略，能更有效地找到低能构型，且计算效率和数值稳定性更高。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究复杂能量景观的全局优化问题提供了高效基准方法，尤其适用于统计物理中的无序自旋系统。

idea_spark.idea: 将单调盆地跳跃中的扰动算子替换为基于物理启发的局部移动（如自旋波激发），可能进一步提升搜索效率。
idea_spark.risk: 盆地跳跃方法可能陷入高维能量景观中的狭窄漏斗区域，需要设计自适应步长或重启机制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴统计物理中副本交换方法的思想，在盆地跳跃中引入并行温度链，以增强跳出局部最优的能力。

en.tldr: This work studies the global optimization problem of finding ground states in disordered continuous-spin models (especially the random field XY model). By reformulating the angular Hamiltonian as a constrained problem on the Cartesian product of spheres, Riemannian optimization techniques are applied. Comparing MultiStart and Monotonic Basin Hopping, the latter consistently outperforms in identifying lower-energy configurations with better computational efficiency and numerical stability.
en.motivation: The energy landscape of disordered continuous-spin models is highly non-convex, making ground state search extremely challenging; standard optimization methods have limitations, necessitating more advanced global optimization techniques.
en.method: Reformulate the traditional angular Hamiltonian as a constrained optimization problem on the Cartesian product of spheres, enabling Riemannian optimization. Compare MultiStart (MS) and Monotonic Basin Hopping (MBH) frameworks.
en.result: MBH consistently outperforms MS in finding lower-energy configurations, offering superior computational efficiency and numerical stability.
en.help_to_user: Provides a high-performance benchmark for exploring complex energy landscapes, particularly useful for global optimization in statistical physics of disordered spin systems.

idea_spark.idea: Replace the perturbation operator in MBH with physics-inspired local moves (e.g., spin-wave excitations) to potentially improve search efficiency.
idea_spark.risk: Basin hopping may get trapped in narrow funnels of high-dimensional energy landscapes; adaptive step sizes or restart mechanisms may be needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Incorporate parallel tempering chains into basin hopping, inspired by replica exchange methods in statistical physics, to enhance the ability to escape local minima.

papers.title: CHAP: A Hybrid GPU-CPU Heuristic for MIP
papers.summary: We present CHAP (Coordinating Heuristics Across Platforms) a GPU-CPU-hybrid primal heuristic framework for mixed-integer programming. CHAP adopts a portfolio approach where it coordinates a set of primal heuristics, including Local Search, Fix-and-Propagate, and Feasibility Pump, via a shared solution pool. The solution pool is used to exchange feasible incumbent solutions, LP solutions, along with promising infeasible solution candidates, enabling a more comprehensive exploration of the solution space. On the GPU side, we implement a native tabu search featuring a novel best-shift algorithm built on sort, scan, and reduce primitives, along with specialized kernel designs. We additionally leverage cuPDLPx as an approximate LP solver. On the CPU side, we employ various Fix-and-Propagate strategies, guided by information from the solution pool, complemented by a CPU-based tabu search and a Feasibility Pump. All components operate collaboratively, iteratively repairing and improving candidate solutions maintained in the pool. We evaluate our framework on the 50-instances benchmark from the 2026 Land-Doig MIP Competition under competition constraints, including a five-minute time limit. In these settings, CHAP finds solutions to 47 instances outperforming both Gurobi (44) in default mode and NVIDIA cuOpt (43) in heuristics-only mode. The results demonstrate that coordinated cross-platform portfolios offer a promising direction for the integration of GPU heuristics into modern high-performance MIP solvers. The code will be made available on GitHub.

ai.tldr: 提出一种GPU-CPU混合启发式框架CHAP，通过共享解池协调多种原始启发式方法，在MIP基准测试中优于Gurobi和NVIDIA cuOpt。
ai.motivation: 混合整数规划中，传统CPU启发式方法探索解空间有限，而GPU并行计算潜力未被充分利用，需要一种跨平台协调框架提升求解效率。
ai.method: 采用组合方法，GPU端实现基于排序、扫描、归约原语的新型最佳移位算法的禁忌搜索，并利用cuPDLPx作为近似LP求解器；CPU端执行多种Fix-and-Propagate策略、禁忌搜索和可行性泵，所有组件通过共享解池交换可行解、LP解及有希望的不可行候选解。
ai.result: 在2026 Land-Doig MIP竞赛的50实例基准上，CHAP在5分钟时限内求解47个实例，优于Gurobi（44个）和NVIDIA cuOpt（43个）。
ai.help_to_user: 为MIP求解器开发者提供一种高效的GPU-CPU混合启发式框架设计思路，以及如何通过解池协调多种启发式方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将共享解池的概念扩展到分布式GPU集群，实现更大规模的并行启发式搜索。
idea_spark.risk: GPU与CPU之间的通信开销可能成为瓶颈，需优化数据交换策略。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴多智能体协作思想，让不同启发式方法像智能体一样通过共享记忆协同探索解空间。

zh.tldr: 提出一种GPU-CPU混合启发式框架CHAP，通过共享解池协调多种原始启发式方法，在MIP基准测试中优于Gurobi和NVIDIA cuOpt。

en.tldr: Proposes CHAP, a GPU-CPU hybrid primal heuristic framework for mixed-integer programming, coordinating multiple heuristics via a shared solution pool, outperforming Gurobi and NVIDIA cuOpt on a benchmark.
en.motivation: Traditional CPU-based heuristics for MIP have limited solution space exploration, while GPU parallelism is underutilized; a cross-platform coordinated framework is needed to improve solving efficiency.
en.method: Employs a portfolio approach: on GPU, a native tabu search with a novel best-shift algorithm built on sort, scan, and reduce primitives, plus cuPDLPx as an approximate LP solver; on CPU, various Fix-and-Propagate strategies, tabu search, and Feasibility Pump. All components collaborate via a shared solution pool exchanging feasible incumbents, LP solutions, and promising infeasible candidates.
en.result: On the 50-instance benchmark from the 2026 Land-Doig MIP Competition with a 5-minute time limit, CHAP solves 47 instances, outperforming Gurobi (44) and NVIDIA cuOpt (43).
en.help_to_user: Provides MIP solver developers with an efficient GPU-CPU hybrid heuristic framework design and insights on coordinating multiple heuristics via a solution pool.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the shared solution pool concept to distributed GPU clusters for larger-scale parallel heuristic search.
idea_spark.risk: Communication overhead between GPU and CPU may become a bottleneck; data exchange strategies need optimization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw inspiration from multi-agent collaboration, where different heuristics act as agents exploring the solution space cooperatively through shared memory.

papers.title: Revisiting the logical independence
papers.summary: It has been widely acknowledged that probabilistic independence and logical independence cannot be coherently reconciled. By bridging these two notions, this paper addresses three long-standing problems that have puzzled the field of probability theory: Should probability be defined prior to independence, or independence prior to probability? How ought independence to be formulated for signed measures and families of probability measures? Why do the conclusions of classical limit theorems remain valid even when practical scenarios violate their underlying assumptions? By introducing logical independence and $σ$-logical independence, we establish the probability extension theorem. This result not only demonstrates that independence ought to be defined before probability, but also endows logical independence with probabilistic machinery, thereby rendering it computationally tractable in the same manner as probabilistic independence. Then, we investigate how independence should be defined when multiple measures are involved. Finally, we prove that limit theorems can hold true under two intuitive conditions: $σ$-logical independence and identical range of random variables.

ai.tldr: 本文通过引入逻辑独立性和σ-逻辑独立性，解决了概率论中三个长期存在的问题，并证明了极限定理在σ-逻辑独立性和随机变量相同值域条件下成立。
ai.motivation: 概率独立性与逻辑独立性长期被认为无法协调，这导致概率论中关于独立性与概率定义顺序、符号测度与概率测度族的独立性表述、以及经典极限定理在违反假设时仍成立的原因等问题悬而未决。
ai.method: 引入逻辑独立性和σ-逻辑独立性概念，建立概率扩展定理，并基于此重新定义独立性，进而分析多测度情形下的独立性，最后证明极限定理在σ-逻辑独立性和随机变量相同值域条件下成立。
ai.result: 证明了独立性应定义在概率之前；逻辑独立性获得了概率机制，可像概率独立性一样计算；极限定理在σ-逻辑独立性和随机变量相同值域条件下成立。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解概率论中独立性的本质，澄清独立性与概率的定义顺序，并解释极限定理在非理想条件下仍成立的原因。

idea_spark.idea: 将逻辑独立性嵌入概率图模型，以处理变量间既存在概率依赖又存在逻辑约束的复杂场景。
idea_spark.risk: 逻辑独立性的计算复杂性可能较高，且实际应用中逻辑约束的获取和形式化可能困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受概率扩展定理启发，可探索在非概率框架（如模糊逻辑、可能性理论）中建立类似的独立性扩展定理。

zh.tldr: 本文通过引入逻辑独立性和σ-逻辑独立性，解决了概率论中三个长期存在的问题，并证明了极限定理在σ-逻辑独立性和随机变量相同值域条件下成立。

en.tldr: This paper introduces logical independence and σ-logical independence to resolve three long-standing problems in probability theory, and proves that limit theorems hold under σ-logical independence and identical range of random variables.
en.motivation: The long-standing incoherence between probabilistic independence and logical independence has left unresolved issues regarding the definition order of independence and probability, the formulation of independence for signed measures and families of probability measures, and the validity of classical limit theorems when assumptions are violated.
en.method: Introduces logical independence and σ-logical independence, establishes the probability extension theorem, redefines independence accordingly, investigates independence for multiple measures, and proves limit theorems under σ-logical independence and identical range of random variables.
en.result: Demonstrates that independence should be defined before probability; logical independence gains probabilistic machinery and becomes computationally tractable; limit theorems hold under σ-logical independence and identical range of random variables.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the essence of independence in probability theory, clarifies the definition order of independence and probability, and explains why limit theorems remain valid under non-ideal conditions.

idea_spark.idea: Embed logical independence into probabilistic graphical models to handle scenarios where variables have both probabilistic dependencies and logical constraints.
idea_spark.risk: Computational complexity of logical independence may be high, and obtaining and formalizing logical constraints in practice can be difficult.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the probability extension theorem, one could explore establishing similar extension theorems for independence in non-probabilistic frameworks such as fuzzy logic or possibility theory.

papers.title: InterFuserDVS: Event-Enhanced Sensor Fusion for Safe RL-Based Decision Making
papers.summary: Autonomous driving systems rely heavily on robust sensor fusion to perceive complex envi- ronments. Traditional setups using RGB cameras and LiDAR often struggle in high-dynamic- range scenes or high-speed scenarios due to motion blur and latency. Dynamic Vision Sensors (DVS), or event cameras, offer a paradigm shift by capturing asynchronous brightness changes with microsecond temporal resolution and high dynamic range. In this paper, we propose an extended architecture of the state-of-the-art InterFuser model, integrating DVS as an additional modality to enhance perception reliability. We introduce a novel token-based fusion strategy that incorporates accumulated event frames into the transformer-based backbone of InterFuser. Our method leverages the complementary nature of RGB, LiDAR, and DVS data. We evaluate our approach on the Car Learning to Act (CARLA) Leaderboard benchmarks, demonstrating that the inclusion of DVS improves the robustness of the driving agent, achieving a competitive Driving Score of 77.2 and a superior Route Completion of 100%. The results indicate that event-based vision is a promising direction for improving safety and performance in adverse lighting and dynamic conditions.

ai.tldr: 提出InterFuserDVS架构，将事件相机（DVS）集成到InterFuser模型中，通过令牌级融合策略提升自动驾驶在极端光照和高速场景下的鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 传统RGB相机和LiDAR在高动态范围或高速场景中因运动模糊和延迟而表现不佳，事件相机具有微秒级时间分辨率和极高动态范围，可弥补这一缺陷。
ai.method: 在InterFuser的Transformer骨干中引入累积事件帧作为额外模态，设计基于令牌的融合策略，将RGB、LiDAR和DVS数据互补整合。
ai.result: 在CARLA Leaderboard上取得77.2的驾驶分数和100%的路线完成率，验证了事件视觉对安全性和性能的提升。
ai.help_to_user: 展示了如何将事件相机与现有传感器融合框架结合，为自动驾驶安全研究提供新思路。

idea_spark.idea: 利用事件相机的高时间分辨率，设计动态注意力机制，在快速运动场景中优先处理事件流，减少计算延迟。
idea_spark.risk: 事件相机在低纹理或静态场景中信息稀疏，可能影响融合效果；硬件成本与现有系统兼容性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受生物视觉系统启发，事件相机模拟视网膜对亮度变化的异步响应，可探索更仿生的感知-决策一体化架构。

zh.tldr: 提出InterFuserDVS架构，将事件相机（DVS）集成到InterFuser模型中，通过令牌级融合策略提升自动驾驶在极端光照和高速场景下的鲁棒性。
zh.motivation: 传统RGB相机和LiDAR在高动态范围或高速场景中因运动模糊和延迟而表现不佳，事件相机具有微秒级时间分辨率和极高动态范围，可弥补这一缺陷。
zh.method: 在InterFuser的Transformer骨干中引入累积事件帧作为额外模态，设计基于令牌的融合策略，将RGB、LiDAR和DVS数据互补整合。
zh.result: 在CARLA Leaderboard上取得77.2的驾驶分数和100%的路线完成率，验证了事件视觉对安全性和性能的提升。
zh.help_to_user: 展示了如何将事件相机与现有传感器融合框架结合，为自动驾驶安全研究提供新思路。

idea_spark.idea: 利用事件相机的高时间分辨率，设计动态注意力机制，在快速运动场景中优先处理事件流，减少计算延迟。
idea_spark.risk: 事件相机在低纹理或静态场景中信息稀疏，可能影响融合效果；硬件成本与现有系统兼容性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受生物视觉系统启发，事件相机模拟视网膜对亮度变化的异步响应，可探索更仿生的感知-决策一体化架构。

en.tldr: Proposes InterFuserDVS, integrating Dynamic Vision Sensors into the InterFuser model via a token-level fusion strategy to enhance autonomous driving robustness in adverse lighting and high-speed scenarios.
en.motivation: Traditional RGB cameras and LiDAR suffer from motion blur and latency in high-dynamic-range or high-speed scenes; event cameras offer microsecond temporal resolution and high dynamic range to address these issues.
en.method: Incorporates accumulated event frames as an additional modality into the transformer backbone of InterFuser, using a novel token-based fusion strategy to complement RGB, LiDAR, and DVS data.
en.result: Achieves a Driving Score of 77.2 and 100% Route Completion on the CARLA Leaderboard, demonstrating improved safety and performance.
en.help_to_user: Demonstrates how to integrate event cameras with existing sensor fusion frameworks, providing new insights for autonomous driving safety research.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the high temporal resolution of event cameras to design a dynamic attention mechanism that prioritizes event streams in fast motion scenarios, reducing computational latency.
idea_spark.risk: Event cameras may provide sparse information in low-texture or static scenes, potentially affecting fusion effectiveness; hardware cost and compatibility with existing systems need further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by biological vision systems, event cameras mimic the retina's asynchronous response to brightness changes, suggesting exploration of more biomimetic perception-decision integrated architectures.

papers.title: Agent Island: A Saturation- and Contamination-Resistant Benchmark from Multiagent Games
papers.summary: Static capabilities benchmarks suffer from saturation and contamination, making it difficult to track capabilities progress over time. We introduce Agent Island, a multiplayer simulation environment in which language-model agents compete in a game of interagent cooperation, conflict, and persuasion. The environment yields a dynamic benchmark designed to mitigate both saturation and contamination; new models can always outperform the current leading player in this winner-take-all game, and agents compete against other adaptive agents rather than face a fixed task set. We rank players with a Bayesian Plackett-Luce model, allowing us to quantify uncertainty in player skill. In 999 games involving 49 unique models, openai/gpt-5.5 dominates its peers with a posterior mean skill of 5.64, compared with 3.10 for the second-ranked model, openai/gpt-5.2, and 2.86 for the third-ranked model, openai/gpt-5.3-codex. We release the game logs as a dataset for analyses of model behavior. As an example, we investigate same-provider preference in final-round votes and find that models are 8.3 p.p. more likely to support a same-provider finalist than finalists from other providers. This preference is not uniform across providers: among separately estimated providers, the effect is strongest for OpenAI models and weakest for Anthropic models.

ai.tldr: 提出Agent Island，一个基于多智能体博弈的动态基准，通过竞争性游戏环境抵抗基准饱和与污染，并利用贝叶斯模型量化玩家技能。
ai.motivation: 静态基准易饱和和污染，难以追踪能力进展，需要动态、抗污染的评估方法。
ai.method: 构建多智能体模拟环境，语言模型代理在合作、冲突与说服游戏中竞争；采用贝叶斯Plackett-Luce模型排名，并分析投票中的同提供商偏好。
ai.result: 在999场游戏中，openai/gpt-5.5以5.64技能均值领先；模型对同提供商决赛选手的支持率高出8.3个百分点，OpenAI模型效应最强，Anthropic最弱。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种动态基准设计思路，可缓解基准饱和与污染问题，并揭示模型行为中的提供商偏好。

idea_spark.idea: 利用多智能体博弈的自我进化特性，构建持续更新的基准，避免静态测试集的局限性。
idea_spark.risk: 游戏环境可能引入特定博弈策略偏差，影响泛化性；同提供商偏好分析需更多数据验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受多智能体强化学习与博弈论启发，将竞争与合作作为动态评估的驱动力。

zh.motivation: 静态基准易饱和和污染，难以追踪能力进展，需要动态、抗污染的评估方法。
zh.method: 构建多智能体模拟环境，语言模型代理在合作、冲突与说服游戏中竞争；采用贝叶斯Plackett-Luce模型排名，并分析投票中的同提供商偏好。
zh.result: 在999场游戏中，openai/gpt-5.5以5.64技能均值领先；模型对同提供商决赛选手的支持率高出8.3个百分点，OpenAI模型效应最强，Anthropic最弱。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种动态基准设计思路，可缓解基准饱和与污染问题，并揭示模型行为中的提供商偏好。

idea_spark.idea: 利用多智能体博弈的自我进化特性，构建持续更新的基准，避免静态测试集的局限性。
idea_spark.risk: 游戏环境可能引入特定博弈策略偏差，影响泛化性；同提供商偏好分析需更多数据验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受多智能体强化学习与博弈论启发，将竞争与合作作为动态评估的驱动力。

en.tldr: Introduces Agent Island, a dynamic benchmark from multiagent games that resists saturation and contamination, using Bayesian ranking to quantify skill and revealing same-provider voting bias.
en.motivation: Static benchmarks suffer from saturation and contamination, hindering capability tracking; a dynamic, contamination-resistant evaluation is needed.
en.method: Builds a multiplayer simulation where language-model agents compete in cooperation, conflict, and persuasion; ranks players via Bayesian Plackett-Luce model and analyzes same-provider preference in final votes.
en.result: In 999 games, openai/gpt-5.5 leads with skill 5.64; models favor same-provider finalists by 8.3 p.p., with strongest effect for OpenAI and weakest for Anthropic.
en.help_to_user: Offers a dynamic benchmark design that mitigates saturation and contamination, and reveals provider bias in model behavior.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage self-evolving multiagent games to create continuously updated benchmarks, avoiding static test set limitations.
idea_spark.risk: Game-specific strategies may introduce bias; same-provider preference analysis requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by multiagent reinforcement learning and game theory, using competition and cooperation as dynamic evaluation drivers.

papers.title: CapsID: Soft-Routed Variable-Length Semantic IDs for Generative Recommendation
papers.summary: Generative recommendation maps each item to a sequence of Semantic IDs (SIDs) and recasts retrieval as autoregressive token generation. In this paradigm the main bottleneck is the tokenizer rather than the Transformer: residual vector quantization with a hard nearest-neighbor assignment at every layer collapses multi-faceted item semantics at cluster boundaries and propagates early errors to later SID positions. A common workaround is to append a dense vector or attribute prefix to the SID, but this dual-representation design inflates inference cost and gives up the simplicity of a generative interface. We address the bottleneck at the tokenizer itself. CAPSID replaces hard residual quantization with capsule routing: at each layer an item probabilistically routes to several semantic capsules, the residual is updated by the routed reconstruction rather than by a single winning code, and the SID terminates once the active capsule's confidence is high enough. On top of CAPSID, SEMANTICBPE composes adjacent SID tokens into reusable subwords by combining their co-occurrence with their embedding compatibility. On Amazon Beauty, Sports, Toys, and a 35M-item proprietary industrial catalog, CAPSID+SEMANTICBPE improves Recall at 10 by 9.6% on average over ReSID, the strongest single-representation baseline, and matches or exceeds a COBRA-style sparse-dense system on every public benchmark while running at 51% of its inference latency. Ablations show that soft routing, iterative agreement, and confidence-driven length each contribute independently, and the gains are largest on tail items where boundary semantics dominate.

ai.tldr: 提出CapsID，用胶囊路由替代硬残差量化，生成可变长度语义ID，结合SemanticBPE提升生成式推荐性能。
ai.motivation: 现有生成式推荐中残差向量量化的硬最近邻分配导致语义坍缩和错误传播，而附加稠密向量的双表示设计增加推理成本。
ai.method: CapsID采用软路由胶囊机制，每层物品概率路由到多个语义胶囊，残差由路由重建更新，当活跃胶囊置信度足够高时终止SID序列；SemanticBPE通过共现和嵌入兼容性组合相邻SID为子词。
ai.result: 在Amazon Beauty、Sports、Toys及35M工业数据集上，CapsID+SemanticBPE在Recall@10上平均比ReSID提升9.6%，推理延迟仅为COBRA风格系统的51%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何通过改进语义ID生成来提升生成式推荐的准确性和效率。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将胶囊路由与对比学习结合，进一步优化语义胶囊的区分性。
idea_spark.risk: 软路由可能增加训练复杂度，且置信度阈值需要仔细调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受胶囊网络动态路由启发，将硬量化变为软路由，实现更灵活的语义表示。

zh.tldr: 提出CapsID，用胶囊路由替代硬残差量化，生成可变长度语义ID，结合SemanticBPE提升生成式推荐性能。
zh.motivation: 现有生成式推荐中残差向量量化的硬最近邻分配导致语义坍缩和错误传播，而附加稠密向量的双表示设计增加推理成本。
zh.method: CapsID采用软路由胶囊机制，每层物品概率路由到多个语义胶囊，残差由路由重建更新，当活跃胶囊置信度足够高时终止SID序列；SemanticBPE通过共现和嵌入兼容性组合相邻SID为子词。
zh.result: 在Amazon Beauty、Sports、Toys及35M工业数据集上，CapsID+SemanticBPE在Recall@10上平均比ReSID提升9.6%，推理延迟仅为COBRA风格系统的51%。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何通过改进语义ID生成来提升生成式推荐的准确性和效率。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将胶囊路由与对比学习结合，进一步优化语义胶囊的区分性。
idea_spark.risk: 软路由可能增加训练复杂度，且置信度阈值需要仔细调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受胶囊网络动态路由启发，将硬量化变为软路由，实现更灵活的语义表示。

en.tldr: Proposes CapsID, replacing hard residual quantization with capsule routing to generate variable-length semantic IDs, combined with SemanticBPE to boost generative recommendation performance.
en.motivation: Hard nearest-neighbor assignment in residual vector quantization causes semantic collapse and error propagation, while dual-representation designs inflate inference cost.
en.method: CapsID uses soft-routed capsule mechanism: each item probabilistically routes to multiple semantic capsules per layer, residual updated by routed reconstruction, SID terminates when active capsule confidence is high; SemanticBPE composes adjacent SIDs into subwords via co-occurrence and embedding compatibility.
en.result: On Amazon Beauty, Sports, Toys, and a 35M-item industrial dataset, CapsID+SemanticBPE improves Recall@10 by 9.6% on average over ReSID, with 51% inference latency of a COBRA-style system.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how improving semantic ID generation can enhance accuracy and efficiency of generative recommendation.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining capsule routing with contrastive learning to further improve discriminability of semantic capsules.
idea_spark.risk: Soft routing may increase training complexity, and confidence thresholds require careful tuning.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by dynamic routing in capsule networks, replacing hard quantization with soft routing for more flexible semantic representation.

papers.title: Velox: Learning Representations of 4D Geometry and Appearance
papers.summary: We introduce a framework for learning latent representations of 4D objects which are descriptive, faithfully capturing object geometry and appearance; compressive, aiding in downstream efficiency; and accessible, requiring minimal input, i.e., an unstructured dynamic point cloud, to construct. Specifically, Velox trains an encoder to compress spatiotemporal color point clouds into a set of dynamic shape tokens. These tokens are supervised using two complementary decoders: a 4D surface decoder, which models the time-varying surface distribution capturing the geometry; and a Gaussian decoder, which maps the tokens to 3D Gaussians, helping learn appearance. To demonstrate the utility of our representation, we evaluate it across three downstream tasks -- video-to-4D generation, 3D tracking, and cloth simulation via image-to-4D generation -- and observe strong performances in all settings.

ai.tldr: 提出Velox框架，从非结构化的动态点云中学习4D对象的潜在表示，该表示具有描述性、压缩性和易获取性。
ai.motivation: 现有4D表示方法要么需要密集输入（如网格或视频），要么缺乏对几何和外观的联合建模，难以兼顾描述性、压缩性和易用性。
ai.method: 训练编码器将时空彩色点云压缩为一组动态形状令牌，并通过4D表面解码器（建模时变表面分布）和高斯解码器（映射为3D高斯以学习外观）进行监督。
ai.result: 在视频到4D生成、3D跟踪和基于图像到4D生成的布料模拟三个下游任务中均取得强性能。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户从简单的动态点云输入高效获取紧凑且富有表现力的4D几何与外观表示，便于后续生成、跟踪和模拟。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将动态形状令牌与扩散模型结合，实现更高质量的4D生成。
idea_spark.risk: 对高度动态或拓扑变化剧烈的对象，表面解码器可能难以准确建模。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受神经隐式表示和3D高斯泼溅启发，将两者互补用于4D几何与外观联合学习。

zh.tldr: 提出Velox框架，从非结构化的动态点云中学习4D对象的潜在表示，该表示具有描述性、压缩性和易获取性。
zh.motivation: 现有4D表示方法要么需要密集输入（如网格或视频），要么缺乏对几何和外观的联合建模，难以兼顾描述性、压缩性和易用性。
zh.method: 训练编码器将时空彩色点云压缩为一组动态形状令牌，并通过4D表面解码器（建模时变表面分布）和高斯解码器（映射为3D高斯以学习外观）进行监督。
zh.result: 在视频到4D生成、3D跟踪和基于图像到4D生成的布料模拟三个下游任务中均取得强性能。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户从简单的动态点云输入高效获取紧凑且富有表现力的4D几何与外观表示，便于后续生成、跟踪和模拟。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将动态形状令牌与扩散模型结合，实现更高质量的4D生成。
idea_spark.risk: 对高度动态或拓扑变化剧烈的对象，表面解码器可能难以准确建模。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受神经隐式表示和3D高斯泼溅启发，将两者互补用于4D几何与外观联合学习。

en.tldr: Proposes Velox, a framework to learn latent representations of 4D objects from unstructured dynamic point clouds, which are descriptive, compressive, and accessible.
en.motivation: Existing 4D representations either require dense inputs (e.g., meshes or videos) or lack joint modeling of geometry and appearance, making it hard to balance descriptiveness, compression, and ease of use.
en.method: Trains an encoder to compress spatiotemporal color point clouds into a set of dynamic shape tokens, supervised by a 4D surface decoder (modeling time-varying surface distribution) and a Gaussian decoder (mapping tokens to 3D Gaussians for appearance).
en.result: Achieves strong performance on three downstream tasks: video-to-4D generation, 3D tracking, and cloth simulation via image-to-4D generation.
en.help_to_user: Helps users obtain compact yet expressive 4D geometry and appearance representations from simple dynamic point clouds, facilitating downstream generation, tracking, and simulation.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining dynamic shape tokens with diffusion models for higher-quality 4D generation.
idea_spark.risk: For highly dynamic or topologically changing objects, the surface decoder may struggle to model accurately.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by neural implicit representations and 3D Gaussian splatting, combining them complementarily for joint 4D geometry and appearance learning.

papers.title: Reproducing Complex Set-Compositional Information Retrieval
papers.summary: Complex information needs may involve set-compositional queries using conjunction, disjunction, and exclusion, yet it remains unclear whether current retrieval paradigms genuinely satisfy such constraints or exploit `semantic shortcuts'. We conduct a reproducibility study to benchmark major retrieval families and reasoning-targeted methods on QUEST and QUEST+Variants, and introduce LIMIT+, a controlled benchmark where relevance depends on arbitrary attribute predicates and constraint satisfaction, and less on pretrained knowledge. Our findings show that (i) on QUEST, the best neural retrievers achieve an effectiveness that is more than double what can be achieved with BM25 (Recall@100 ${>}$0.41 vs.\ 0.20), but reasoning-targeted methods like ReasonIR and Search-R1 do not outperform general-purpose retrievers uniformly; (ii) on LIMIT+, gains fail to transfer, where the strongest QUEST method collapses from Recall@100${\approx}$0.42 to below 0.02, while classic lexical retrieval gains to ${\sim}$0.96. Lastly, (iii) stratifying by compositional depth reveals a consistent degradation across all methods, where algebraic sparse and lexical methods show more stable performance while dense approaches collapse. We release code and LIMIT+ data generation scripts to support future reproducibility and controlled evaluation.

ai.tldr: 本研究复现并评估了多种检索范式在集合组合查询上的表现，发现神经检索在QUEST上优于BM25，但在新基准LIMIT+上失效，而经典词法检索反而表现稳定。
ai.motivation: 现有检索系统是否真正满足集合组合查询（与、或、排除）的约束，还是依赖语义捷径尚不清楚。
ai.method: 在QUEST和LIMIT+基准上对主流检索家族及推理导向方法进行复现实验，并引入基于任意属性谓词和约束满足的LIMIT+基准。
ai.result: 神经检索在QUEST上Recall@100>0.41，但在LIMIT+上降至<0.02；词法检索在LIMIT+上达到~0.96；所有方法随组合深度增加性能下降。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解不同检索范式在处理复杂集合组合查询时的真实能力与局限性。

idea_spark.idea: 设计结合神经语义匹配与词法约束满足的混合检索模型，以兼顾灵活性与可靠性。
idea_spark.risk: 混合模型可能增加计算复杂度，且在不同组合深度上的泛化性仍需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从词法检索在LIMIT+上的稳定性获得启发，可探索将符号约束注入神经检索的训练或推理过程。

zh.tldr: 本研究复现并评估了多种检索范式在集合组合查询上的表现，发现神经检索在QUEST上优于BM25，但在新基准LIMIT+上失效，而经典词法检索反而表现稳定。
zh.motivation: 现有检索系统是否真正满足集合组合查询（与、或、排除）的约束，还是依赖语义捷径尚不清楚。
zh.method: 在QUEST和LIMIT+基准上对主流检索家族及推理导向方法进行复现实验，并引入基于任意属性谓词和约束满足的LIMIT+基准。
zh.result: 神经检索在QUEST上Recall@100>0.41，但在LIMIT+上降至<0.02；词法检索在LIMIT+上达到~0.96；所有方法随组合深度增加性能下降。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解不同检索范式在处理复杂集合组合查询时的真实能力与局限性。

idea_spark.idea: 设计结合神经语义匹配与词法约束满足的混合检索模型，以兼顾灵活性与可靠性。
idea_spark.risk: 混合模型可能增加计算复杂度，且在不同组合深度上的泛化性仍需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从词法检索在LIMIT+上的稳定性获得启发，可探索将符号约束注入神经检索的训练或推理过程。

en.tldr: This reproducibility study evaluates retrieval paradigms on set-compositional queries, finding neural retrievers excel on QUEST but fail on LIMIT+, while lexical retrieval remains robust.
en.motivation: It is unclear whether current retrieval systems truly satisfy set-compositional constraints (AND, OR, NOT) or exploit semantic shortcuts.
en.method: We benchmark major retrieval families and reasoning-targeted methods on QUEST and LIMIT+, a new controlled benchmark based on arbitrary attribute predicates and constraint satisfaction.
en.result: Neural retrievers achieve Recall@100>0.41 on QUEST but drop below 0.02 on LIMIT+; lexical retrieval reaches ~0.96 on LIMIT+; all methods degrade with compositional depth.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the true capabilities and limitations of different retrieval paradigms for complex set-compositional queries.

idea_spark.idea: Design a hybrid retrieval model combining neural semantic matching with lexical constraint satisfaction for both flexibility and reliability.
idea_spark.risk: Hybrid models may increase computational cost and require validation across varying compositional depths.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by lexical retrieval's stability on LIMIT+, explore injecting symbolic constraints into neural retrieval training or inference.

papers.title: Distributed TD Tracking with Linear Function Approximation over Directed Communication Networks
papers.summary: We study the policy evaluation problem in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) over directed communication networks, where agents cooperate with each other to explore an unknown environment and accomplish a specific task. We propose a Push-Pull-type distributed algorithm, named PP-DTD, for policy evaluation in MARL within the framework of temporal difference (TD) learning with linear function approximation. PP-DTD integrates TD learning with the Push-Pull mechanism to accommodate directed communication networks, and further utilizes variance reduction techniques to enhance both algorithmic stability and convergence rate. We show that PP-DTD achieves linear convergence to a neighborhood of the optimum under constant step-sizes and a convergence rate of $\mathcal{O}({T^{-1}})$ under decaying step-sizes when the sample is independent and identically distributed or Markovian. To the best of our knowledge, PP-DTD is the first distributed algorithm for policy evaluation in MARL over directed graphs that achieves a comparable convergence rate to single-agent TD. The numerical experiments on cooperative navigation tasks demonstrate the robustness and effectiveness of PP-DTD.

ai.tldr: 提出PP-DTD算法，在有向通信网络上实现多智能体强化学习的策略评估，达到与单智能体TD相当的收敛速度。
ai.motivation: 现有分布式TD算法大多假设无向图，难以直接应用于有向通信网络；且收敛速度与单智能体TD存在差距。
ai.method: 将TD学习与Push-Pull机制结合，并引入方差缩减技术，设计PP-DTD算法。
ai.result: 在常数步长下线性收敛到最优邻域，在衰减步长下达到O(T^{-1})收敛率；数值实验验证了鲁棒性和有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 为有向通信网络下的多智能体强化学习策略评估提供了一种高效、稳定的分布式算法。

idea_spark.idea: 能否将PP-DTD扩展到非平稳环境或部分可观测场景？
idea_spark.risk: 有向图下信息传播延迟或丢包可能影响算法稳定性，需进一步分析鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴分布式优化中的Push-Pull思想，为强化学习中的通信约束问题提供新视角。

en.tldr: Proposes PP-DTD, a distributed algorithm for policy evaluation in MARL over directed communication networks, achieving convergence rates comparable to single-agent TD.
en.motivation: Existing distributed TD algorithms mostly assume undirected graphs, limiting applicability to directed networks; convergence rates lag behind single-agent TD.
en.method: Integrates TD learning with the Push-Pull mechanism and variance reduction techniques to form PP-DTD.
en.result: Achieves linear convergence under constant step-sizes and O(T^{-1}) rate under decaying step-sizes; numerical experiments confirm robustness and effectiveness.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient and stable distributed algorithm for policy evaluation in MARL over directed communication networks.

idea_spark.idea: Can PP-DTD be extended to non-stationary environments or partially observable settings?
idea_spark.risk: Delays or packet loss in directed networks may affect stability; further robustness analysis is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging Push-Pull from distributed optimization offers a new perspective for communication-constrained RL.

papers.title: A unified Benchmark for Multi-Frame Image Restoration under Severe Refractive Warping
papers.summary: Video sequence capturing through refractive dynamic media, such as a turbulent air or water surface, often suffer from severe geometric distortions and temporal instability. While recent advances address mild atmospheric turbulence, no existing benchmarks systematically evaluate restoration methods under strong and highly nonuniform refractive conditions. We present a comprehensive benchmark for geometric distortion removal in video, covering a range from turbulence-like mild warping to strong discontinuous refractive deformations. The benchmark includes both laboratory-captured real data and synthetic sequences generated for static scenes via physics-based light refraction modeling across four distortion levels and multiple surface wave types. We evaluate a spectrum of methods from simple baselines and classical registration algorithms to advanced learning-based approaches including DATUM and our proposed diffusion based V-cache for high and extreme distortions regimes. Evaluation uses both pixel-level (PSNR, SSIM), and perceptual (LPIPS, DINO, CLIP) metrics providing the first large scale analysis of geometric distortion removal. Our benchmark establishes a new foundation for developing and evaluating algorithms capable of reconstructing video from highly distorted optical environments. Our code and datasets are available at https://github.com/iafoss/refractive-mfir-benchmark.

ai.tldr: 提出了一个用于严重折射扭曲下多帧图像恢复的统一基准，包含实验室真实数据和物理模拟合成数据，评估了从经典到基于扩散的多种方法。
ai.motivation: 现有基准缺乏对强非均匀折射条件下几何畸变去除的系统评估。
ai.method: 构建包含四种扭曲级别和多种表面波类型的基准，使用物理光折射模型生成合成序列，并引入扩散模型V-cache处理高扭曲。
ai.result: 提供了首个大规模几何畸变去除分析，使用像素级和感知级指标评估多种方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员系统评估和比较不同方法在严重折射扭曲下的视频恢复性能。

idea_spark.idea: 利用扩散模型V-cache处理极端扭曲，可能启发新的视频恢复架构。
idea_spark.risk: 合成数据与真实场景的差距可能影响基准的泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合物理模型和深度学习的方法值得进一步探索。

en.tldr: A unified benchmark for multi-frame image restoration under severe refractive warping, including real and synthetic data, evaluated from classical to diffusion-based methods.
en.motivation: Existing benchmarks lack systematic evaluation of geometric distortion removal under strong nonuniform refractive conditions.
en.method: Constructed benchmark with four distortion levels and multiple wave types, using physics-based refraction modeling for synthetic sequences and introducing diffusion-based V-cache for high distortions.
en.result: First large-scale analysis of geometric distortion removal using pixel-level and perceptual metrics.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers systematically evaluate and compare video restoration methods under severe refractive warping.

idea_spark.idea: Using diffusion model V-cache for extreme distortions may inspire new video restoration architectures.
idea_spark.risk: Gap between synthetic and real data may limit benchmark generalizability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining physical models with deep learning is worth further exploration.

papers.title: Topology of gradient Ricci shrinkers via weighted $L^2$ cohomology
papers.summary: This paper proves several topological results for smooth gradient Ricci shrinkers. We establish upper bounds for the Betti numbers, a vanishing theorem for cohomology, and a dichotomy for the number of ends. We also prove a full Hodge theorem for a large class of shrinkers. The methods are based on weighted $L^2$ cohomology and extend to self-shrinkers of the mean curvature flow.

ai.tldr: 本文通过加权L²上同调方法，证明了梯度Ricci收缩子的若干拓扑性质，包括贝蒂数上界、上同调消失定理、端点的二分法以及全Hodge定理，并将结果推广到平均曲率流的自收缩子。
ai.motivation: 理解梯度Ricci收缩子的拓扑结构，为Ricci流奇点分析提供工具。
ai.method: 利用加权L²上同调理论，结合几何分析技巧。
ai.result: 得到了贝蒂数上界、上同调消失、端点二分法以及全Hodge定理。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户掌握梯度Ricci收缩子的拓扑约束，可用于奇点分类或流形拓扑研究。

idea_spark.idea: 将加权L²上同调与谱几何结合，探索收缩子上的函数空间结构。
idea_spark.risk: 加权函数的选择可能影响结论的普适性，需验证不同权重下的稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将端点二分法推广到更一般的非紧流形，或与几何群作用结合。

en.tldr: This paper proves topological results for gradient Ricci shrinkers via weighted L^2 cohomology, including Betti number bounds, a vanishing theorem, an ends dichotomy, and a full Hodge theorem, extending to self-shrinkers of mean curvature flow.
en.motivation: To understand the topology of gradient Ricci shrinkers, aiding singularity analysis in Ricci flow.
en.method: Weighted L^2 cohomology combined with geometric analysis techniques.
en.result: Upper bounds on Betti numbers, cohomology vanishing, ends dichotomy, and a full Hodge theorem.
en.help_to_user: Provides topological constraints for gradient Ricci shrinkers, useful for singularity classification or manifold topology.

idea_spark.idea: Combine weighted L^2 cohomology with spectral geometry to explore function space structures on shrinkers.
idea_spark.risk: Choice of weight function may affect generality; stability under different weights needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider extending the ends dichotomy to more general non-compact manifolds or combining with geometric group actions.

papers.title: LCM: Lossless Context Management
papers.summary: We introduce Lossless Context Management (LCM), a deterministic architecture for LLM memory that outperforms Claude Code on long-context tasks. When benchmarked using Opus 4.6, our LCM-augmented coding agent, Volt, achieves higher scores than Claude Code on the OOLONG long-context eval, including at every context length between 32K and 1M tokens.   LCM may be considered both a vindication and extension of the recursive paradigm pioneered by Recursive Language Models (RLMs). Our results demonstrate that recursive context manipulation can outperform not just conventional LLMs, but frontier coding agents with native file-system access.   LCM departs from RLM by decomposing symbolic recursion into two deterministic, engine-managed mechanisms: recursive context compression, in which a hierarchical summary DAG automatically compacts older messages while retaining lossless pointers to every original; and recursive task partitioning, in which engine-managed parallel primitives like LLM-Map replace model-written loops. This trade-off, analogous to the move from GOTO to structured control flow in program-ming language design, sacrifices maximal flexibility for termination guarantees, zero-cost continuity on short tasks, and lossless retrievability of all prior state.

ai.tldr: 提出无损上下文管理（LCM），一种确定性LLM记忆架构，在长上下文任务上超越Claude Code。
ai.motivation: 现有LLM在处理超长上下文时性能下降，需要更高效、可恢复的记忆机制。
ai.method: 将符号递归分解为两种确定性机制：递归上下文压缩（构建层次摘要DAG）和递归任务划分（使用LLM-Map等并行原语）。
ai.result: LCM增强的编码代理Volt在OOLONG评测中，从32K到1M token的每个上下文长度上均优于Claude Code。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过结构化递归管理LLM上下文，提升长任务性能。

idea_spark.idea: 将编程语言中的结构化控制流思想（如从GOTO到结构化编程）应用于LLM记忆管理。
idea_spark.risk: 确定性机制可能限制模型在极端灵活场景下的表现。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从递归语言模型（RLM）和编程语言设计历史中获得启发。

zh.tldr: 提出无损上下文管理（LCM），一种确定性LLM记忆架构，在长上下文任务上超越Claude Code。
zh.motivation: 现有LLM在处理超长上下文时性能下降，需要更高效、可恢复的记忆机制。

en.tldr: Introduces Lossless Context Management (LCM), a deterministic LLM memory architecture that outperforms Claude Code on long-context tasks.
en.motivation: Existing LLMs degrade on very long contexts; need more efficient and recoverable memory mechanisms.
en.method: Decomposes symbolic recursion into two deterministic mechanisms: recursive context compression (hierarchical summary DAG) and recursive task partitioning (engine-managed parallel primitives like LLM-Map).
en.result: LCM-augmented coding agent Volt achieves higher scores than Claude Code on OOLONG eval at every context length from 32K to 1M tokens.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how structured recursion can manage LLM context for improved long-task performance.

idea_spark.idea: Apply structured control flow ideas from programming languages (e.g., GOTO to structured programming) to LLM memory management.
idea_spark.risk: Deterministic mechanisms may limit performance in extremely flexible scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Recursive Language Models (RLMs) and the history of programming language design.

papers.title: Gradients with Respect to Semantics Preserving Embeddings Tell the Uncertainty of Large Language Models
papers.summary: Uncertainty quantification (UQ) is an important technique for ensuring the trustworthiness of LLMs, given their tendency to hallucinate. Existing state-of-the-art UQ approaches for free-form generation rely heavily on sampling, which incurs high computational cost and variance. In this work, we propose the first gradient-based UQ method for free-form generation, SemGrad, which is sampling-free and computationally efficient. Unlike prior gradient-based methods developed for classification tasks that operates in parameter space, we propose to consider gradients in semantic space. Our method builds on the key intuition that a confident LLM should maintain stable output distributions under semantically equivalent input perturbations. We interpret the stability as the gradients in semantic space and introduce a Semantic Preservation Score (SPS) to identify embeddings that best capture semantics, with respect to which gradients are computed. We further propose HybridGrad, which combines the strengths of SemGrad and parameter gradients. Experiments demonstrate that both of our methods provide efficient and effective uncertainty estimates, achieving superior performance than state-of-the-art methods, particularly in settings with multiple valid responses.

ai.tldr: 提出首个基于梯度的自由文本生成不确定性量化方法SemGrad，通过语义空间梯度衡量LLM输出稳定性。
ai.motivation: 现有基于采样的不确定性量化方法计算成本高且方差大，需要更高效的方法。
ai.method: 定义语义保持分数(SPS)选择最佳语义嵌入，计算语义空间梯度作为不确定性指标，并融合参数梯度提出HybridGrad。
ai.result: 在多个数据集上优于现有方法，尤其在多有效回答场景下表现突出。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户评估LLM输出的可信度，识别潜在幻觉。

idea_spark.idea: 将梯度计算从参数空间扩展到语义空间，利用输入扰动下的输出稳定性度量不确定性。
idea_spark.risk: 语义嵌入的选择可能影响梯度质量，需要鲁棒的SPS。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从分类任务的梯度方法启发，但针对生成任务重新定义梯度空间。

zh.tldr: 提出首个基于梯度的自由文本生成不确定性量化方法SemGrad，通过语义空间梯度衡量LLM输出稳定性。
zh.motivation: 现有基于采样的不确定性量化方法计算成本高且方差大，需要更高效的方法。
zh.method: 定义语义保持分数(SPS)选择最佳语义嵌入，计算语义空间梯度作为不确定性指标，并融合参数梯度提出HybridGrad。

idea_spark.risk: 语义嵌入的选择可能影响梯度质量，需要鲁棒的SPS。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从分类任务的梯度方法启发，但针对生成任务重新定义梯度空间。

en.tldr: Proposes SemGrad, the first gradient-based UQ method for free-form generation, using gradients in semantic space to measure LLM output stability.
en.motivation: Existing sampling-based UQ methods are computationally expensive and high-variance; a more efficient approach is needed.
en.method: Introduces Semantic Preservation Score (SPS) to select optimal semantic embeddings, computes gradients in semantic space as uncertainty measure, and combines with parameter gradients in HybridGrad.
en.result: Outperforms state-of-the-art methods on multiple datasets, especially in settings with multiple valid responses.
en.help_to_user: Helps users assess the trustworthiness of LLM outputs and detect potential hallucinations.

idea_spark.idea: Extends gradient computation from parameter space to semantic space, leveraging output stability under input perturbations to quantify uncertainty.
idea_spark.risk: Quality of semantic embeddings may affect gradient reliability; robust SPS is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by gradient-based methods for classification, but redefines the gradient space for generation tasks.

papers.title: Ilov3Splat: Instance-Level Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Understanding in Gaussian Splatting
papers.summary: We introduce Ilov3Splat, a novel framework for instance-level open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding built on 3D Gaussian Splatting (3D-GS). Most prior work depends on 2D rendering-based matching or point-level semantic association, which undermines cross-view consistency, lacks coherent instance-level reasoning, and limits precision in downstream 3D tasks. To address these limitations, our method jointly optimizes scene geometry and semantic representations by augmenting Gaussian splats with view-consistent feature fields. Specifically, we leverage multi-resolution hash embedding to efficiently encode language-aligned CLIP features, enabling dense and coherent language grounding in 3D space. We further train an instance feature field using contrastive loss over SAM masks, supporting fine-grained object distinction across views. At inference time, CLIP-encoded queries are matched against the learned features, followed by two-stage 3D clustering to retrieve relevant Gaussian groups. This enables our framework to identify arbitrary objects in 3D scenes based on natural language descriptions, without requiring category supervision or manual annotations. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that Ilov3Splat outperforms prior open-vocabulary 3D-GS methods in both object selection and instance segmentation, offering a flexible and accurate solution for language-driven 3D scene understanding. Project page: https://csiro-robotics.github.io/Ilov3Splat.

ai.tldr: 提出Ilov3Splat框架，在3D高斯泼溅中实现实例级开放词汇场景理解，无需类别监督。
ai.motivation: 现有方法依赖2D渲染匹配或点级语义关联，缺乏跨视角一致性和实例级推理能力。
ai.method: 用多分辨率哈希嵌入编码CLIP特征，结合SAM掩码的对比学习训练实例特征场，推理时通过两阶段3D聚类匹配查询。
ai.result: 在标准基准上，物体选择和实例分割均优于先前开放词汇3D-GS方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户通过自然语言描述在3D场景中定位和分割任意物体。

idea_spark.idea: 将多分辨率哈希嵌入与对比学习结合，实现高效且一致的3D语义特征学习。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖预训练CLIP和SAM模型，可能对罕见或抽象描述泛化不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将2D开放词汇分割方法扩展到3D，并利用实例级特征场提升精度。

zh.tldr: 提出Ilov3Splat框架，在3D高斯泼溅中实现实例级开放词汇场景理解，无需类别监督。
zh.motivation: 现有方法依赖2D渲染匹配或点级语义关联，缺乏跨视角一致性和实例级推理能力。

idea_spark.risk: 依赖预训练CLIP和SAM模型，可能对罕见或抽象描述泛化不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将2D开放词汇分割方法扩展到3D，并利用实例级特征场提升精度。

en.tldr: Ilov3Splat achieves instance-level open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding in Gaussian Splatting without category supervision.
en.motivation: Prior methods rely on 2D rendering matching or point-level semantic association, lacking cross-view consistency and instance-level reasoning.
en.method: Encodes CLIP features via multi-resolution hash embedding, trains instance feature fields with contrastive loss over SAM masks, and retrieves objects via two-stage 3D clustering.
en.result: Outperforms prior open-vocabulary 3D-GS methods on object selection and instance segmentation benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Enables users to locate and segment arbitrary objects in 3D scenes using natural language descriptions.

idea_spark.idea: Combines multi-resolution hash embedding with contrastive learning for efficient and consistent 3D semantic feature learning.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on pretrained CLIP and SAM, which may generalize poorly to rare or abstract descriptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires extending 2D open-vocabulary segmentation to 3D with instance-level feature fields for improved precision.

papers.title: Joint Semantic Token Selection and Prompt Optimization for Interpretable Prompt Learning
papers.summary: Vision-language models such as CLIP achieve strong visual-textual alignment, but often suffer from overfitting and limited interpretability when adapted through continuous prompt learning. While discrete prompt optimization improves interpretability, it usually depends on large external models, leading to high computational costs and limited scalability. In this paper, we propose Interpretable Prompt Learning (IPL), a hybrid framework that alternates between discrete semantic token selection and continuous prompt optimization. Specifically, IPL formulates semantic token selection as an approximate submodular optimization problem, encouraging tokens that are both human-understandable and semantically diverse. It further adopts an alternating optimization strategy to integrate discrete token selection with continuous prompt tuning, improving interpretability while preserving adaptability to downstream tasks. Our framework is plug-and-play, allowing seamless integration with existing prompt learning methods. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks show that IPL consistently improves both interpretability and accuracy across five representative prompt learning methods, providing an effective and scalable extension to existing frameworks.

papers.title: Beyond Fixed Thresholds and Domain-Specific Benchmarks for Explainable Multi-Task Classification in Autonomous Vehicles
papers.summary: Scene understanding is a vital part of autonomous driving systems, which requires the use of deep learning models. Deep learning methods are intrinsically black box models, which lack transparency and safety in autonomous driving. To make these systems transparent, multi-task visual understanding has become crucial for explainable autonomous driving perception systems, where simultaneous prediction of multiple driving behaviors and their underlying explanations is essential for safe navigation and human trust in autonomous vehicles. In order to design an accurate and cross-cultural explainable autonomous driving system, we introduce a comprehensive confidence threshold sensitivity analysis that evaluates various threshold values to identify optimal decision boundaries for different tasks. Our analysis demonstrates that traditional fixed threshold approaches are suboptimal for multi-task scenarios. Through extensive evaluation, we demonstrate that our adaptive threshold selection methodology improves F1-scores across different tasks. In addition, we introduce IUST-XAI-AD, a novel dataset consisting of 958 images with human annotations for driving decisions and corresponding reasoning. This dataset addresses the critical gap in domain-specific evaluation benchmarks for distinct driving contexts and provides a more challenging test environment compared to existing datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that confidence threshold sensitivity analysis can significantly improve model performance, while the introduction of the IUST-XAI-AD dataset reveals important insights about cross-cultural driving behavior patterns. The combined contributions of this work provide both methodological advances and practical evaluation tools that can accelerate the development of more reliable, explainable, and culturally-adaptive autonomous driving systems for global deployment.

ai.method: 引入置信度阈值敏感性分析，自适应确定各任务最优决策边界；构建包含958张人工标注图像的IUST-XAI-AD数据集。

papers.title: Assessing Generalisation Capability of Machine Learning Models for Intrusion Detection
papers.summary: The growth of networked and IoT systems has intensified cyber-security threats and exposed the limits of traditional signature-based intrusion detection. Although machine-learning-based intrusion detection systems often report strong benchmark performance, high ac- curacy within a single dataset does not necessarily guarantee reliable performance in unseen network environments. This study investigates the generalisation capability of supervised machine learning models for intrusion detection using UNSW-NB15 and TON_IoT. Random Forest, Logistic Regression, and Naive Bayes were evaluated under same-dataset and cross-dataset settings. Random Forest achieved the strongest same dataset performance, with 95.08% accuracy on UNSW-NB15 and 99.79% on TON_IoT, but performance dropped sharply in cross-dataset testing. When trained on UNSW-NB15 and tested on TON_IoT or vice versa, below 40% accuracy. These results reveal a significant generalisation gap in intrusion detection. We connect this challenge to affective computing and human-centric AI, where behavioural signal analysis, anomaly detection, domain shift, and context-sensitive modelling are also central. This framing highlights the need for adaptive, generalisable cyber-security models that can operate across changing network and IoT environments.

ai.tldr: 研究评估了监督机器学习模型在入侵检测中的泛化能力，发现跨数据集测试时准确率显著下降。

papers.title: DART: A Vision-Language Foundation Model for Comprehensive Rope Condition Monitoring
papers.summary: The condition monitoring (CM) of synthetic fibre ropes (SFRs) used in offshore, maritime, and industrial settings demands more than a classifier: inspectors need continuous severity estimates, maintenance recommendations, anomaly flags, deterioration timelines, and automated reports, all from a single inspection image. We present DART (Damage Assessment via Rope Transformer), a vision-language foundation model that addresses the full rope inspection workflow through a unified multi-task architecture. DART extends the Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA) to the cross-modal domain by coupling a Vision Transformer (ViT-H/14) with Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct via a Severity-Conditioned Cross-Modal Fusion (SC-CMF) module. Three architectural innovations drive the model's versatility: (1) HD-MASK, a saliency-guided masking strategy that focuses self-supervised reconstruction on damage-dense patches; (2) per-class learnable severity gates that adaptively weight language grounding by damage category; and (3) a Contrastive Damage Disentanglement (CDD) loss that shapes the embedding space to simultaneously encode damage type, severity ordering, and cross-modal semantics. Trained once on 4,270 images spanning 14 fine-grained rope damage classes, the frozen DART backbone supports downstream tasks without any task-specific fine-tuning: damage classification (93.22 % accuracy, 91.04 % macro-F1, +38.5 pp over a vision-only baseline), continuous severity regression (Spearman rho = 0.94, within-1-ordinal accuracy 99.6 %), few-shot recognition (89.2 % macro-F1 at 20 shots). These results demonstrate that DART functions as a general-purpose CM backbone that goes well beyond classification, providing actionable inspection intelligence from a single shared representation.

ai.tldr: 提出DART，一个视觉-语言基础模型，统一处理绳索损伤分类、严重程度回归、少样本识别等多项任务。
ai.motivation: 现有绳索监测方法仅做分类，无法满足实际检测中连续严重度估计、维护建议等综合需求。
ai.method: 扩展JEPA到跨模态，用ViT-H/14编码图像，Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct生成语言，通过严重度条件跨模态融合模块连接，并引入HD-MASK掩码、可学习严重度门控和对比损伤解耦损失。
ai.result: 在14类损伤的4270张图像上训练后，分类准确率93.22%，严重度回归Spearman ρ=0.94，20-shot少样本F1=89.2%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供从单张图像自动生成损伤类型、严重程度、异常标记和维修建议的完整检测方案。

idea_spark.inspiration: 用语言模型输出结构化报告替代传统分类标签，提升检测结果的可解释性和实用性。

en.motivation: Existing rope monitoring methods only classify, failing to meet real inspection needs for continuous severity estimation, maintenance recommendations, etc.
en.method: Extends JEPA to cross-modal by coupling ViT-H/14 with Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct via a Severity-Conditioned Cross-Modal Fusion module, plus HD-MASK masking, learnable severity gates, and Contrastive Damage Disentanglement loss.

papers.title: Graph-Augmented LLMs for Swiss MP Ideology Prediction
papers.summary: Approximating the ideological position of Members of Parliament (MPs) is a fundamental task in political science, helping researchers understand legislative behavior, party alignment, and policy preferences. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promising results in estimating MPs' ideological stances, there are more actors and elements in the parliamentary system, and relations between them, that could provide a wider and more informative picture. However, due to the complexity of integrating them in the prediction task, these additional elements are generally ignored. In this work, we propose an LLM framework, PG-RAG, that implements a retrieval-augmented generation pipeline: it first queries a political knowledge graph (KG) and then integrates the resulting graph-structured information into the context. This allows for capturing both textual semantics and inter-MP relationships, another relevant information source in any parliamentary system. We evaluate the approach on the task of ideology prediction, using data from a Swiss parliamentary dataset. When comparing graph-augmented models against several state-of-the-art baselines, the results demonstrate that incorporating this enriched information, which encodes information about different entities and relations, improves prediction performance. These results help to highlight the value of domain-specific relational information in modeling political behavior.

ai.tldr: 提出PG-RAG框架，通过检索政治知识图谱增强LLM，在瑞士议会数据上提升议员意识形态预测性能。
ai.motivation: 现有LLM预测议员意识形态时忽略了议会系统中丰富的实体与关系信息。
ai.method: 构建检索增强生成管道，先查询政治知识图谱，再将图结构信息融入LLM上下文。
ai.result: 图增强模型在瑞士议会数据集上优于多个基线，表明关系信息能提升预测效果。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种将结构化关系信息融入LLM的通用方法，适用于需要利用实体关系的预测任务。

en.tldr: Proposes PG-RAG, a retrieval-augmented generation framework that enhances LLMs with political knowledge graphs, improving MP ideology prediction on Swiss parliamentary data.
en.motivation: Existing LLM-based ideology prediction ignores rich entity and relation information in parliamentary systems.
en.method: Builds a retrieval-augmented pipeline that first queries a political knowledge graph and then integrates graph-structured information into LLM context.
en.result: Graph-augmented models outperform several baselines on Swiss parliamentary dataset, showing the value of relational information.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general method to incorporate structured relational information into LLMs, applicable to prediction tasks leveraging entity relationships.

idea_spark.risk: Knowledge graph quality affects performance; graph structure may introduce noise or outdated information.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine graph neural networks with LLMs to encode subgraphs during retrieval instead of using only textual representations.

papers.title: NoisyCausal: A Benchmark for Evaluating Causal Reasoning Under Structured Noise
papers.summary: Causal reasoning in natural language requires identifying relevant variables, understanding their interactions, and reasoning about effects and interventions, often under noisy or ambiguous conditions. While large language models (LLMs) exhibit strong general reasoning abilities, they struggle to disentangle correlation from causation, particularly when observations are partially incorrect or irrelevant information is present. In this work, we introduce NoisyCausal, a new benchmark designed to evaluate causal reasoning under structured noise. Each instance is generated from a ground-truth causal graph and contextualized with a natural language scenario by injecting controllable forms of noise, such as irrelevant distractors, value perturbations, confounding, and partial observability. Moreover, we propose a modular reasoning framework that combines LLMs with explicit causal structure to address these challenges. Our method prompts the LLM to extract variables, construct a causal graph from context, and then reformulates the reasoning task as a structured prompt grounded in this graph. Rather than relying on statistical patterns alone, the LLM is guided by symbolic structure, enabling more interpretable and robust inference. Experimental results show that our method significantly outperforms standard prompting and reasoning baselines on NoisyCausal. Furthermore, it generalizes well to external benchmarks such as Cladder without task-specific tuning. Our findings highlight the importance of combining causal abstractions with language-driven reasoning to achieve faithful and robust causal understanding in LLMs.

ai.tldr: 提出NoisyCausal基准，评估大语言模型在结构化噪声下的因果推理能力，并设计模块化推理框架提升性能。
ai.motivation: 现有LLM难以区分相关性与因果性，尤其在噪声条件下表现不佳，缺乏专门评估结构化噪声下因果推理的基准。
ai.method: 从真实因果图生成实例，注入干扰、值扰动、混杂和部分可观测等噪声；提出模块化框架，引导LLM提取变量、构建因果图并基于图结构进行推理。
ai.result: 在NoisyCausal上显著优于标准提示和推理基线，且无需任务特定调优即可泛化到Cladder等外部基准。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何评估和提升LLM在噪声环境下的因果推理能力，提供可复用的基准和推理方法。

idea_spark.idea: 结合因果图与LLM的符号-神经混合方法，可进一步探索动态因果图更新或交互式推理。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖LLM提取因果图可能引入错误，需验证图构建的准确性；噪声类型覆盖有限，需扩展。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受因果推断与语言模型结合启发，未来可研究多步干预推理或反事实生成。

en.tldr: Introduces NoisyCausal, a benchmark for evaluating causal reasoning under structured noise in LLMs, and proposes a modular reasoning framework that significantly improves performance.
en.motivation: LLMs struggle to disentangle correlation from causation, especially under noisy conditions, and there is a lack of benchmarks specifically targeting structured noise in causal reasoning.
en.method: Generates instances from ground-truth causal graphs with controllable noise (distractors, perturbations, confounding, partial observability); proposes a modular framework that prompts LLMs to extract variables, construct causal graphs, and reason based on graph structure.
en.result: Outperforms standard prompting and reasoning baselines on NoisyCausal, and generalizes to external benchmarks like Cladder without task-specific tuning.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to evaluate and improve LLM causal reasoning under noise, providing a reusable benchmark and reasoning method.

idea_spark.idea: Combining causal graphs with LLMs in a neuro-symbolic approach could be extended to dynamic graph updates or interactive reasoning.
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on LLM for causal graph extraction may introduce errors; noise types are limited and need expansion.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the integration of causal inference and language models, future work could explore multi-step intervention reasoning or counterfactual generation.

papers.title: Angle-I2P: Angle-Consistent-Aware Hierarchical Attention for Cross-Modality Outlier Rejection
papers.summary: Image-to-point-cloud registration (I2P) is a fundamental task in robotic applications such as manipulation,grasping, and localization. Existing deep learning-based I2P methods seek to align image and point cloud features in a learned representation space to establish correspondences, and have achieved promising results. However, when the inlier ratio of the initial matching pairs is low, conventional Perspective-n-Points (PnP) methods may struggle to achieve accurate results. To address this limitation, we propose Angle-I2P, an outlier rejection network that leverages angle-consistent geometric constraints and hierarchical attention. First, we design a scale-invariant, crossmodality geometric constraint based on angular consistency. This explicit geometric constraint guides the model in distinguishing inliers from outliers. Furthermore, we propose a global-tolocal hierarchical attention mechanism that effectively filters out geometrically inconsistent matches under rigid transformation, thereby improving the Inlier Ratio (IR) and Registration Recall (RR). Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the 7Scenes, RGBD Scenes V2, and a self-collected dataset, with consistent improvements across all benchmarks.

ai.tldr: 提出Angle-I2P网络，利用角度一致性几何约束和层次注意力机制，在图像-点云配准中有效剔除异常匹配，提升低内点率下的配准精度。
ai.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在初始匹配内点率低时，传统PnP方法难以获得准确结果。
ai.method: 设计基于角度一致性的尺度不变跨模态几何约束，并引入全局到局部的层次注意力机制，过滤几何不一致匹配。
ai.result: 在7Scenes、RGBD Scenes V2及自采数据集上均取得最优性能，内点率和配准召回率一致提升。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用几何约束和注意力机制提升跨模态配准的鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 将层次注意力与几何约束结合，先全局筛选再局部细化，可推广至多模态特征融合场景。
idea_spark.risk: 对极端视角变化或严重遮挡场景的泛化能力需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用显式几何先验引导注意力机制，减少对大量标注数据的依赖。
